papers.title: Neural surrogates for crystal growth dynamics with variable supersaturation: explicit vs. implicit conditioning
papers.summary: Simulations of crystal growth are performed by using Convolutional Recurrent Neural Network surrogate models, trained on a dataset of time sequences computed by numerical integration of Allen-Cahn dynamics including faceting via kinetic anisotropy. Two network architectures are developed to take into account the effects of a variable supersaturation value. The first infers it implicitly by processing an input mini-sequence of a few evolution frames and then returns a consistent continuation of the evolution. The second takes the supersaturation parameter as an explicit input along with a single initial frame and predicts the entire sequence. The two models are systematically tested to establish strengths and weaknesses, comparing the prediction performance for models trained on datasets of different size and, in the first architecture, different lengths of input mini-sequence. The analysis of point-wise and mean absolute errors shows how the explicit parameter conditioning guarantees the best results, reproducing with high-fidelity the ground-truth profiles. Comparable results are achievable by the mini-sequence approach only when using larger training datasets. The trained models show strong conditioning by the supersaturation parameter, consistently reproducing its overall impact on growth rates as well as its local effect on the faceted morphology. Moreover, they are perfectly scalable even on 256 times larger domains and can be successfully extended to more than 10 times longer sequences with limited error accumulation. The analysis highlights the potential and limits of these approaches in view of their general exploitation for crystal growth simulations.

ai.tldr: 使用卷积循环神经网络代理模型模拟晶体生长，比较显式与隐式过饱和度条件控制方法。
ai.motivation: 传统晶体生长数值模拟计算成本高，需要高效代理模型，且需处理可变过饱和度的影响。
ai.method: 开发两种网络架构：隐式方法通过输入少量演化帧推断过饱和度并继续演化；显式方法将过饱和度作为显式输入，从单帧预测整个序列。
ai.result: 显式条件控制效果最佳，高保真复现真实曲线；隐式方法需更大训练集才能达到可比性能。模型对过饱和度敏感，可扩展至256倍大域和10倍长序列。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解晶体生长模拟中不同条件控制策略的优劣，指导选择高效代理模型。

idea_spark.idea: 结合显式条件控制与迁移学习，减少新参数场景下的训练数据需求。
idea_spark.risk: 显式条件可能过度依赖参数精度，对噪声敏感；隐式方法在数据不足时泛化能力差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受显式条件控制高保真度启发，可探索将关键物理参数显式编码到网络输入中，提升代理模型可靠性。

en.tldr: Neural surrogates for crystal growth dynamics compare explicit vs. implicit conditioning on variable supersaturation using convolutional recurrent networks.
en.motivation: Traditional numerical simulations of crystal growth are computationally expensive, necessitating efficient surrogate models that handle variable supersaturation.
en.method: Two architectures: implicit conditioning uses a mini-sequence of frames to infer supersaturation and continue evolution; explicit conditioning takes supersaturation as input with a single frame to predict the full sequence.
en.result: Explicit conditioning yields best results with high-fidelity ground-truth reproduction; implicit requires larger training datasets. Models are scalable to 256x larger domains and 10x longer sequences with limited error.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand trade-offs between conditioning strategies in crystal growth surrogate modeling, guiding efficient model selection.

idea_spark.idea: Combine explicit conditioning with transfer learning to reduce training data needs for new parameter regimes.
idea_spark.risk: Explicit conditioning may overly rely on parameter accuracy and be noise-sensitive; implicit methods generalize poorly with limited data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the high fidelity of explicit conditioning, encoding key physical parameters explicitly into network inputs can enhance surrogate reliability.

papers.title: Learning to Emulate Chaos: Adversarial Optimal Transport Regularization
papers.summary: Chaos arises in many complex dynamical systems, from weather to power grids, but is difficult to accurately model using data-driven emulators, including neural operator architectures. For chaotic systems, the inherent sensitivity to initial conditions makes exact long-term forecasts theoretically infeasible, meaning that traditional squared-error losses often fail when trained on noisy data. Recent work has focused on training emulators to match the statistical properties of chaotic attractors by introducing regularization based on handcrafted local features and summary statistics, as well as learned statistics extracted from a diverse dataset of trajectories. In this work, we propose a family of adversarial optimal transport objectives that jointly learn high-quality summary statistics and a physically consistent emulator. We theoretically analyze and experimentally validate a Sinkhorn divergence formulation (2-Wasserstein) and a WGAN-style dual formulation (1-Wasserstein). Our experiments across a variety of chaotic systems, including systems with high-dimensional chaotic attractors, show that emulators trained with our approach exhibit significantly improved long-term statistical fidelity.

ai.tldr: 提出对抗最优传输正则化方法，训练混沌系统仿真器，提升长期统计保真度。
ai.motivation: 混沌系统对初值敏感，传统平方误差损失在噪声数据上训练效果差，现有方法依赖手工特征或统计量。
ai.method: 采用Sinkhorn散度（2-Wasserstein）和WGAN对偶形式（1-Wasserstein）的对抗最优传输目标，联合学习高质量统计量和物理一致的仿真器。
ai.result: 在多种混沌系统（包括高维混沌吸引子）上，该方法显著提升了仿真器的长期统计保真度。
ai.help_to_user: 为混沌系统数据驱动建模提供一种鲁棒的正则化框架，适用于天气、电网等复杂系统。

idea_spark.idea: 将Wasserstein距离与对抗训练结合，替代传统MSE损失，使仿真器学习吸引子的统计分布而非精确轨迹。
idea_spark.risk: 对抗训练可能不稳定，需要仔细调节超参数；高维吸引子下计算成本较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从生成对抗网络和最优传输理论中汲取灵感，将统计匹配问题转化为分布对齐问题。

en.tldr: Proposes adversarial optimal transport regularization to train emulators for chaotic systems, improving long-term statistical fidelity.
en.motivation: Chaotic systems are sensitive to initial conditions; traditional squared-error losses fail on noisy data, and existing methods rely on handcrafted features or summary statistics.
en.method: Uses Sinkhorn divergence (2-Wasserstein) and WGAN-style dual formulation (1-Wasserstein) as adversarial optimal transport objectives to jointly learn high-quality summary statistics and a physically consistent emulator.
en.result: On various chaotic systems, including high-dimensional chaotic attractors, the approach significantly improves long-term statistical fidelity of the emulator.
en.help_to_user: Provides a robust regularization framework for data-driven modeling of chaotic systems, applicable to weather, power grids, and other complex systems.

idea_spark.idea: Replace traditional MSE loss with Wasserstein distance combined with adversarial training, enabling the emulator to learn the statistical distribution of the attractor rather than exact trajectories.
idea_spark.risk: Adversarial training may be unstable and requires careful hyperparameter tuning; computational cost can be high for high-dimensional attractors.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from generative adversarial networks and optimal transport theory, framing statistical matching as a distribution alignment problem.

papers.title: Assessing Emulator Design and Training for Modal Aerosol Microphysics Parameterizations in E3SMv2
papers.summary: Toward the goal of using Scientific Machine Learning (SciML) emulators to improve the numerical representation of aerosol processes in global atmospheric models, we explore the emulation of aerosol microphysics processes under cloud-free conditions in the 4-mode Modal Aerosol Module (MAM4) within the Energy Exascale Earth System Model version 2 (E3SMv2). To develop an in-depth understanding of the challenges and opportunities in applying SciML to aerosol processes, we begin with a simple feedforward neural network architecture that has been used in earlier studies, but we systematically examine key emulator design choices, including architecture complexity and variable normalization, while closely monitoring training convergence behavior.   Our results show that optimization convergence, scaling strategy, and network complexity strongly influence emulation accuracy. When effective scaling is applied and convergence is achieved, the relatively simple architecture, used together with a moderate network size, can reproduce key features of the microphysics-induced aerosol concentration changes with promising accuracy. These findings provide practical clues for the next stages of emulator development; they also provide general insights that are likely applicable to the emulation of other aerosol processes, as well as other atmospheric physics involving multi-scale variability.

ai.tldr: 研究在E3SMv2中利用科学机器学习仿真器模拟气溶胶微物理过程的设计与训练策略。
ai.motivation: 提升全球大气模型中气溶胶过程的数值表示精度。
ai.method: 采用前馈神经网络，系统考察架构复杂度、变量归一化和训练收敛行为。
ai.result: 优化收敛、缩放策略和网络复杂度显著影响仿真精度；适度网络规模可准确复现微物理引起的气溶胶浓度变化。
ai.help_to_user: 为气溶胶及其他多尺度大气物理过程的仿真器开发提供实用指导。

idea_spark.idea: 探索更先进的神经网络架构（如残差网络或注意力机制）以处理多尺度变异性。
idea_spark.risk: 复杂架构可能增加训练难度和过拟合风险。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴物理信息神经网络（PINN）将物理约束融入训练过程。

en.tldr: Investigates emulator design and training strategies for simulating aerosol microphysics in E3SMv2 using scientific machine learning.
en.motivation: To improve numerical representation of aerosol processes in global atmospheric models.
en.method: Uses feedforward neural networks, systematically examining architecture complexity, variable normalization, and training convergence.
en.result: Optimization convergence, scaling strategy, and network complexity strongly affect emulation accuracy; moderate network size can reproduce key aerosol concentration changes.
en.help_to_user: Provides practical guidance for developing emulators for aerosol and other multi-scale atmospheric physics.

idea_spark.idea: Explore advanced architectures like residual networks or attention mechanisms to handle multi-scale variability.
idea_spark.risk: Complex architectures may increase training difficulty and overfitting risk.
idea_spark.inspiration: Incorporate physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) to embed physical constraints during training.

papers.title: Data-Driven Surrogate Models for Agromaritime Applications: Finite Element-Neural Network Integration
papers.summary: Predicting nutrient transport and salinity distribution is crucial for mitigating climate-related threats to agromaritime systems. Traditional PDE-based models can capture the physics of nutrient dispersion, salinity and water quality. However, they face challenges in scalability and adaptability to real-time problems. In this article, we develop a hybrid approach that combines finite element discretisations with neural network integration to enable efficient and adaptive data-informed predictions. We use a finite element solver for the steady-state diffusion-reaction equation to generate a dataset across varying diffusivity, reaction and inflow conditions. We then build a proper orthogonal decomposition (POD), which reduces dimensionality, and a neural network (NN) that maps parameters to reduced coefficients. A numerical study presented on a simplified model demonstrates the proof-of-concept for predicting nutrient transport and salinity distribution. Numerical experiments show that the NN surrogate achieve a speed-up of approximately 956x compared to a regular FEM solver while maintaining an accuracy of mean relative L2-errors of 15% across the test set, with occasional higher deviations, which is sufficient for rapid scenario screening and parametric studies. These results highlight the method's potential as a fast and accurate surrogate for nutrient and salinity prediction, offering a balance between FEM reliability and NN adaptability for sustainable agromaritime management.

ai.tldr: 提出一种有限元与神经网络混合的代理模型，用于农业海洋系统中养分输运和盐度分布的快速预测。
ai.motivation: 传统基于偏微分方程的模型在可扩展性和实时适应性方面存在挑战，难以应对气候变化对农业海洋系统的威胁。
ai.method: 使用有限元求解器生成稳态扩散-反应方程的数值数据集，通过本征正交分解降维，再训练神经网络将参数映射到降维系数。
ai.result: 代理模型相比常规有限元求解器加速约956倍，测试集平均相对L2误差为15%，适用于快速场景筛选和参数研究。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户快速评估不同参数下的养分和盐度分布，支持农业海洋系统的可持续管理决策。

idea_spark.idea: 将本征正交分解与神经网络结合，构建参数化降阶代理模型，实现高维物理问题的实时预测。
idea_spark.risk: 代理模型在参数空间边缘或极端条件下可能精度下降，需要验证其外推能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用有限元生成高质量训练数据，结合降维与神经网络，为数据驱动的物理仿真提供高效替代方案。

en.tldr: A hybrid finite element-neural network surrogate model is proposed for fast prediction of nutrient transport and salinity distribution in agromaritime systems.
en.motivation: Traditional PDE-based models face scalability and real-time adaptability challenges in addressing climate-related threats to agromaritime systems.
en.method: A finite element solver generates a dataset for the steady-state diffusion-reaction equation; proper orthogonal decomposition reduces dimensionality, and a neural network maps parameters to reduced coefficients.
en.result: The surrogate achieves a speed-up of ~956x over a regular FEM solver with a mean relative L2 error of 15%, suitable for rapid scenario screening and parametric studies.
en.help_to_user: Enables users to quickly evaluate nutrient and salinity distributions under varying conditions, supporting sustainable agromaritime management decisions.

idea_spark.idea: Combine proper orthogonal decomposition with neural networks to build a parametric reduced-order surrogate for real-time prediction of high-dimensional physical problems.
idea_spark.risk: Accuracy may degrade at the edges of the parameter space or under extreme conditions; extrapolation capability needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage finite element simulations to generate high-quality training data, then use dimensionality reduction and neural networks to create an efficient data-driven surrogate for physics-based simulations.

papers.title: CLT-Optimal Parameter Error Bounds for Linear System Identification
papers.summary: There has been remarkable progress over the past decade in establishing finite-sample, non-asymptotic bounds on recovering unknown system parameters from observed system behavior. Surprisingly, however, we show that the current state-of-the-art bounds do not accurately capture the statistical complexity of system identification, even in the most fundamental setting of estimating a discrete-time linear dynamical system (LDS) via ordinary least-squares regression (OLS). Specifically, we utilize asymptotic normality to identify classes of problem instances for which current bounds overstate the squared parameter error, in both spectral and Frobenius norm, by a factor of the state-dimension of the system. Informed by this discrepancy, we then sharpen the OLS parameter error bounds via a novel second-order decomposition of the parameter error, where crucially the lower-order term is a matrix-valued martingale that we show correctly captures the CLT scaling. From our analysis we obtain finite-sample bounds for both (i) stable systems and (ii) the many-trajectories setting that match the instance-specific optimal rates up to constant factors in Frobenius norm, and polylogarithmic state-dimension factors in spectral norm.

ai.tldr: 本文发现现有线性系统辨识的有限样本误差界高估了参数误差，并基于中心极限定理提出了更紧的界。
ai.motivation: 现有有限样本界未能准确反映系统辨识的统计复杂度，在状态维度上高估了参数误差。
ai.method: 利用渐近正态性识别问题实例，并通过二阶分解（矩阵值鞅）修正参数误差界。
ai.result: 对稳定系统和多轨迹场景，得到了与实例最优率匹配的有限样本界（Frobenius范数常数因子，谱范数多项式对数因子）。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解线性系统辨识中参数误差的真实统计复杂度，并提供更精确的误差界。

idea_spark.idea: 利用CLT缩放修正高维参数估计的误差界。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖渐近正态性假设，对非渐近或小样本场景可能不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从渐近理论出发改进有限样本界，启发其他统计学习问题的类似分析。

en.tldr: This paper reveals that existing finite-sample bounds for linear system identification overestimate parameter error, and derives tighter bounds based on the central limit theorem.
en.motivation: Current finite-sample bounds fail to capture the true statistical complexity of system identification, overestimating parameter error by a factor of state dimension.
en.method: Leverages asymptotic normality to identify problematic instances and refines bounds via a second-order decomposition involving a matrix-valued martingale that captures CLT scaling.
en.result: For stable systems and many-trajectories settings, obtains finite-sample bounds matching instance-specific optimal rates up to constant factors in Frobenius norm and polylogarithmic factors in spectral norm.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the true statistical complexity of parameter error in linear system identification and provides more accurate error bounds.

idea_spark.idea: Use CLT scaling to correct error bounds in high-dimensional parameter estimation.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on asymptotic normality assumptions, which may not hold in non-asymptotic or small-sample settings.
idea_spark.inspiration: Improving finite-sample bounds from asymptotic theory inspires similar analyses in other statistical learning problems.

papers.title: Droplet-LNO: Physics-Informed Laplace Neural Operators for Accurate Prediction of Droplet Spreading Dynamics on Complex Surfaces
papers.summary: Spreading of liquid droplets on solid substrates constitutes a classic multiphysics problem with widespread applications ranging from inkjet printing, spray cooling, to biomedical microfluidic systems. Yet, accurate computational fluid dynamic (CFD) simulations are prohibitively expensive, taking more than 18 to 24 hours for each transient computation. In this paper, Physics-Informed Laplace Operator Neural Network (PI-LNO) is introduced, representing a novel architecture where the Laplace integral transform function serves as a learned physics-informed functional basis. Extensive comparative benchmark studies were performed against five other state-of-the-art approaches: UNet, UNet with attention modules (UNet-AM), DeepONet, Physics-Informed UNet (PI-UNet), and Laplace Neural Operator (LNO). Through complex Laplace transforms, PI-LNO natively models the exponential transient dynamics of the spreading process. A TensorFlow-based PI-LNO is trained on multi-surface CFD data spanning contact angles $θ_s ε[20,160]$, employing a physics-regularized composite loss combining data fidelity (MSE, MAE, RMSE) with Navier-Stokes, Cahn-Hilliard, and causality constraints.

ai.tldr: 提出物理信息拉普拉斯神经算子(PI-LNO)，用于快速准确预测复杂表面上液滴铺展动力学。
ai.motivation: 传统CFD模拟液滴铺展耗时18-24小时，亟需高效替代模型。
ai.method: 将拉普拉斯积分变换作为学习到的物理信息函数基，构建PI-LNO架构，结合Navier-Stokes、Cahn-Hilliard和因果约束的复合损失函数。
ai.result: 在接触角20°-160°的多表面CFD数据上训练，与UNet、DeepONet等五种方法对比，PI-LNO表现更优。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种快速、准确的液滴铺展预测工具，可应用于喷墨打印、喷雾冷却和生物医学微流控。

idea_spark.risk: 训练数据依赖CFD模拟，可能无法覆盖极端或未见过的表面条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用积分变换捕捉瞬态动力学，启发其他时间依赖物理问题的神经算子设计。

en.tldr: Proposes Physics-Informed Laplace Neural Operator (PI-LNO) for fast and accurate prediction of droplet spreading dynamics on complex surfaces.
en.motivation: Traditional CFD simulations of droplet spreading take 18-24 hours, necessitating efficient surrogate models.
en.method: Uses Laplace integral transform as a learned physics-informed functional basis in PI-LNO, with a composite loss combining Navier-Stokes, Cahn-Hilliard, and causality constraints.
en.result: Trained on multi-surface CFD data with contact angles 20°-160°, outperforming five baselines including UNet, DeepONet, and LNO.
en.help_to_user: Provides a fast and accurate tool for predicting droplet spreading, applicable to inkjet printing, spray cooling, and biomedical microfluidics.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Laplace neural operator with multiphysics constraints for efficient surrogate modeling.
idea_spark.risk: Training data relies on CFD simulations, may not cover extreme or unseen surface conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using integral transforms to capture transient dynamics inspires neural operator design for other time-dependent physical problems.

papers.title: CHRep: Cross-modal Histology Representation and Post-hoc Calibration for Spatial Gene Expression Prediction
papers.summary: Spatial transcriptomics (ST) enables spatially resolved gene profiling but remains expensive and low-throughput, limiting large-cohort studies and routine clinical use. Predicting spatial gene expression from routine hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) slides is a promising alternative, yet under realistic leave-one-slide-out evaluation, existing models often suffer from slide-level appearance shifts and regression-driven over-smoothing that suppress biologically meaningful variation. CHRep is a two-phase framework for robust histology-to-expression prediction. In the training phase, CHRep learns a structure-aware representation by jointly optimizing correlation-aware regression, symmetric image-expression alignment, and coordinate-induced spatial topology regularization. In the inference phase, cross-slide robustness is improved without backbone fine-tuning through a lightweight calibration module trained on the training slides, which combines a non-parametric estimate from a training gallery with a magnitude-regularized correction module. Unlike prior embedding-alignment or retrieval-based transfer methods that rely on a single prediction route, CHRep couples topology-preserving representation learning with post-hoc calibration, enabling stable neighborhood retrieval and controlled bias correction under slide-level shifts. Across the three cohorts, CHRep consistently improves gene-wise correlation under leave-one-slide-out evaluation, with the largest gains observed on Alex+10x. Relative to HAGE, the Pearson correlation coefficient on all considered genes [PCC(ACG)] increases by 4.0% on cSCC and 9.8% on HER2+. Relative to mclSTExp, PCC(ACG) further improves by 39.5% on Alex+10x, together with 9.7% and 9.0% reductions in mean squared error (MSE) and mean absolute error (MAE), respectively.

ai.tldr: 提出CHRep框架，通过结构感知表示学习和事后校准，从H&E切片预测空间基因表达，在留一切片评估中显著提升性能。
ai.motivation: 空间转录组学昂贵且通量低，现有从H&E切片预测基因表达的方法在留一切片评估中因切片外观差异和回归过平滑而表现不佳。
ai.method: 两阶段框架：训练阶段联合优化相关感知回归、对称图像-表达对齐和坐标诱导空间拓扑正则化；推理阶段通过轻量校准模块（非参数估计+幅度正则化校正）提升跨切片鲁棒性。
ai.result: 在三个队列上，留一切片评估下基因相关性一致提升，Alex+10x上PCC(ACG)相对mclSTExp提升39.5%，MSE和MAE分别降低9.7%和9.0%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种鲁棒的从常规H&E切片预测空间基因表达的方法，适用于大规模研究和临床场景。

idea_spark.idea: 结合拓扑保持表示学习和事后校准，可推广至任何存在分布偏移的回归预测问题。
idea_spark.risk: 校准模块依赖训练切片构建图库，可能在新切片与训练集差异极大时失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用空间坐标正则化保持组织结构信息，以及事后校准避免微调整个骨干网络，为高效域适应提供新思路。

en.tldr: CHRep is a two-phase framework for robust histology-to-gene-expression prediction, using structure-aware representation learning and post-hoc calibration to handle slide-level shifts.
en.motivation: Spatial transcriptomics is expensive and low-throughput; existing H&E-based prediction methods suffer from slide-level appearance shifts and regression over-smoothing under leave-one-slide-out evaluation.
en.method: Training phase jointly optimizes correlation-aware regression, symmetric image-expression alignment, and coordinate-induced spatial topology regularization; inference phase uses a lightweight calibration module (non-parametric estimate + magnitude-regularized correction) without backbone fine-tuning.
en.result: Consistent improvement in gene-wise correlation across three cohorts; on Alex+10x, PCC(ACG) improves by 39.5% over mclSTExp, with 9.7% and 9.0% reductions in MSE and MAE.
en.help_to_user: Provides a robust method for predicting spatial gene expression from routine H&E slides, suitable for large-cohort studies and clinical use.

idea_spark.idea: Combining topology-preserving representation learning with post-hoc calibration can be generalized to any regression prediction problem with distribution shifts.
idea_spark.risk: The calibration module relies on a gallery built from training slides and may fail when new slides differ significantly from the training set.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using spatial coordinate regularization to preserve tissue structure and post-hoc calibration to avoid fine-tuning the entire backbone offers a new approach for efficient domain adaptation.

papers.title: A Deep U-Net Framework for Flood Hazard Mapping Using Hydraulic Simulations of the Wupper Catchment
papers.summary: The increasing frequency and severity of global flood events highlights the need for the development of rapid and reliable flood prediction tools. This process traditionally relies on computationally expensive hydraulic simulations. This research presents a prediction tool by developing a deep-learning based surrogate model to accurately and efficiently predict the maximum water level across a grid. This was achieved by conducting a series of experiments to optimize a U-Net architecture, patch generation, and data handling for approximating a hydraulic model. This research demonstrates that a deep learning surrogate model can serve as a computationally efficient alternative to traditional hydraulic simulations. The framework was tested using hydraulic simulations of the Wupper catchment in the North-Rhein Westphalia region (Germany), obtaining comparable results.

ai.tldr: 提出基于U-Net的深度学习代理模型，替代传统水力模拟，快速准确预测洪水最大水位。
ai.motivation: 传统水力模拟计算成本高，难以满足快速洪水预测需求。
ai.method: 优化U-Net架构、分块生成与数据处理，训练代理模型逼近水力模拟结果。
ai.result: 在Wupper流域测试，模型结果与传统水力模拟相当，计算效率显著提升。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效洪水预测工具，可用于快速风险评估与应急响应。

idea_spark.idea: 结合多源数据（如遥感、降雨预报）扩展模型输入，提升泛化能力。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖高质量水力模拟数据，数据不足时可能精度下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将深度学习代理模型应用于其他灾害模拟（如滑坡、海啸）的加速预测。

zh.method: 优化U-Net架构、分块生成与数据处理，训练代理模型逼近水力模拟结果。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将深度学习代理模型应用于其他灾害模拟（如滑坡、海啸）的加速预测。

en.tldr: A deep U-Net surrogate model is proposed to replace computationally expensive hydraulic simulations for fast and accurate flood hazard mapping.
en.motivation: Traditional hydraulic simulations are computationally expensive, hindering rapid flood prediction.
en.method: Optimized U-Net architecture, patch generation, and data handling to train a surrogate model approximating hydraulic simulations.
en.result: Tested on the Wupper catchment, the model achieves comparable accuracy to hydraulic simulations with significantly reduced computation time.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient flood prediction tool for rapid risk assessment and emergency response.

idea_spark.idea: Integrate multi-source data (e.g., remote sensing, rainfall forecasts) to expand model inputs and improve generalization.
idea_spark.risk: Model accuracy depends on high-quality hydraulic simulation data; insufficient data may degrade performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Apply deep learning surrogate models to accelerate other hazard simulations such as landslides or tsunamis.

papers.title: Generative Discovery of Magnetic Insulators under Competing Physical Constraints
papers.summary: Discovering materials that must simultaneously satisfy multiple competing constraints remains a central challenge in computational materials design, particularly in data-scarce regimes where conventional data-driven approaches are least effective. Magnetic insulators represent a stringent example: the electronic conditions that favor magnetic order often also promote metallicity, while insulating behavior suppresses the interactions that stabilize magnetism. As a result, experimentally viable magnetic insulators are rare and difficult to identify through conventional screening. Here, we introduce MagMatLLM, a constraint-guided generative discovery framework that integrates language-model-based crystal generation with evolutionary selection, surrogate screening, and first-principles validation to target simultaneous stability, magnetism, and insulating behavior. Unlike stability-first approaches, the framework enforces functional constraints during generation and selection, steering the search toward sparsely populated regions of materials space defined by competing physical requirements. Using this workflow, we identify twelve previously unreported candidate magnetic insulators, including Tm$_4$Co$_2$Cr$_2$O$_{12}$ and Cr$_4$Nb$_2$O$_{12}$. Of these, ten are dynamically stable by phonon analysis and exhibit finite band gaps and nonzero magnetic moments in spin-polarized density functional theory calculations. Beyond the specific compounds identified here, this work establishes a general constraint-guided paradigm for multi-objective materials discovery in sparse chemical spaces and provides a transferable strategy for the design of quantum materials under competing physical constraints.

ai.tldr: 提出MagMatLLM框架，在竞争性物理约束下生成并筛选出12种新型磁性绝缘体候选材料。
ai.motivation: 磁性绝缘体需同时满足磁性、绝缘性和稳定性，但传统方法难以处理此类多约束、数据稀疏的问题。
ai.method: 结合语言模型晶体生成、进化选择、代理筛选和第一性原理验证，在生成和选择阶段强制施加功能约束。
ai.result: 识别出12种未报道的候选磁性绝缘体，其中10种经声子分析动态稳定，且具有有限带隙和非零磁矩。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种在竞争性约束下发现多目标材料的通用范式，可迁移至其他量子材料设计。

idea_spark.idea: 将语言模型与进化算法结合，在稀疏化学空间中定向搜索，可进一步用于发现新型铁电或多铁材料。
idea_spark.risk: 生成候选材料的实验合成可行性尚未验证，且框架对约束条件的定义敏感，可能遗漏重要物理因素。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受生物进化中多目标优化的启发，将功能约束直接嵌入生成过程，而非事后筛选。

en.tldr: Proposes MagMatLLM, a constraint-guided generative framework that discovers 12 novel magnetic insulator candidates under competing physical constraints.
en.motivation: Magnetic insulators must simultaneously satisfy magnetic, insulating, and stability requirements, which is challenging for conventional methods in data-scarce regimes.
en.method: Integrates language-model-based crystal generation with evolutionary selection, surrogate screening, and first-principles validation, enforcing functional constraints during generation and selection.
en.result: Identifies 12 previously unreported candidate magnetic insulators; 10 are dynamically stable with finite band gaps and nonzero magnetic moments.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general constraint-guided paradigm for multi-objective materials discovery in sparse chemical spaces, transferable to other quantum materials.

idea_spark.idea: Combining language models with evolutionary algorithms for directed search in sparse chemical spaces could be applied to discover novel ferroelectrics or multiferroics.
idea_spark.risk: Experimental synthesizability of generated candidates is unverified; the framework's sensitivity to constraint definitions may overlook important physical factors.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by multi-objective optimization in biological evolution, functional constraints are embedded directly into the generation process rather than applied as post-hoc filters.

papers.title: Estimation of Unknown Parameters in Presence of Perturbations and Noises with Application to GPEBO Design
papers.summary: A problem of online estimation of unknown parameters is considered for a linear regression equation, which is affected by an additive perturbation that can be caused by measurement noise (that corrupts regressor and regressand), as well as external perturbations. Known approaches to solve this problem typically have one of the following disadvantages: 1) they ensure convergence of a parametric error to a compact set with non-adjustable bound, 2) independence of all system regressor elements from the perturbation/noise is required to annihilate them, 3) an instrumental variable is needed to be selected. On the basis of the novel perturbation annihilation procedure, in the present paper, we propose three new estimation laws, which are free from the above-mentioned drawbacks and ensure exponential convergence of the parametric error to an arbitrarily small neighborhood of zero, particularly, in case more than a half (not all) of the regressor elements are independent from additive perturbation. One of the proposed estimation laws is used for the design of Generalized Parameter Estimation-Based Observer (GPEBO) for nonlinear affine systems to enhance GPEBO performance in case when the measured system output is corrupted by noise. The theoretical results are supported by examples and mathematical modelling.

ai.tldr: 提出三种新的在线参数估计律，通过扰动消除方法实现参数误差指数收敛到任意小邻域，并应用于GPEBO设计以提升噪声下的性能。
ai.motivation: 现有方法存在收敛集不可调、要求所有回归元独立于扰动、或需要辅助变量等缺陷。
ai.method: 基于新型扰动消除过程，设计三种估计律，仅需超过一半（而非全部）回归元独立于加性扰动。
ai.result: 参数误差指数收敛到任意小邻域，GPEBO在输出噪声下性能提升。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种在扰动和噪声下在线估计未知参数的鲁棒方法，适用于控制与观测器设计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用部分回归元独立于扰动的条件，设计无需全部独立即可消除影响的估计律。
idea_spark.risk: 实际中判断哪些回归元独立于扰动可能困难，且条件不满足时性能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从部分独立性出发设计鲁棒估计，启发在资源受限场景下利用部分可靠信息。

zh.tldr: 提出三种新的在线参数估计律，通过扰动消除方法实现参数误差指数收敛到任意小邻域，并应用于GPEBO设计以提升噪声下的性能。

zh.help_to_user: 提供一种在扰动和噪声下在线估计未知参数的鲁棒方法，适用于控制与观测器设计。

idea_spark.risk: 实际中判断哪些回归元独立于扰动可能困难，且条件不满足时性能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从部分独立性出发设计鲁棒估计，启发在资源受限场景下利用部分可靠信息。

en.tldr: Three new online parameter estimation laws are proposed using a novel perturbation annihilation procedure, achieving exponential convergence of the parametric error to an arbitrarily small neighborhood, and applied to GPEBO design for nonlinear affine systems under noisy output.
en.motivation: Existing methods suffer from non-adjustable convergence bounds, requirement that all regressor elements be independent of perturbation, or need for an instrumental variable.
en.method: Based on a novel perturbation annihilation procedure, three estimation laws are designed requiring only more than half (not all) regressor elements to be independent of additive perturbation.
en.result: Parametric error converges exponentially to an arbitrarily small neighborhood; GPEBO performance is enhanced under output noise.
en.help_to_user: Provides a robust online parameter estimation method under perturbations and noise, useful for control and observer design.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit partial independence of regressor elements from perturbation to design estimation laws that do not require full independence.
idea_spark.risk: Identifying which regressor elements are independent may be challenging in practice; performance degrades if condition is not met.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging partial reliable information for robust estimation inspires resource-efficient solutions in constrained scenarios.

papers.title: Axisymmetric Navier--Stokes with Swirl:\ Final Master Manuscript for the Unconditional Global Existence Program
papers.summary: This manuscript assembles the full axisymmetric-with-swirl large-data program in a single self-contained master file. The paper fixes the lifted five-dimensional formulation, the extraction score, the coherent-versus-noncoherent branch structure, the geometric elimination of fragmented, vertically thinned, displaced-only, and off-axis thin-ring channels, and the local packet-window architecture for the residual axis-centered regime. The final analytic task is reduced to a localized proximal diffuse estimate on a finite packet window. We record the complete theorem stack and the exact local operator identities needed for that final verification, in a form suitable for direct journal submission and final checking.

ai.tldr: 本文整合了轴对称带旋流的Navier-Stokes方程大初值无条件整体存在性计划的完整证明，以自包含主文件形式呈现。
ai.motivation: 为轴对称带旋流Navier-Stokes方程的大初值无条件整体存在性提供完整、自洽的证明框架。
ai.method: 采用提升的五维表述、提取分数、相干与非相干分支结构、几何消除碎片化薄环通道，以及局部包络窗口架构，最终将分析任务归结为有限包络窗口上的局部近端扩散估计。
ai.result: 记录了完整的定理栈和精确的局部算子恒等式，可直接用于期刊投稿和最终验证。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解轴对称带旋流Navier-Stokes方程大初值整体存在性的完整证明结构和关键技术。

idea_spark.idea: 利用相干与非相干分支结构分解流场，结合几何消除和局部化估计，将全局问题简化为有限窗口上的局部估计。
idea_spark.risk: 局部近端扩散估计的验证可能依赖高度特化的算子恒等式，推广时需重新建立类似恒等式。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从几何消除和局部化策略中，可启发设计针对其他非线性演化方程奇性结构的分解与估计方法。

en.tldr: This manuscript assembles the full proof of unconditional global existence for the axisymmetric Navier-Stokes equations with swirl, presented as a self-contained master file.
en.motivation: To provide a complete and self-consistent proof framework for the unconditional global existence of the axisymmetric Navier-Stokes equations with swirl for large data.
en.method: Uses a lifted five-dimensional formulation, extraction score, coherent-versus-noncoherent branch structure, geometric elimination of fragmented thin-ring channels, and a local packet-window architecture, reducing the final analysis to a localized proximal diffuse estimate on a finite packet window.
en.result: Records the complete theorem stack and exact local operator identities needed for final verification, suitable for direct journal submission.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the complete proof structure and key techniques for the global existence of axisymmetric Navier-Stokes equations with swirl.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose the flow using coherent and noncoherent branches, combined with geometric elimination and localization, to reduce the global problem to a local estimate on a finite window.
idea_spark.risk: Verification of the localized proximal diffuse estimate may rely on highly specialized operator identities, requiring re-establishment for generalizations.
idea_spark.inspiration: The geometric elimination and localization approach inspires the design of decomposition and estimation methods for singular structures in other nonlinear evolution equations.

papers.title: Accelerating point defect simulations using data-driven and machine learning approaches
papers.summary: Point defects in solid-state materials are now routinely simulated using large supercell structures, requiring efficient quantum mechanical solutions. Data-driven and machine learning (ML) models trained on computational data can enable rapid defect property predictions and high-throughput screening. In this article, we provide an overview of prominent efforts to accelerate defect simulations using these approaches. We begin by discussing the motivations for data-driven techniques in defect modeling, and describe efforts over the past decade to use descriptor-based models for rapid screening of defect properties -- most notably in oxides. In particular, we discuss case studies where surrogate models and interatomic potentials were trained on density functional theory (DFT) data, leading to predictions with quantum-mechanical accuracies at a fraction of the cost. In addition to geometry relaxation and formation energy predictions, these interatomic potentials are capable of predicting phonon modes and vibrational free energies to yield defect energetics at finite temperatures -- representing a key frontier for computational defect research. We finish with a discussion on how to connect these approaches and their outputs with experimental data, and provide an outlook on this burgeoning sub-field.

ai.tldr: 综述了利用数据驱动和机器学习方法加速固态材料中点缺陷模拟的研究进展，重点介绍了基于描述符的模型和势函数在缺陷性质预测中的应用。
ai.motivation: 点缺陷模拟需要大量超胞结构的第一性原理计算，效率低下，亟需低成本高精度的替代方法。
ai.method: 训练基于密度泛函理论数据的替代模型和原子间势函数，用于几何弛豫、形成能、声子模式及振动自由能的预测。
ai.result: 这些模型能以极低计算成本达到量子力学精度，并实现有限温度下的缺陷热力学预测。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户快速筛选缺陷性质，理解数据驱动方法在缺陷研究中的现状与前景。

idea_spark.idea: 结合主动学习策略，自动选择最有效的训练数据，进一步提升模型泛化能力。
idea_spark.risk: 模型可能对训练数据外的缺陷构型预测不准，需谨慎验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将实验数据（如光谱、电镜）与预测结果对比，可构建闭环验证流程。

en.tldr: A review of data-driven and machine learning approaches to accelerate point defect simulations in solid-state materials, focusing on descriptor-based models and interatomic potentials trained on DFT data.
en.motivation: First-principles simulations of point defects in large supercells are computationally expensive, motivating the development of low-cost, accurate surrogate models.
en.method: Surrogate models and interatomic potentials are trained on DFT data to predict geometry relaxation, formation energies, phonon modes, and vibrational free energies.
en.result: These models achieve quantum-mechanical accuracy at a fraction of the cost, enabling finite-temperature defect energetics predictions.
en.help_to_user: Provides an overview of current data-driven defect modeling techniques and their potential for high-throughput screening.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate active learning to automatically select the most informative training data for improved model generalization.
idea_spark.risk: Predictions may be unreliable for defect configurations not represented in the training set.
idea_spark.inspiration: Integrating experimental data (e.g., spectroscopy, microscopy) with predictions can create a closed-loop validation framework.

papers.title: Discontinuous transition in 2D Potts: II. Order-Order Interface convergence
papers.summary: The $q$-state Potts model is an archetypical model for various types of phase transitions. We consider it on the square grid and focus on the regime where it undergoes a discontinuous transition, that is $q>4$. At the transition point $T_c(q)$, there are exactly $q+1$ extremal Gibbs measures (pure phases): $q$ ordered (monochromatic) and one disordered (free). This work establishes for the first time the wetting phenomenon in a precise geometric form and in the entire regime of discontinuity $q>4$: at $T_c(q)$, between two ordered phases a disordered layer emerges and, in the diffusive scaling, its boundaries converge to a pair of Brownian motions conditioned not to intersect. This is starkly different from the subcritical ($T<T_c(q)$) behaviour. At $T_c(q)$, previous results (Bricmont--Lebowitz '87, Messager--Miracle-Sole--Ruiz--Shlosman '91) were limited to the construction and properties of the surface tension for large enough $q$.   In a companion work, arXiv:2502.04129, we provide a detailed study of the Potts model under order-disorder Dobrushin conditions. That work also develops a ``renewal picture'' à la Ornstein-Zernike for a suitable percolation model, which plays a central part in our study of the Potts interfaces. The latter is the random-cluster representation of an Ashkin--Teller model (ATRC), and is related to the Potts model via a chain of couplings going through the six-vertex model.   In the current work, we extend the analysis to a pair of interacting order-disorder interfaces forming the separation between the two ordered phases, and couple them to a pair of well-behaved random walks conditioned not to intersect. The construction of the coupling is based on rigorously deriving entropic repulsion between the two interfaces. We also prove convergence of interfaces in the FK-percolation model at $p_c(q)$ when $q>4$.

ai.tldr: 建立了二维Potts模型在q>4时有序相之间无序层出现的严格几何描述，并证明其边界在扩散尺度下收敛到一对条件不相交的布朗运动。
ai.motivation: 理解Potts模型在相变点处有序相之间界面的微观行为，特别是润湿现象的精确几何形式。
ai.method: 通过随机团簇表示与Ashkin-Teller模型的耦合，将有序-无序界面与条件不相交随机游走耦合，并严格推导界面间的熵排斥。
ai.result: 在q>4的整个不连续转变区间，证明了润湿现象：有序相之间出现无序层，其边界收敛到一对条件不相交的布朗运动。
ai.help_to_user: 为统计物理中界面涨落和润湿现象提供了严格的数学框架，可用于分析其他类似模型的界面行为。

idea_spark.idea: 利用熵排斥机制构造界面耦合，可能启发设计新的数值模拟算法来研究界面涨落。
idea_spark.risk: 严格推导依赖于Potts模型的特殊结构，直接推广到其他模型可能需要新的技术。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将类似方法应用于三维模型或连续相变中的界面问题。

en.tldr: Establishes the wetting phenomenon in the 2D Potts model for q>4: a disordered layer emerges between ordered phases, and its boundaries converge to a pair of Brownian motions conditioned not to intersect.
en.motivation: To understand the microscopic behavior of interfaces between ordered phases at the transition point, especially the precise geometric form of wetting.
en.method: Couples order-disorder interfaces to a pair of conditioned non-intersecting random walks via the random-cluster representation and Ashkin-Teller model, rigorously deriving entropic repulsion.
en.result: For the entire discontinuous regime q>4, proves wetting: a disordered layer appears between ordered phases, with boundaries converging to a pair of conditioned Brownian motions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for interface fluctuations and wetting in statistical physics, applicable to similar models.

idea_spark.idea: Using entropic repulsion to construct interface couplings may inspire new numerical algorithms for studying interface fluctuations.
idea_spark.risk: The rigorous derivation relies on specific properties of the Potts model; generalization may require new techniques.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar methods to three-dimensional models or interfaces in continuous phase transitions.

papers.title: Convergence Rate Analysis of SOAP with Arbitrary Orthogonal Projection Matrices
papers.summary: In this short note, we establish, for the first time, the convergence rate of SOAP, an efficient and popular matrix-based optimizer for training deep neural networks. Our analysis extends to a more general variant of SOAP that admits arbitrary orthogonal projection matrices and requires only that these matrices be conditionally independent of the current stochastic gradient at each iteration. For example, they may be constructed from information available up to the preceding step.

ai.tldr: 首次建立了SOAP优化器在任意正交投影矩阵下的收敛速率。
ai.motivation: SOAP是一种高效的矩阵优化器，但缺乏严格的收敛性理论保证。
ai.method: 将SOAP推广到允许任意正交投影矩阵，并假设这些矩阵与当前随机梯度条件独立。
ai.result: 证明了该广义SOAP的收敛速率。
ai.help_to_user: 为使用SOAP训练深度网络提供了理论收敛保证，指导实际应用。

idea_spark.idea: 探索投影矩阵与梯度的依赖关系，可能进一步放松条件。
idea_spark.risk: 条件独立假设在实际中可能难以严格满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将优化器分析从固定投影扩展到任意投影，启发更灵活的优化设计。

en.tldr: For the first time, establishes the convergence rate of SOAP with arbitrary orthogonal projection matrices.
en.motivation: SOAP is an efficient matrix-based optimizer for deep networks, but lacks rigorous convergence guarantees.
en.method: Generalizes SOAP to admit arbitrary orthogonal projection matrices, assuming conditional independence from the current stochastic gradient.
en.result: Proves the convergence rate of this generalized SOAP.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical convergence guarantees for using SOAP in deep network training, guiding practical usage.

idea_spark.idea: Explore the dependency between projection matrices and gradients to potentially relax the condition.
idea_spark.risk: The conditional independence assumption may be hard to satisfy in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extending optimizer analysis from fixed to arbitrary projections inspires more flexible optimization designs.

papers.title: Quasi-resonant normal form and quadratic lifespan for 3D gravity-capillary water waves
papers.summary: We study the long-time dynamics of small-amplitude solutions to the three-dimensional gravity-capillary water waves equations for an inviscid and irrotational fluid with periodic boundary conditions. We prove that, for almost all values of the surface tension parameter, solutions with initial size $\varepsilon$ exist and remain small over time intervals of order $\varepsilon^{-2}$. A major difficulty arises from the loss of derivatives caused by the quasilinear nature of the equations combined with severe quadratic and cubic small-divisor interactions in high space dimensions. Classical normal form methods applied to 3D water waves system typically fail to prevent derivative loss due to the accumulation of near-resonances. To overcome this obstruction, we develop a new analytical strategy that combines a sharp frequency partition with a quasi-resonant normal form transformation acting only on selected interaction scales. Our microlocal analysis reveals that the potentially dangerous interactions terms exhibit a block-diagonal structure, which stems from both the geometric properties of the quasi-resonant frequency sets and the Hamiltonian structure of the water waves system. As a consequence, these operators preserve Sobolev norms and do not produce energy growth. This structural insight, together with the quasi-resonant normal-form transformation, allows us to prevent derivative-loss mechanisms while avoiding the accumulation of harmful small denominators.

ai.tldr: 研究三维重力-毛细水波小振幅解的长时间动力学，证明对几乎所有的表面张力参数，解在ε^{-2}时间尺度上保持小且存在。
ai.motivation: 经典正规形方法在三维水波系统中因近共振累积而无法阻止导数损失，需要新策略。
ai.method: 结合尖锐频率划分与准共振正规形变换，仅作用于选定的相互作用尺度，利用准共振频率集的几何性质和哈密顿结构揭示块对角结构。
ai.result: 证明了二次寿命ε^{-2}，且算子保持Sobolev范数，不产生能量增长。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了处理高维拟线性PDE中导数损失和小分母问题的分析框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用频率集的几何结构设计选择性正规形变换，避免全局小分母累积。
idea_spark.risk: 对表面张力参数的“几乎所有”条件可能限制实际应用，且高维分析复杂度高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从哈密顿结构和共振几何出发，将有害相互作用限制在块对角子空间，为长期稳定性提供新视角。

en.tldr: Studies long-time dynamics of small-amplitude solutions to 3D gravity-capillary water waves, proving existence and smallness over ε^{-2} time for almost all surface tension parameters.
en.motivation: Classical normal form methods fail in 3D water waves due to accumulation of near-resonances causing derivative loss.
en.method: Develops a quasi-resonant normal form transformation with sharp frequency partition acting only on selected interaction scales, exploiting geometric properties of quasi-resonant sets and Hamiltonian structure to reveal block-diagonal operators.
en.result: Achieves quadratic lifespan ε^{-2} with operators preserving Sobolev norms and no energy growth.
en.help_to_user: Provides an analytical framework to overcome derivative loss and small-divisor issues in high-dimensional quasilinear PDEs.

idea_spark.idea: Use geometric structure of frequency sets to design selective normal form transformations, avoiding global accumulation of small divisors.
idea_spark.risk: The 'almost all' condition on surface tension may limit practical applicability, and high-dimensional analysis is complex.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging Hamiltonian structure and resonance geometry to confine harmful interactions to block-diagonal subspaces offers a new perspective for long-time stability.

papers.title: The Method of Ellipcenters for Strongly Convex Functions
papers.summary: The Method of Ellipcenters (ME), introduced in~\cite{ME2025} for strongly convex quadratic minimization, uses two gradient evaluations per iteration: one at the current iterate and one at a companion point on the same level set. We extend ME to the broader class of strongly convex functions with Lipschitz continuous gradient, and prove that ME matches the convergence rate of gradient descent with exact line search on this class. When the two gradient directions are linearly independent, a midpoint argument exploiting the level-set symmetry yields a further per-step improvement, which is global when the angle between the two gradients is uniformly bounded away from zero. ME also converges in at most two steps in dimension two. Numerical experiments on regularized logistic regression confirm the theoretical predictions.

ai.tldr: 将椭圆中心法从强凸二次极小化推广到强凸且梯度Lipschitz连续的函数类，证明其收敛率与精确线搜索梯度下降一致，并在二维中最多两步收敛。
ai.motivation: 椭圆中心法在强凸二次极小化中已有效，但尚未推广到更一般的强凸函数。
ai.method: 每次迭代使用两个梯度：当前迭代点和同一水平集上的伴随点；利用水平集对称性进行中点改进。
ai.result: 收敛率匹配精确线搜索梯度下降；当两个梯度方向线性无关且夹角一致有界时，每步改进全局有效；二维中最多两步收敛。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种新的强凸优化算法，其收敛性有理论保证，且在某些条件下优于标准梯度下降。

idea_spark.idea: 利用两个梯度方向的信息构造中点，可能加速收敛。
idea_spark.risk: 梯度线性无关条件在实际问题中可能不总是满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从几何对称性出发设计优化算法，启发新的加速策略。

zh.tldr: 将椭圆中心法从强凸二次极小化推广到强凸且梯度Lipschitz连续的函数类，证明其收敛率与精确线搜索梯度下降一致，并在二维中最多两步收敛。
zh.motivation: 椭圆中心法在强凸二次极小化中已有效，但尚未推广到更一般的强凸函数。
zh.method: 每次迭代使用两个梯度：当前迭代点和同一水平集上的伴随点；利用水平集对称性进行中点改进。
zh.result: 收敛率匹配精确线搜索梯度下降；当两个梯度方向线性无关且夹角一致有界时，每步改进全局有效；二维中最多两步收敛。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种新的强凸优化算法，其收敛性有理论保证，且在某些条件下优于标准梯度下降。

idea_spark.idea: 利用两个梯度方向的信息构造中点，可能加速收敛。
idea_spark.risk: 梯度线性无关条件在实际问题中可能不总是满足。

en.tldr: Extends the Method of Ellipcenters from strongly convex quadratic minimization to strongly convex functions with Lipschitz continuous gradient, proving convergence rate matching gradient descent with exact line search and at most two-step convergence in dimension two.
en.motivation: The Method of Ellipcenters was effective for strongly convex quadratic minimization but had not been generalized to broader strongly convex functions.
en.method: Uses two gradient evaluations per iteration: one at the current iterate and one at a companion point on the same level set; exploits level-set symmetry for a midpoint improvement.
en.result: Convergence rate matches gradient descent with exact line search; global per-step improvement when the angle between the two gradients is uniformly bounded away from zero; at most two-step convergence in dimension two.
en.help_to_user: Provides a novel optimization algorithm for strongly convex problems with theoretical convergence guarantees and potential advantages over standard gradient descent.

idea_spark.idea: Using two gradient directions to construct a midpoint may accelerate convergence.
idea_spark.risk: The linear independence condition on gradients may not hold in all practical problems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Designing optimization algorithms from geometric symmetry inspires new acceleration strategies.

keywords_raw: gradient descent with exact line search

papers.title: Optimum adaptation of a Steiner network
papers.summary: The Euclidean Steiner tree problem, normally posed in two dimensions, seeks to connect a set of prescribed terminal nodes by placing additional nodes, known as Steiner points, with edges connecting such nodes either to another Steiner point or a terminal node, and with the placements minimising the sum of all the edge lengths of the associated tree. We consider a problem in which we start with a known solution to a Steiner tree problem, and the terminal positions are then perturbed. A first-order approximation theorem is established for efficiently updating the Steiner point positions to recover a Steiner tree solution after the perturbations to terminal nodes. Numerical examples illustrate the effectiveness of our approach (including a stepwise application for large perturbations) as well as its limitations.

ai.tldr: 针对斯坦纳树问题，提出在终端节点扰动后高效更新斯坦纳点位置的一阶近似定理，并通过数值示例验证其有效性与局限性。
ai.motivation: 实际应用中终端节点位置常发生微小扰动，需要快速调整已有斯坦纳树解，避免完全重新计算。
ai.method: 建立一阶近似定理，利用当前解对扰动进行线性化更新，并支持逐步应用以处理较大扰动。
ai.result: 数值示例表明该方法在小扰动下高效准确，大扰动时可通过逐步应用保持有效性，但存在一定局限性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在网络拓扑变化时快速调整斯坦纳点位置，节省计算资源。

idea_spark.idea: 结合机器学习预测扰动模式，预计算多种扰动下的近似更新，实现实时自适应网络优化。
idea_spark.risk: 线性近似在非线性强或扰动过大时可能失效，需结合误差控制或迭代修正。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受控制理论中反馈线性化启发，将网络优化视为动态系统，用近似更新实现闭环调整。

en.tldr: For the Steiner tree problem, a first-order approximation theorem is proposed to efficiently update Steiner point positions after terminal node perturbations, with numerical examples demonstrating effectiveness and limitations.
en.motivation: In practice, terminal positions often undergo small perturbations, requiring quick adaptation of existing Steiner tree solutions without full recomputation.
en.method: A first-order approximation theorem is established, linearizing updates based on the current solution, with stepwise application for larger perturbations.
en.result: Numerical examples show high efficiency and accuracy for small perturbations, and stepwise application extends effectiveness to larger ones, though limitations exist.
en.help_to_user: Helps users quickly adjust Steiner point positions under network topology changes, saving computational resources.

idea_spark.idea: Combine with machine learning to predict perturbation patterns and precompute approximate updates for real-time adaptive network optimization.
idea_spark.risk: Linear approximation may fail under strong nonlinearity or large perturbations, requiring error control or iterative correction.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by feedback linearization in control theory, treating network optimization as a dynamic system with closed-loop adjustment via approximate updates.

papers.title: Graph Neural Network-Informed Predictive Flows for Faster Ford-Fulkerson and PAC-Learnability
papers.summary: We propose a learning-augmented framework for accelerating max-flow computation and image segmentation by integrating Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) with the Ford-Fulkerson algorithm. Rather than predicting initial flows, our method learns edge importance probabilities to guide augmenting path selection. We introduce a Message Passing GNN (MPGNN) that jointly learns node and edge embeddings through coupled updates, capturing both global structure and local flow dynamics such as residual capacity and bottlenecks.   Given an input image, we propose a method to construct a grid-based flow network with source and sink nodes, extract features, and perform a single GNN inference to assign edge probabilities reflecting their likelihood of belonging to high-capacity cuts. These probabilities are stored in a priority queue and used to guide a modified Ford-Fulkerson procedure, prioritizing augmenting paths via an Edmonds-Karp-style search with bottleneck-aware tie-breaking. This avoids repeated inference over residual graphs while leveraging learned structure throughout optimization.   We further introduce a bidirectional path construction strategy centered on high-probability edges and provide a theoretical framework relating prediction quality to efficiency via a weighted permutation distance metric. Our method preserves max-flow/min-cut optimality while reducing the number of augmentations in practice. We also outline a hybrid extension combining flow warm-starting with edge-priority prediction, establishing a foundation for learning-guided combinatorial optimization in image segmentation.

ai.tldr: 提出一种结合图神经网络与Ford-Fulkerson算法的学习增强框架，通过预测边重要性概率加速最大流计算与图像分割。
ai.motivation: 传统最大流算法（如Ford-Fulkerson）在复杂图上增广路径选择效率低，而现有学习方法需反复推理残差图。
ai.method: 设计消息传递GNN联合学习节点与边嵌入，从输入图像构建网格流网络，单次推理输出边概率，指导优先队列驱动的改进Ford-Fulkerson过程，并引入双向路径构建策略。
ai.result: 在保持最大流/最小割最优性的前提下，实际减少增广次数；理论分析通过加权置换距离度量预测质量与效率的关系。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可证明的学习引导组合优化方法，适用于图像分割等需要高效最大流计算的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将GNN预测的边概率作为启发式信息，结合优先队列与瓶颈感知的Edmonds-Karp搜索，避免重复推理。
idea_spark.risk: GNN预测质量依赖训练数据分布，在未见过的图结构上可能退化；理论保证仅针对增广次数而非运行时间。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受学习增强算法（如learned caches）启发，将预测作为算法内部的优先级信号而非直接输出解。

en.tldr: Proposes a learning-augmented framework integrating Graph Neural Networks with Ford-Fulkerson to accelerate max-flow and image segmentation by predicting edge importance probabilities.
en.motivation: Traditional max-flow algorithms suffer from inefficient augmenting path selection on complex graphs, while existing learning methods require repeated inference on residual graphs.
en.method: A Message Passing GNN jointly learns node and edge embeddings; from an input image, a grid flow network is constructed, and a single GNN inference assigns edge probabilities that guide a priority-queue-driven modified Ford-Fulkerson with bottleneck-aware tie-breaking and bidirectional path construction.
en.result: Preserves max-flow/min-cut optimality while reducing the number of augmentations in practice; theoretical analysis relates prediction quality to efficiency via a weighted permutation distance metric.
en.help_to_user: Provides a provably efficient learning-guided combinatorial optimization method for applications like image segmentation requiring fast max-flow.

idea_spark.idea: Use GNN-predicted edge probabilities as heuristic signals, combined with a priority queue and bottleneck-aware Edmonds-Karp search, avoiding repeated inference.
idea_spark.risk: GNN prediction quality depends on training data distribution and may degrade on unseen graph structures; theoretical guarantees only cover augmentation count, not runtime.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by learning-augmented algorithms (e.g., learned caches), using predictions as internal priority signals rather than direct solution outputs.

papers.title: On invariant solutions of linear time-fractional diffusion-wave equations with variable coefficients
papers.summary: We study invariant solutions of a certain class of time-fractional diffusion-wave equations with variable coefficients via Lie symmetry analysis. In physics, the fractional diffusion equation describes transport dynamics that are governed by anomalous diffusion while the fractional wave equation describes oscillations and wave propagation in various physical systems. In order to obtain exact invariant solutions of these equations, we firstly determine infinitesimal symmetries with respect to the variable coefficients of the equations. With the help of these symmetries, we then find solutions in terms of Mittag-Leffler functions, generalized Wright functions and Fox H-functions.

ai.tldr: 通过李对称分析，研究了含变系数的时间分数阶扩散-波动方程的不变解，并利用Mittag-Leffler函数、广义Wright函数和Fox H函数给出了精确解。
ai.motivation: 分数阶扩散-波动方程在异常扩散和波动传播中有重要应用，但含变系数情形下的精确解求解困难。
ai.method: 先确定方程关于变系数的无穷小对称性，再借助这些对称性导出不变解。
ai.result: 得到了用Mittag-Leffler函数、广义Wright函数和Fox H函数表示的不变解。
ai.help_to_user: 为含变系数的分数阶偏微分方程提供了一种系统求解方法，可推广至其他物理模型。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将变系数视为对称性分类参数，建立系数与解函数形式之间的对应关系。
idea_spark.risk: 变系数形式复杂时，对称性可能退化或难以显式求解。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合数值方法验证所得不变解在具体物理场景中的适用性。

en.tldr: We study invariant solutions of a class of time-fractional diffusion-wave equations with variable coefficients via Lie symmetry analysis, obtaining exact solutions expressed in terms of Mittag-Leffler functions, generalized Wright functions, and Fox H-functions.
en.motivation: Fractional diffusion-wave equations model anomalous diffusion and wave propagation, but solving them with variable coefficients is challenging.
en.method: First determine infinitesimal symmetries with respect to the variable coefficients, then use these symmetries to derive invariant solutions.
en.result: Exact invariant solutions are obtained in terms of Mittag-Leffler, generalized Wright, and Fox H-functions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic approach to solving fractional PDEs with variable coefficients, applicable to other physical models.

idea_spark.risk: For complex variable coefficients, symmetries may degenerate or become intractable.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine with numerical methods to validate the invariant solutions in concrete physical scenarios.

papers.title: The Sample Complexity of Multicalibration
papers.summary: We study the minimax sample complexity of multicalibration in the batch setting. A learner observes $n$ i.i.d. samples from an unknown distribution and must output a (possibly randomized) predictor whose population multicalibration error, measured by Expected Calibration Error (ECE), is at most $\varepsilon$ with respect to a given family of groups. For every fixed $κ> 0$, in the regime $|G|\le \varepsilon^{-κ}$, we prove that $\widetildeΘ(\varepsilon^{-3})$ samples are necessary and sufficient, up to polylogarithmic factors. The lower bound holds even for randomized predictors, and the upper bound is realized by a randomized predictor obtained via an online-to-batch reduction. This separates the sample complexity of multicalibration from that of marginal calibration, which scales as $\widetildeΘ(\varepsilon^{-2})$, and shows that mean-ECE multicalibration is as difficult in the batch setting as it is in the online setting, in contrast to marginal calibration which is strictly more difficult in the online setting. In contrast we observe that for $κ= 0$, the sample complexity of multicalibration remains $\widetildeΘ(\varepsilon^{-2})$ exhibiting a sharp threshold phenomenon.   More generally, we establish matching upper and lower bounds, up to polylogarithmic factors, for a weighted $L_p$ multicalibration metric for all $1 \le p \le 2$, with optimal exponent $3/p$. We also extend the lower-bound template to a regular class of elicitable properties, and combine it with the online upper bounds of Hu et al. (2025) to obtain matching bounds for calibrating properties including expectiles and bounded-density quantiles.

ai.tldr: 研究了批量设置下多校准的最小最大样本复杂度，证明当组数不超过ε^{-κ}时，样本复杂度为Θ̃(ε^{-3})，与边际校准的Θ̃(ε^{-2})不同，并扩展到加权L_p多校准度量。
ai.motivation: 确定多校准在批量设置中的样本复杂度，并比较其与边际校准的差异。
ai.method: 通过在线到批量的归约构造随机预测器，并建立匹配的下界。
ai.result: 对于固定κ>0且|G|≤ε^{-κ}，样本复杂度为Θ̃(ε^{-3})；当κ=0时，复杂度降为Θ̃(ε^{-2})，呈现阈值现象。加权L_p多校准的最优指数为3/p。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解多校准所需样本量的理论界限，指导实际应用中的样本收集。

idea_spark.idea: 利用在线学习算法实现批量多校准，并证明其最优性。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于特定假设（如组数限制），实际中可能不严格满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将在线学习技术用于解决其他统计学习中的样本复杂度问题。

en.tldr: Studies the minimax sample complexity of multicalibration in the batch setting, proving that when the number of groups is bounded by ε^{-κ}, the sample complexity is Θ̃(ε^{-3}), distinct from marginal calibration's Θ̃(ε^{-2}), and extends to weighted L_p multicalibration metrics.
en.motivation: To determine the sample complexity of multicalibration in the batch setting and compare it with marginal calibration.
en.method: Constructs randomized predictors via an online-to-batch reduction and establishes matching lower bounds.
en.result: For fixed κ>0 and |G|≤ε^{-κ}, sample complexity is Θ̃(ε^{-3}); when κ=0, it drops to Θ̃(ε^{-2}), exhibiting a sharp threshold. The optimal exponent for weighted L_p multicalibration is 3/p.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical bounds on the sample size needed for multicalibration, guiding practical data collection.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage online learning algorithms to achieve batch multicalibration with optimal sample complexity.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results rely on specific assumptions (e.g., group count bounds) that may not hold in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires using online learning techniques to solve sample complexity problems in other statistical learning tasks.

papers.title: Quantitative stochastic homogenization for long-range random walks with critical jump index
papers.summary: In this paper, we study the stochastic homogenization for a class of symmetric random walks in random conductance model, whose one-step transition probability from $x$ to $y$ is proportional to $|x-y|^{-d-2}$. As the associated jumping kernel fails to be $L^2$-integrable yet admits a finite $α$-th moment for all $α\in (0,2)$, we refer to the corresponding process $(X^\w_t)_{t\ge0}$ as a long-range random walk with critical jump index. In this critical regime, the scaled process $\bigl(k^{-1}X_{k^2(\log k)^{-1}t}\bigr)_{t\ge 0}$, whose scaling order is different from the diffusive scaling and the $α$-stable scaling, converges to a Brownian motion. Besides characterizing the limiting Brownian motion, we will give a convergence rate for associated scaled resolvents, which obeys the order $(\log k)^{-\frac{1}{2}+\frac{1}{2(d-2)}+\varepsilon}$ with any $\varepsilon>0$ for all $d>3$.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了一类临界跳跃指数的长程随机游走在随机电导模型中的随机均匀化，证明了其缩放过程收敛到布朗运动，并给出了收敛速率。
ai.motivation: 理解临界跳跃指数下长程随机游走的宏观行为，填补扩散缩放与α-稳定缩放之间的空白。
ai.method: 通过分析跳跃核的矩性质，采用非标准的时间缩放（k^2 (log k)^{-1}），并利用解析方法估计预解式的收敛速率。
ai.result: 缩放过程收敛到布朗运动，且预解式的收敛速率为 (log k)^{-1/2 + 1/(2(d-2)) + ε}（d>3）。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究非局部随机过程的均匀化提供了新的缩放框架和收敛率估计。

idea_spark.idea: 探索在临界指数下，时间缩放中的对数修正是否源于跳跃核的L^2非可积性。
idea_spark.risk: 收敛率依赖于维度d，高维情况下的对数修正可能消失。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将临界跳跃指数视为连接扩散与稳定过程的桥梁，可能启发新的多尺度建模方法。

zh.motivation: 理解临界跳跃指数下长程随机游走的宏观行为，填补扩散缩放与α-稳定缩放之间的空白。
zh.method: 通过分析跳跃核的矩性质，采用非标准的时间缩放（k^2 (log k)^{-1}），并利用解析方法估计预解式的收敛速率。
zh.result: 缩放过程收敛到布朗运动，且预解式的收敛速率为 (log k)^{-1/2 + 1/(2(d-2)) + ε}（d>3）。
zh.help_to_user: 为研究非局部随机过程的均匀化提供了新的缩放框架和收敛率估计。

idea_spark.idea: 探索在临界指数下，时间缩放中的对数修正是否源于跳跃核的L^2非可积性。
idea_spark.risk: 收敛率依赖于维度d，高维情况下的对数修正可能消失。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将临界跳跃指数视为连接扩散与稳定过程的桥梁，可能启发新的多尺度建模方法。

en.tldr: This paper studies stochastic homogenization for long-range random walks with critical jump index in the random conductance model, proving convergence of the scaled process to Brownian motion and providing convergence rates.
en.motivation: To understand the macroscopic behavior of long-range random walks at the critical jump index, bridging diffusive and α-stable scalings.
en.method: By analyzing moment properties of the jump kernel, using a non-standard time scaling (k^2 (log k)^{-1}), and estimating resolvent convergence rates via analytic methods.
en.result: The scaled process converges to Brownian motion, with resolvent convergence rate (log k)^{-1/2 + 1/(2(d-2)) + ε} for d>3.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new scaling framework and convergence rate estimates for homogenization of nonlocal stochastic processes.

idea_spark.idea: Explore whether the logarithmic correction in time scaling arises from the L^2 non-integrability of the jump kernel.
idea_spark.risk: The convergence rate depends on dimension d; the logarithmic correction may vanish in high dimensions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing the critical jump index as a bridge between diffusion and stable processes may inspire new multiscale modeling approaches.

papers.title: SLAM as a Stochastic Control Problem with Partial Information: Optimal Solutions and Rigorous Approximations
papers.summary: Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is a foundational state estimation problem in robotics in which a robot accurately constructs a map of its environment while also localizing itself within this construction. We study the active SLAM problem through the lens of optimal stochastic control, thereby recasting it as a decision-making problem under partial information. After reviewing several commonly studied models, we present a general stochastic control formulation of active SLAM together with a rigorous treatment of motion, sensing, and map representation. We introduce a new exploration stage cost that encodes the geometry of the state when evaluating information-gathering actions. This formulation, constructed as a nonstandard partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP), is then analyzed to derive rigorously justified approximate solutions that are near-optimal. To enable this analysis, the associated regularity conditions are studied under general assumptions that apply to a wide range of robotics applications. For a particular case, we conduct an extensive numerical study in which standard learning algorithms are used to learn near-optimal policies.

ai.tldr: 将主动SLAM问题重新表述为部分信息下的随机最优控制问题，提出一种新的探索阶段代价函数，并推导出近似最优的严格解。
ai.motivation: 主动SLAM本质上是部分信息下的决策问题，现有方法缺乏严格的随机控制视角和理论保证。
ai.method: 建立非标准POMDP模型，引入几何感知的探索代价，在一般正则条件下分析并推导近似最优策略。
ai.result: 给出了近似最优解的严格证明，并通过数值实验验证了学习算法能学到接近最优的策略。
ai.help_to_user: 为机器人主动SLAM提供了理论框架和可实现的近似最优方法，有助于设计更高效、更鲁棒的自主导航系统。

idea_spark.idea: 将探索代价与状态几何耦合，可能启发更通用的信息论代价设计，用于强化学习中的探索奖励塑造。
idea_spark.risk: 理论假设（如正则条件）在实际复杂环境中可能不成立，近似最优性可能退化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴控制理论中的分离原理，将SLAM分解为估计与控制子问题，可能简化计算并保持性能。

idea_spark.idea: 将探索代价与状态几何耦合，可能启发更通用的信息论代价设计，用于强化学习中的探索奖励塑造。

idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴控制理论中的分离原理，将SLAM分解为估计与控制子问题，可能简化计算并保持性能。

en.tldr: Reformulates active SLAM as a stochastic optimal control problem under partial information, introduces a geometry-aware exploration cost, and derives rigorously justified near-optimal approximations.
en.motivation: Active SLAM is inherently a decision-making problem under partial information, yet existing approaches lack a rigorous stochastic control perspective and theoretical guarantees.
en.method: Constructs a nonstandard POMDP model with a geometry-aware exploration stage cost, analyzes regularity conditions under general assumptions, and derives near-optimal approximate solutions.
en.result: Provides rigorous proofs for near-optimal approximations and demonstrates via numerical experiments that standard learning algorithms can learn near-optimal policies.
en.help_to_user: Offers a theoretical framework and implementable near-optimal methods for active SLAM in robotics, aiding the design of more efficient and robust autonomous navigation systems.

idea_spark.idea: Coupling exploration cost with state geometry may inspire more general information-theoretic cost designs for shaping exploration rewards in reinforcement learning.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical assumptions (e.g., regularity conditions) may not hold in complex real-world environments, potentially degrading near-optimality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging the separation principle from control theory to decompose SLAM into estimation and control subproblems could simplify computation while preserving performance.

papers.title: Shaping nematic order in bacterial films with single-cell resolution patterning
papers.summary: Bacterial colonies composed of elongated cells form active nematic fluids that spontaneously self-organise into ordered domains of aligned cells and exhibit self-generated chaotic flows powered by cell growth. While their dynamics have attracted significant attention, the role of initial conditions remains largely unexplored due to a lack of precise patterning methods. Here, we harness the precision of capillary assembly to pattern Bacillus subtilis endospores into arrays with controlled positions and orientations at single-cell resolution. Upon germination and growth of cell chains, we quantify the dynamics and morphologies of the resulting bacterial films. While orthogonally seeded spores lead to chaotic dynamics, seeding them with parallel orientations yields films with high nematic order across millimetres, which subsequently synchronously buckle upon further growth. Our observations are captured by numerical simulations and a model that describes the buckling dynamics starting from the mechanical properties of individual filaments. By programming local cell orientation with single-cell precision, we finally harness nematic alignment to create macroscopic bacterial films with local optical anisotropy, via structural colouration and light polarisation. Our findings demonstrate that initial conditions play a key role and offer exciting opportunities to control the spatio-temporal organization of bacterial assemblies towards addressing open biological questions and realizing living materials with tailored properties.

ai.tldr: 利用毛细组装技术以单细胞精度图案化枯草芽孢杆菌孢子，发现初始取向决定细菌膜向列有序度和宏观形貌，并实现结构色调控。
ai.motivation: 细菌膜的自组织动力学受初始条件影响，但缺乏精确图案化方法，因此无法系统研究初始取向的作用。
ai.method: 采用毛细组装将枯草芽孢杆菌孢子以单细胞精度排列成阵列，控制位置和取向；通过萌发和生长形成细菌膜，结合数值模拟和力学模型分析。
ai.result: 正交取向孢子导致混沌动力学，平行取向孢子产生毫米级高度向列有序膜，随后同步屈曲；利用向列排列实现结构色和光偏振调控。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种以单细胞精度控制细菌膜初始取向的方法，可用于研究活性物质自组织及设计具有可调光学性质的活体材料。

idea_spark.idea: 利用细菌膜的向列有序和屈曲动力学，可设计响应性活体材料，例如通过图案化孢子实现可编程形变或光学信号输出。
idea_spark.risk: 孢子萌发和生长条件（如营养、湿度）的微小波动可能影响图案保真度和动力学重复性；长期稳定性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受结构色调控启发，可将细菌膜作为生物传感器或显示元件，通过初始图案编码信息，利用光学各向异性读取状态。

en.tldr: Using capillary assembly to pattern Bacillus subtilis spores with single-cell precision, we show that initial orientation dictates nematic order and macroscopic morphology of bacterial films, enabling structural color control.
en.motivation: The role of initial conditions in bacterial film self-organization is unexplored due to lack of precise patterning methods.
en.method: Capillary assembly positions B. subtilis endospores in arrays with controlled orientation; after germination and growth, dynamics and morphology are quantified via experiments, simulations, and a mechanical model.
en.result: Orthogonal seeding yields chaotic dynamics; parallel seeding produces millimeter-scale highly ordered nematic films that synchronously buckle; nematic alignment enables structural coloration and light polarization.
en.help_to_user: Provides a single-cell-resolution method to control initial orientation in bacterial films, useful for studying active matter self-organization and designing living materials with tunable optical properties.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit nematic order and buckling dynamics to create responsive living materials, e.g., programmable deformation or optical signal output via spore patterning.
idea_spark.risk: Small fluctuations in germination conditions may affect pattern fidelity and reproducibility; long-term stability needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by structural color control, bacterial films could serve as biosensors or display elements, encoding information via initial patterns and read out through optical anisotropy.

papers.title: Optimal control of therapies related to an oxytaxis glioblastoma model
papers.summary: We propose and analyze an optimal control problem associated with a Keller-Segel type parabolic system with chemoattraction, modeling the glioblastoma growth in a bi-dimensional bounded domain, influenced by the presence of oxygen where the controls are two different (chemotherapy and antiangiogenic) therapies. The model considers the random diffusion of tumor cells and oxygen, the movement of cells towards the oxygen gradient (oxytaxis), and reaction terms describing the interaction between cells and oxygen. We establish a mathematical framework to analyze the existence and uniqueness of weak-strong solution of the model and subsequently we analyze an optimal control problem considering a cost functional that minimizes both the tumor growth and the oxygen concentration. We prove the existence of a global optimal solution and derive necessary first-order optimality conditions. Finally, we propose a methodology for approximating the optimal therapies. We use the gradient of the reduced cost functional through the adjoint scheme, and minimize the cost functional implementing the Adam gradient optimization method. Some numerical experiments are provided to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed scheme.

ai.tldr: 提出并分析了一个与氧趋化性胶质母细胞瘤模型相关的最优控制问题，其中控制变量为化疗和抗血管生成疗法。
ai.motivation: 胶质母细胞瘤的生长受氧气梯度影响（氧趋化性），需要设计最优的治疗策略以同时抑制肿瘤生长和降低氧浓度。
ai.method: 建立Keller-Segel型抛物系统的弱-强解存在唯一性理论，定义包含肿瘤和氧浓度的代价泛函，通过伴随方法推导一阶最优性条件，并采用Adam梯度优化算法近似最优疗法。
ai.result: 证明了全局最优解的存在性，数值实验验证了所提方案的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 为胶质母细胞瘤的联合治疗（化疗+抗血管生成）提供了数学优化框架和数值求解方法。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将氧浓度作为状态约束而非代价项，或引入多目标Pareto优化。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设可能过于简化，实际肿瘤微环境中的异质性和随机性未纳入。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合深度学习代理模型加速伴随梯度计算，实现实时治疗优化。

idea_spark.inspiration: 结合深度学习代理模型加速伴随梯度计算，实现实时治疗优化。

en.tldr: Proposes and analyzes an optimal control problem for a Keller-Segel type glioblastoma model with oxytaxis, where controls are chemotherapy and antiangiogenic therapy.
en.motivation: Glioblastoma growth is influenced by oxygen gradients (oxytaxis), necessitating optimal therapy design to minimize both tumor growth and oxygen concentration.
en.method: Establishes existence and uniqueness of weak-strong solutions for the parabolic system, defines a cost functional, derives first-order optimality conditions via adjoint method, and approximates optimal therapies using Adam gradient optimization.
en.result: Proves existence of a global optimal solution; numerical experiments demonstrate effectiveness of the proposed scheme.
en.help_to_user: Provides a mathematical optimization framework and numerical solver for combined chemo- and antiangiogenic therapy in glioblastoma.

idea_spark.idea: Consider oxygen concentration as a state constraint rather than a cost term, or introduce multi-objective Pareto optimization.
idea_spark.risk: Model assumptions may oversimplify real tumor microenvironment heterogeneity and stochasticity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine deep learning surrogate models to accelerate adjoint gradient computation for real-time therapy optimization.

papers.title: Infinite Horizon Optimal Control Problems with Discount Factors
papers.summary: This paper is dedicated to the analysis of infinite horizon optimal control problems subject to semilinear parabolic equations with constraints on the controls and discounted cost functionals. The discount factors on the cost and the state components are allowed to differ from each other. First-order as well as second-order optimality conditions are derived and the importance of allowing different discount factors for the second-order analysis for the class of nonlinearities under consideration is demonstrated. Finally convergence and rate of convergence for the approximation of the infinite horizon problem by a family of finite horizon problems is proven.

ai.tldr: 本文分析了带折扣因子的无穷时域最优控制问题，推导了一阶和二阶最优性条件，并证明了有限时域近似的收敛性。
ai.motivation: 现有研究多假设成本与状态折扣因子相同，本文旨在放宽这一限制，分析不同折扣因子对二阶最优性条件的影响。
ai.method: 基于半线性抛物方程和约束控制，分别推导一阶和二阶最优性条件，并通过有限时域问题逼近无穷时域问题，证明收敛性及收敛速率。
ai.result: 证明了允许不同折扣因子对二阶分析的重要性，并给出了有限时域近似的收敛性及速率结果。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解无穷时域最优控制中折扣因子差异带来的理论影响，以及如何用有限时域问题近似求解。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将不同折扣因子应用于状态和成本，可能揭示长期与短期目标之间的权衡，启发多目标优化设计。
idea_spark.risk: 不同折扣因子可能导致问题非凸或最优性条件复杂化，数值实现需谨慎处理。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受经济学中双曲折扣启发，可探索非指数折扣在最优控制中的应用。
