en.tldr: This paper analyzes infinite horizon optimal control problems with discount factors, derives first- and second-order optimality conditions, and proves convergence of finite horizon approximations.
en.motivation: Existing studies often assume identical discount factors for cost and state; this work relaxes that assumption to study its impact on second-order conditions.
en.method: Based on semilinear parabolic equations with control constraints, first- and second-order optimality conditions are derived, and convergence rates for finite horizon approximations are proven.
en.result: The importance of allowing different discount factors for second-order analysis is demonstrated, along with convergence and rate results for finite horizon approximations.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the theoretical implications of differing discount factors in infinite horizon optimal control and how to approximate via finite horizon problems.

idea_spark.idea: Applying different discount factors to state and cost may reveal trade-offs between short-term and long-term objectives, inspiring multi-objective optimization designs.
idea_spark.risk: Different discount factors may lead to non-convexity or complex optimality conditions, requiring careful numerical treatment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by hyperbolic discounting in economics, non-exponential discounting could be explored in optimal control.

papers.title: On the blowup rate of vorticity for the Euler equations in a bounded domain
papers.summary: Given that a solution to the 3D incompressible Euler equations on a bounded domain blows up at a time $T_\ast$ and that $T_\ast$ is the first such time, we provide pointwise-in-time lower bounds on $\|D^kω\|_{L^\infty(Ω)}$ for $k \geq 1$. We also show that the Gronwall-type inequality satisfied by $\|ω(t)\|_{L^\infty}$, in the cases that $Ω= \mathbb{R}^3$, $\mathbb{T}^3$, or a bounded domain, exhibits wildly oscillating solutions.

ai.tldr: 研究有界域内三维不可压缩欧拉方程涡量在首次爆破时间前的下界估计，并揭示Gronwall型不等式存在剧烈振荡解。
ai.motivation: 理解有界域中欧拉方程涡量爆破速率，填补点态下界估计的空白。
ai.method: 利用Gronwall型不等式和函数空间分析，推导涡量高阶导数的逐点下界。
ai.result: 给出了k≥1阶导数范数的下界，并发现Gronwall不等式在多种域中允许振荡解。
ai.help_to_user: 为流体力学中涡量爆破的定量分析提供理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将振荡解行为与湍流间歇性现象关联，探索物理意义。
idea_spark.risk: 振荡解可能使数值模拟的稳定性分析复杂化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合数值实验验证振荡解的存在性及其对爆破速率的影响。

idea_spark.idea: 将振荡解行为与湍流间歇性现象关联，探索物理意义。
idea_spark.risk: 振荡解可能使数值模拟的稳定性分析复杂化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合数值实验验证振荡解的存在性及其对爆破速率的影响。

en.tldr: Provides pointwise lower bounds on vorticity derivatives before blowup for 3D Euler equations in bounded domains, and shows that the Gronwall inequality admits wildly oscillating solutions.
en.motivation: To understand the blowup rate of vorticity in bounded domains, filling a gap in pointwise lower bounds.
en.method: Uses Gronwall-type inequalities and functional analysis to derive lower bounds on higher-order derivatives of vorticity.
en.result: Establishes lower bounds for k≥1 derivative norms and reveals oscillatory solutions to the Gronwall inequality in various domains.
en.help_to_user: Offers theoretical tools for quantitative analysis of vorticity blowup in fluid dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Connect oscillatory solution behavior to turbulent intermittency and explore physical implications.
idea_spark.risk: Oscillatory solutions may complicate stability analysis in numerical simulations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine numerical experiments to verify existence of oscillatory solutions and their impact on blowup rates.

papers.title: Geometric Decoupling and the Color--Speed Mechanism in Multispeed Stochastic Klein--Gordon Systems
papers.summary: We study a two-component fractional stochastic Klein--Gordon system on $\mathbb{T}^3$ driven by independent space-time white noises. Our main result is the identification of a new color-speed separation principle for the mixed paracontrolled random operators in the multispeed regime. This principle is created by the interaction between probabilistic cancellation, multispeed dispersive phase separation, and the nonlinear random-operator structure generated by the paracontrolled expansion. At the level of the nonlinear expansion, it reorganizes the singular contraction geometry of the mixed random operators: cross-color contraction channels vanish by independence, while the surviving same-color contractions are forced into speed-separated oscillatory interactions and therefore become finite Volterra-type deterministic multipliers. In this way, the multispeed structure does not merely alter the linear phase geometry; it changes the nonlinear singular interaction mechanism itself and regularizes the most singular contraction channels produced by the quadratic coupling.   We prove the almost sure pathwise convergence of the centered fluctuation operators and the convergence of the same-color deterministic contractions, with no singular random-operator centering required in the limiting equation. Our analysis identifies $α= \frac{3}{4}$ as the intrinsic structural threshold of the mixed random-operator algebra. In addition, we construct the baseline stochastic lift and formulate a conditional deterministic closure for the full paracontrolled system. These results show that, in coupled singular dispersive SPDEs, multispeed propagation can act as a geometric regularizer precisely through its effect on the nonlinear random-operator structure.

ai.tldr: 研究了三环面上双分量分数阶随机Klein-Gordon系统，发现了多速情形下颜色-速度分离原理，该原理通过概率抵消、多速色散相位分离和paracontrolled展开的非线性随机算子结构，重新组织了奇异收缩几何，使得交叉颜色收缩通道因独立性消失，而幸存同色收缩被迫进入速度分离的振荡相互作用，从而变为有限Volterra型确定性乘子。
ai.motivation: 理解多速传播在耦合奇异色散SPDEs中如何作为几何正则化器，特别是通过其对非线性随机算子结构的影响。
ai.method: 采用paracontrolled展开分析混合随机算子，利用概率独立性和多速色散相位分离，识别颜色-速度分离原理，并证明中心化波动算子的几乎必然路径收敛。
ai.result: 证明了中心化波动算子的几乎必然路径收敛和同色确定性收缩的收敛，无需奇异随机算子中心化；确定了α=3/4为混合随机算子代数的内在结构阈值；构建了基线随机提升并给出了全paracontrolled系统的条件确定性闭包。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解多速色散SPDEs中非线性奇异相互作用的几何正则化提供了新视角和数学框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用概率独立性和色散相位分离，将最奇异收缩通道转化为有限确定性乘子，从而避免复杂随机算子中心化。
idea_spark.risk: 该原理依赖于特定噪声独立性和多速结构，可能不适用于非独立噪声或单速系统。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受paracontrolled calculus和色散方程相位混合思想的启发，将概率抵消与几何收缩结合。

papers.title: Three-dimensional time-periodic problem on the Boltzmann equation with external force
papers.summary: The time-periodic problem on the Boltzmann equation with a given time-periodic external force in the three-dimensional whole space has remained open since it was first studied in [13] for only spatial dimensions not less than five. The goal of this paper is to give an affirmative answer to this problem provided that the external force is sufficiently small in the function space $\mathcal{C}(\mathbb{R};\dot{B}^{-3/2}_{2,\infty}\cap\dot{H}^N)$ with $N\geq 4$. The proof is based on Serrin's method through studying the global-in-time stability of the Cauchy problem with time-periodic external forces. As a direct consequence, the result also yields the existence and stability of stationary solutions to the physically realistic three-dimensional Boltzmann equation when the external force is time-independent.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了在三维全空间中，当外力足够小时，玻尔兹曼方程存在时间周期解，并给出了全局稳定性。
ai.motivation: 此前仅对空间维数不低于五的情况有结果，三维情形长期未解决。
ai.method: 采用Serrin方法，通过研究带时间周期外力的柯西问题的全局稳定性来证明。
ai.result: 在外力属于特定函数空间且范数足够小的条件下，三维玻尔兹曼方程存在时间周期解，并由此得到时间无关外力下稳态解的存在性与稳定性。
ai.help_to_user: 为三维玻尔兹曼方程的时间周期解问题提供了完整的理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用全局稳定性将时间周期问题转化为柯西问题，降低维度限制。
idea_spark.risk: 外力的小性假设可能限制实际应用场景。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将高维结果向低维推广时，可借助更精细的函数空间和稳定性分析。

en.tldr: This paper proves the existence of time-periodic solutions to the Boltzmann equation in three-dimensional whole space under sufficiently small external force, and establishes global stability.
en.motivation: Previous results only covered spatial dimensions five or higher; the three-dimensional case remained open.
en.method: Serrin's method is employed by studying the global-in-time stability of the Cauchy problem with time-periodic external forces.
en.result: Under the condition that the external force belongs to a specific function space and is sufficiently small, time-periodic solutions exist, and as a corollary, stationary solutions exist and are stable when the force is time-independent.
en.help_to_user: Provides a complete theoretical foundation for time-periodic solutions of the three-dimensional Boltzmann equation.

idea_spark.idea: Convert the time-periodic problem into a Cauchy problem via global stability, reducing the dimension restriction.
idea_spark.risk: The smallness assumption on the external force may limit practical applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: When extending high-dimensional results to lower dimensions, finer function spaces and stability analysis can be leveraged.

papers.title: Neutron and X-ray Diffraction Reveal the Limits of Long-Range Machine Learning Potentials for Medium-Range Order in Silica Glass
papers.summary: Glassy silica is a foundational material in optics and electronics, yet accurately predicting its medium-range order (MRO) remains a major challenge for machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs). While local MLIPs reproduce the short-range SiO4 tetrahedral network well, it remains unclear whether locality alone is sufficient to recover the first sharp diffraction peak (FSDP), the principal experimental signature of MRO. Here, we combine neutron and X-ray diffraction measurements with large-scale molecular dynamics driven by two MACE-based models: a short-range (SR) potential and a long-range (LR) extension incorporating reciprocal-space gated attention. The SR model systematically over-structures the network, producing an overly intense FSDP in both the liquid and glassy states. Incorporating long-range interactions improves agreement with experiment for the liquid structure by reducing this excess ordering, but the LR model still fails to recover the experimental amorphous MRO after quenching. Ring-statistics and bond-angle analyses reveal that SR model exhibits an artificially narrow distribution dominated by six-membered rings, while the LR model produces a broader but still biased ring population. Despite preserving the correct tetrahedral geometry, both models show limited variability in Si-O-Si angles, indicating constrained network flexibility. These structural signatures demonstrate that both models retain excessive memory of the parent liquid network, leading to kinetically trapped and nonphysical medium-range configurations during vitrification. These results show that explicit long-range interactions are necessary but not sufficient for predictive modelling of disordered silica and suggest that accurate MRO further requires training data and sampling strategies that adequately represent the liquid-to-glass transition.

ai.tldr: 结合中子与X射线衍射实验和机器学习势分子动力学模拟，发现短程和长程MACE模型均无法准确预测二氧化硅玻璃的中程有序结构。
ai.motivation: 玻璃态二氧化硅的中程有序（MRO）是光学和电子学应用的关键，但现有机器学习原子间势（MLIP）对其预测能力不足，特别是第一尖锐衍射峰（FSDP）的再现。
ai.method: 使用中子与X射线衍射实验，以及基于MACE的短程（SR）和长程（LR）势进行大规模分子动力学模拟，分析液态和玻璃态的结构。
ai.result: SR模型过度结构化网络，FSDP过强；LR模型改善液态结构但淬火后仍无法恢复实验MRO；两种模型均存在环分布偏差和Si-O-Si角受限，表明对母液网络记忆过强。
ai.help_to_user: 揭示了当前MLIP在模拟无序材料中程有序时的根本局限，为改进势函数训练和采样策略提供了方向。

idea_spark.idea: 设计包含液态-玻璃转变过程的训练数据，或采用增强采样方法以打破动力学陷阱。
idea_spark.risk: 长程相互作用引入可能增加计算成本，且训练数据不足时仍可能失败。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合实验衍射数据作为约束，直接优化势函数对FSDP的预测能力。

en.tldr: Combining neutron/X-ray diffraction and machine-learning potentials, we show that both short-range and long-range MACE models fail to predict medium-range order in silica glass.
en.motivation: Medium-range order (MRO) in glassy silica is critical for optics and electronics, but machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) struggle to reproduce the first sharp diffraction peak (FSDP), the key experimental signature of MRO.
en.method: We performed neutron and X-ray diffraction experiments alongside large-scale molecular dynamics using two MACE-based models: a short-range (SR) potential and a long-range (LR) extension with reciprocal-space gated attention.
en.result: The SR model over-structures the network with an overly intense FSDP; the LR model improves liquid structure but still fails to recover experimental MRO after quenching. Both models show biased ring statistics and constrained Si-O-Si angles, indicating excessive memory of the parent liquid.
en.help_to_user: Highlights fundamental limitations of current MLIPs for disordered materials and suggests directions for improved training and sampling strategies.

idea_spark.idea: Design training data that explicitly includes the liquid-to-glass transition, or use enhanced sampling to overcome kinetic traps.
idea_spark.risk: Including long-range interactions may increase computational cost, and insufficient training data could still lead to failure.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use experimental diffraction data as a direct constraint to optimize potentials for FSDP prediction.

papers.title: $H_2/H_{\infty}$ Control for Stochastic Differential Systems with Partial Observation
papers.summary: This paper investigates the $H_{2}/H_{\infty}$ control problem for linear stochastic differential systems under partial observation. Unlike existing studies that assume full state accessibility, we consider the scenario where the controller has access only to an observation process. The objective is to design a controller that balances the $H_2$ performance criterion with the $H_\infty$ robustness requirement under worst-case disturbances, formulated as a nonzero-sum differential game. Using the Kalman filtering method, we derive the corresponding optimal filtering equation. Furthermore, a Stochastic Bounded Real Lemma under the partial observation framework is established, providing necessary and sufficient conditions for the $H_\infty$ robustness constraint. We also show the connection between the existence of a Nash equilibrium and the solvability of the cross-coupled Riccati equations, and illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach through a numerical example involving an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV).

ai.tldr: 研究了部分观测下线性随机微分系统的H2/H∞控制问题，通过非零和微分博弈平衡H2性能与H∞鲁棒性，并利用卡尔曼滤波和耦合Riccati方程求解。
ai.motivation: 现有研究假设状态完全可观测，但实际中控制器只能获取部分观测信息，因此需要针对部分观测情形设计兼顾性能与鲁棒性的控制器。
ai.method: 将问题建模为非零和微分博弈，采用卡尔曼滤波方法推导最优滤波方程，建立部分观测框架下的随机有界实引理，并通过交叉耦合Riccati方程刻画纳什均衡的存在性。
ai.result: 给出了H∞鲁棒约束的充要条件，证明了纳什均衡与耦合Riccati方程可解性的联系，并通过无人机数值算例验证了方法的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 为部分观测随机系统的鲁棒控制设计提供了理论框架和求解方法，可应用于无人机等实际系统的控制器设计。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将H2/H∞控制与自适应滤波结合，在线调整滤波器参数以应对时变扰动。
idea_spark.risk: 耦合Riccati方程的求解可能面临高维数值困难，且实际系统中模型不确定性可能影响鲁棒性保证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从无人机应用出发，可探索多智能体协同控制中的部分观测H2/H∞问题。

idea_spark.risk: 耦合Riccati方程的求解可能面临高维数值困难，且实际系统中模型不确定性可能影响鲁棒性保证。

en.tldr: This paper studies H2/H∞ control for linear stochastic differential systems under partial observation, using a nonzero-sum differential game to balance H2 performance and H∞ robustness, solved via Kalman filtering and coupled Riccati equations.
en.motivation: Existing studies assume full state accessibility, but in practice controllers only have access to partial observations, necessitating a controller that balances performance and robustness under such constraints.
en.method: The problem is formulated as a nonzero-sum differential game, the optimal filtering equation is derived via Kalman filtering, a Stochastic Bounded Real Lemma is established under partial observation, and the existence of a Nash equilibrium is linked to solvability of cross-coupled Riccati equations.
en.result: Necessary and sufficient conditions for the H∞ robustness constraint are provided, the connection between Nash equilibrium and coupled Riccati equations is shown, and a numerical example with a UAV demonstrates effectiveness.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework and solution method for robust control of partially observed stochastic systems, applicable to controller design in real-world systems like UAVs.

idea_spark.idea: Consider integrating H2/H∞ control with adaptive filtering to adjust filter parameters online for time-varying disturbances.
idea_spark.risk: Solving coupled Riccati equations may face high-dimensional numerical difficulties, and model uncertainties in practice could compromise robustness guarantees.
idea_spark.inspiration: From the UAV application, explore multi-agent cooperative control with partial observation H2/H∞ problems.

papers.title: A Convexified Eulerian Framework for Scalable Coordination of Massive DER Populations
papers.summary: This paper proposes a scalable coordination framework with aggregator-side privacy protection for storage-like distributed energy resources (DERs). The framework adopts a two-layer architecture. At the macroscopic layer, building upon an \emph{Eulerian} modeling perspective, the DER population is represented as a continuum whose density evolution is governed by a partial differential equation (PDE), such that the computational complexity is independent of the population size. To address the bilinear non-convexity in this PDE-constrained optimization problem, we develop a convexification method that combines finite-volume discretization with a flux-lifting technique, reformulating the macroscopic problem into a sparse linear program (LP). The LP solution yields a unified, state-dependent broadcast signal for population coordination. Furthermore, a Wasserstein-based relaxation is introduced to replace rigid cyclic constraints and provide additional operational flexibility for improved economic performance. At the microscopic layer, individual resources autonomously recover local setpoints from the broadcast signal and their local states, while an upstream data-mixing protocol aggregates individual states into a macroscopic density histogram without exposing raw individual states to the aggregator. Numerical studies validate the scalability, feasibility, and economic effectiveness of the proposed framework.

ai.tldr: 提出一种可扩展的分布式储能资源协调框架，通过欧拉连续体建模和凸化方法实现计算复杂度与种群规模无关，并保护聚合器侧隐私。
ai.motivation: 大规模分布式储能资源的协调面临计算复杂度和隐私保护的双重挑战。
ai.method: 采用两层架构：宏观层基于欧拉视角将DER种群建模为连续体，通过有限体积离散和通量提升技术将双线性非凸问题转化为稀疏线性规划；微观层通过数据混合协议实现隐私保护。
ai.result: 数值验证表明框架具有可扩展性、可行性和经济有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何在大规模DER协调中平衡计算效率与隐私保护。

idea_spark.idea: 将Wasserstein松弛用于替代刚性循环约束，增加操作灵活性。
idea_spark.risk: 连续体近似可能忽略个体异质性，影响实际应用精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴流体力学中的欧拉描述，将离散资源视为连续介质，启发大规模系统建模新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes a scalable coordination framework for massive storage-like DERs with aggregator-side privacy protection, using Eulerian continuum modeling and convexification to achieve population-size-independent complexity.
en.motivation: Scalable coordination and privacy protection are critical challenges for massive distributed energy resources.
en.method: A two-layer architecture: macroscopic layer models DER population as a continuum via Eulerian perspective, convexifies the bilinear non-convex PDE-constrained problem into a sparse LP using finite-volume discretization and flux-lifting; microscopic layer uses a data-mixing protocol for privacy.
en.result: Numerical studies validate scalability, feasibility, and economic effectiveness.
en.help_to_user: Provides insights into balancing computational efficiency and privacy in large-scale DER coordination.

idea_spark.idea: Using Wasserstein relaxation to replace rigid cyclic constraints for enhanced operational flexibility.
idea_spark.risk: Continuum approximation may overlook individual heterogeneity, affecting accuracy in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrowing Eulerian description from fluid dynamics to model discrete resources as a continuum inspires new approaches for large-scale system modeling.

papers.title: Inhomogeneous parabolic equations with Hardy potential and memory on the Heisenberg group
papers.summary: We study a class of inhomogeneous parabolic equations on the Heisenberg group $\mathbbm{H}^N$ with Hardy-type singular potentials, nonlocal memory terms, and a space-time forcing term:   \begin{align}   \partial_tu-Δ_{H}u=λ\frac{ψu}{\|\cdot\|^{2}_{H}}+\frac{1}{Γ(γ)}\int_0^t(t-τ)^{γ-1}|u(τ)|^{p}dτ+t^αf \text{ in } \,\mathbbm{H}^N\times (0,T).   \end{align}   Here, $γ\in [0,1),$ $α\in (-1,\infty),$ $p>1,$ $λ>0,$ and $ψ(\cdot)=|\nabla_{H}\|\cdot\|_{H}|^2,$ where $\nabla_H$ is the horizontal gradient associated to $Δ_H.$ Also, $\|\cdot\|_{H}$ and $Δ_{H}$ denote the Korányi norm and sub-Laplacian associated with the sub-Riemannian geometry of $\mathbbm{H}^N,$ respectively. The combination of a singular Hardy potential and a memory kernel introduces significant analytical challenges. Using a Harnack-type inequality adapted to the Heisenberg group setting, we obtain quantitative positivity estimates that enable a detailed blow-up analysis. We identify parameter regimes depending on $p,γ,α$ leading to finite-time blow-up or instantaneous blow-up, and establish local well-posedness in the absence of the Hardy potential. These results reveal an interplay between the spatial singularity, temporal nonlocality and a time-dependent forcing term. Finally, under a suitable lower bound on the forcing term $f,$ we derive an explicit lifespan estimate for local-in-time solutions.

ai.tldr: 研究了海森堡群上带有Hardy型奇异势、非局部记忆项和时空强迫项的非齐次抛物方程，利用Harnack不等式分析了有限时间爆破和瞬时爆破的条件，并给出了解的寿命估计。
ai.motivation: 探索空间奇异性、时间非局部性和时变强迫项之间的相互作用，填补海森堡群上此类复杂抛物方程理论分析的空白。
ai.method: 采用适用于海森堡群的Harnack型不等式获得定量正性估计，结合参数分类讨论进行爆破分析。
ai.result: 确定了依赖于参数p,γ,α的有限时间爆破和瞬时爆破条件；在无Hardy势时建立了局部适定性；在强迫项满足下界时给出了显式寿命估计。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究海森堡群上带奇异势和记忆项的抛物方程提供了理论框架和爆破判据。

idea_spark.idea: 将记忆核与Hardy势的组合推广到更一般的退化椭圆或抛物系统，例如p-Laplace型方程。
idea_spark.risk: 记忆项的非局部性可能导致解的正则性分析更加复杂，需要更精细的泛函不等式。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受物理中记忆效应（如粘弹性）和奇异势（如量子力学）耦合的启发，探索数学理论中的新现象。

en.tldr: We study inhomogeneous parabolic equations on the Heisenberg group with Hardy-type singular potentials, nonlocal memory terms, and a space-time forcing term. Using a Harnack inequality adapted to the Heisenberg group, we obtain positivity estimates and identify parameter regimes leading to finite-time or instantaneous blow-up, and derive explicit lifespan estimates.
en.motivation: To understand the interplay between spatial singularity, temporal nonlocality, and time-dependent forcing in the Heisenberg group setting, which is less explored for such complex parabolic equations.
en.method: A Harnack-type inequality tailored to the Heisenberg group is employed to derive quantitative positivity estimates, followed by a parameter-dependent blow-up analysis.
en.result: Conditions for finite-time and instantaneous blow-up are identified in terms of parameters p, γ, α; local well-posedness is established without the Hardy potential; an explicit lifespan estimate is given under a lower bound on the forcing term.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework and blow-up criteria for parabolic equations with singular potentials and memory on the Heisenberg group.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the combination of memory kernel and Hardy potential to more general degenerate elliptic or parabolic systems, such as p-Laplace type equations.
idea_spark.risk: The nonlocal memory term may complicate regularity analysis, requiring more refined functional inequalities.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by physical phenomena involving memory effects (e.g., viscoelasticity) and singular potentials (e.g., quantum mechanics), we explore new mathematical phenomena.

papers.title: Graphon Limits of Graph Reaction--Diffusion Equations
papers.summary: A graph reaction--diffusion (RD) equation is a system of differential equations that is defined on the nodes of a graph. Consider a sequence of growing graphs that converges in cut norm to a limiting graphon. We show that the solutions of the sequence of graph RD equations converge in $L^p$ norm, for $p \in [1,\infty]$, to the solution of a limiting nonlocal RD equation, which we call a graphon RD equation. Furthermore, we show a large numbers result for a stochastic particle process that consists of a random walk and a birth-death process on graphs. For a sequence of graphs that converge in cut norm to a limiting graphon, the sequence of stochastic processes converges in probability to the solution of the graphon RD equation.

ai.tldr: 研究图反应-扩散方程在图序列收敛到图极限时的解收敛性，并证明随机粒子过程的大数定律。
ai.motivation: 将图反应-扩散方程推广到图极限情形，建立离散图模型与连续极限模型之间的理论联系。
ai.method: 利用割范数收敛性，证明图RD方程的解在L^p范数下收敛到非局部图极限RD方程的解；对随机游走与生灭过程构成的随机粒子过程证明依概率收敛。
ai.result: 图序列在割范数下收敛到图极限时，对应的图RD方程解收敛到图极限RD方程解；随机粒子过程也收敛到同一极限方程的解。
ai.help_to_user: 为分析大规模网络上的反应-扩散系统提供极限理论工具，简化复杂网络动力学的研究。

idea_spark.idea: 利用图极限理论，将离散网络上的随机过程（如随机游走）的极限行为与连续非局部方程联系起来。
idea_spark.risk: 图序列的割范数收敛性假设可能对某些实际网络不成立，需验证适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将图极限思想用于设计网络上的近似算法或降阶模型。

en.tldr: Studies the convergence of solutions of graph reaction-diffusion equations as graphs converge to a graphon, and proves a law of large numbers for a stochastic particle process.
en.motivation: Extend graph reaction-diffusion equations to the graphon limit, establishing theoretical connections between discrete graph models and continuous limit models.
en.method: Using cut norm convergence, prove that solutions of graph RD equations converge in L^p norm to the solution of a nonlocal graphon RD equation; prove convergence in probability for a stochastic process consisting of random walk and birth-death processes.
en.result: When a sequence of graphs converges in cut norm to a graphon, the corresponding graph RD equation solutions converge to the graphon RD equation solution; the stochastic particle process also converges to the same limit equation solution.
en.help_to_user: Provides a limit theory tool for analyzing reaction-diffusion systems on large networks, simplifying the study of network dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Use graphon theory to connect the limiting behavior of stochastic processes (e.g., random walks) on discrete networks with continuous nonlocal equations.
idea_spark.risk: The cut norm convergence assumption may not hold for some real-world networks; applicability needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the use of graphon ideas to design approximate algorithms or reduced-order models on networks.

papers.title: Existence and uniqueness for singular stochastic differential equations with piecewise well-behaved coefficients
papers.summary: We study existence and uniqueness for one-dimensional generalized stochastic differential equations with singular coefficients, including distributional drift and degenerate, possibly discontinuous, diffusion coefficients. Such singularities naturally encode changes in the dynamics at thresholds, including reflecting, skew, or sticky interface behavior.   We develop two directions. We provide sufficient conditions for pathwise uniqueness, under weak existence and uniqueness in law, without assuming uniform ellipticity or continuity of the diffusion coefficient. We also investigate a pasting approach for generalized stochastic differential equations that transfers strong existence and pathwise uniqueness, as well as weak existence and uniqueness in law, from local component equations to a global solution. To the best of our knowledge, this provides the first explicit pasting theorem yielding pathwise uniqueness in the setting of generalized stochastic differential equations.   As an application, we establish the first existence and uniqueness results for a class of skew sticky threshold Cox-Ingersoll-Ross-type diffusions, including the threshold Chan-Karolyi-Longstaff-Sanders process.

ai.tldr: 研究了一类具有分段良好行为系数的一维奇异随机微分方程的存在唯一性，包括分布漂移和退化扩散系数，并首次给出了广义随机微分方程中路径唯一性的粘贴定理。
ai.motivation: 现有理论对具有奇异系数（如分布漂移、退化或不连续扩散）的随机微分方程缺乏统一的路径唯一性条件，且缺乏将局部解粘贴为全局解的有效方法。
ai.method: 通过建立路径唯一性的充分条件（无需均匀椭圆性或扩散系数连续性），并发展广义随机微分方程的粘贴方法，将局部强存在性和路径唯一性、弱存在性和分布唯一性传递到全局解。
ai.result: 首次给出了广义随机微分方程中路径唯一性的粘贴定理，并应用于一类偏斜粘性阈值Cox-Ingersoll-Ross型扩散（包括阈值Chan-Karolyi-Longstaff-Sanders过程），建立了存在唯一性结果。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理具有阈值、反射、偏斜或粘性界面行为的随机系统提供了理论工具，可用于金融、物理等领域的奇异扩散建模。

idea_spark.idea: 将局部解粘贴为全局解的方法可应用于其他具有分段定义动力学的随机系统，如切换扩散或带边界条件的随机过程。
idea_spark.risk: 粘贴定理依赖于局部解的唯一性假设，若局部解不唯一或粘贴条件不满足，全局解可能不存在或非唯一。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受偏斜粘性阈值CIR型扩散的应用启发，可进一步研究金融中利率模型或生物群体动力学中的阈值行为。

idea_spark.idea: 将局部解粘贴为全局解的方法可应用于其他具有分段定义动力学的随机系统，如切换扩散或带边界条件的随机过程。

en.tldr: Studies existence and uniqueness for one-dimensional singular stochastic differential equations with piecewise well-behaved coefficients, including distributional drift and degenerate diffusion, and provides the first pasting theorem yielding pathwise uniqueness for generalized SDEs.
en.motivation: Existing theory lacks unified pathwise uniqueness conditions for SDEs with singular coefficients (e.g., distributional drift, degenerate or discontinuous diffusion) and effective methods to paste local solutions into a global one.
en.method: Establishes sufficient conditions for pathwise uniqueness without uniform ellipticity or continuity of the diffusion coefficient, and develops a pasting approach for generalized SDEs that transfers strong existence and pathwise uniqueness, as well as weak existence and uniqueness in law, from local component equations to a global solution.
en.result: Provides the first explicit pasting theorem yielding pathwise uniqueness in the setting of generalized SDEs, and applies it to a class of skew sticky threshold Cox-Ingersoll-Ross-type diffusions, including the threshold Chan-Karolyi-Longstaff-Sanders process, establishing existence and uniqueness results.
en.help_to_user: Offers theoretical tools for modeling stochastic systems with threshold, reflecting, skew, or sticky interface behavior, applicable in finance, physics, and other fields involving singular diffusion.

idea_spark.idea: The method of pasting local solutions into a global one can be applied to other stochastic systems with piecewise-defined dynamics, such as switching diffusions or processes with boundary conditions.
idea_spark.risk: The pasting theorem relies on uniqueness assumptions for local solutions; if local solutions are not unique or pasting conditions fail, global solutions may not exist or be non-unique.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the application to skew sticky threshold CIR-type diffusions, further research could explore threshold behavior in financial interest rate models or biological population dynamics.

papers.title: VFM$^{4}$SDG: Unveiling the Power of VFMs for Single-Domain Generalized Object Detection
papers.summary: In real-world scenarios, continual changes in weather, illumination, and imaging conditions cause significant domain shifts, leading detectors trained on a single source domain to degrade severely in unseen environments. Existing single-domain generalized object detection (SDGOD) methods mainly rely on data augmentation or domain-invariant representation learning, but pay limited attention to detector mechanisms, leaving clear limitations under complex domain shifts. Through analytical experiments, we find that performance degradation is dominated by increasing missed detections, which fundamentally arises from reduced cross-domain stability of the detector: object-background and inter-instance relations become less stable in the encoding stage, while semantic-spatial alignment of query representations also becomes harder to maintain in the decoding stage. To this end, we propose VFM$^{4}$SDG, a dual-prior learning framework for SDGOD, which introduces a frozen vision foundation model (VFM) as a transferable cross-domain stability prior into detector representation learning and query modeling. In the encoding stage, we propose Cross-domain Stable Relational Prior Distillation to enhance the robustness of object-background and inter-instance relational modeling. In the decoding stage, we propose Semantic-Contextual Prior-based Query Enhancement, which injects category-level semantic prototypes and global visual context into queries to improve their semantic recognition and spatial localization stability in unseen domains. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method consistently outperforms existing SOTA methods on standard SDGOD benchmarks and two mainstream DETR-based detectors, demonstrating its effectiveness, robustness, and generality.

ai.tldr: 提出VFM⁴SDG框架，利用冻结的视觉基础模型作为跨域稳定性先验，通过关系蒸馏和语义-上下文查询增强，显著提升单域泛化目标检测在复杂域偏移下的性能。
ai.motivation: 现有单域泛化目标检测方法主要依赖数据增强或域不变表示学习，忽视了检测器机制，在复杂域偏移下漏检严重，根本原因是编码阶段目标-背景和实例间关系不稳定，解码阶段查询的语义-空间对齐困难。
ai.method: 提出双先验学习框架：编码阶段采用跨域稳定关系先验蒸馏，增强关系建模鲁棒性；解码阶段采用语义-上下文先验查询增强，注入类别级语义原型和全局视觉上下文，提升查询的语义识别和空间定位稳定性。
ai.result: 在标准SDGOD基准和两种主流DETR检测器上，一致超越现有最先进方法，验证了有效性、鲁棒性和通用性。
ai.help_to_user: 如果你需要处理目标检测在未知环境（如天气、光照变化）下的泛化问题，本方法提供了基于视觉基础模型先验的实用解决方案。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将关系蒸馏和语义-上下文查询增强结合到更轻量的检测器中，或用于在线适应场景。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖大型视觉基础模型可能带来计算开销；冻结先验可能限制对极端域偏移的适应能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从检测器内部机制（编码关系稳定性、解码查询对齐）入手解决域偏移，而非仅关注数据或表示层面。

zh.tldr: 提出VFM⁴SDG框架，利用冻结的视觉基础模型作为跨域稳定性先验，通过关系蒸馏和语义-上下文查询增强，显著提升单域泛化目标检测在复杂域偏移下的性能。
zh.motivation: 现有单域泛化目标检测方法主要依赖数据增强或域不变表示学习，忽视了检测器机制，在复杂域偏移下漏检严重，根本原因是编码阶段目标-背景和实例间关系不稳定，解码阶段查询的语义-空间对齐困难。
zh.method: 提出双先验学习框架：编码阶段采用跨域稳定关系先验蒸馏，增强关系建模鲁棒性；解码阶段采用语义-上下文先验查询增强，注入类别级语义原型和全局视觉上下文，提升查询的语义识别和空间定位稳定性。
zh.result: 在标准SDGOD基准和两种主流DETR检测器上，一致超越现有最先进方法，验证了有效性、鲁棒性和通用性。
zh.help_to_user: 如果你需要处理目标检测在未知环境（如天气、光照变化）下的泛化问题，本方法提供了基于视觉基础模型先验的实用解决方案。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将关系蒸馏和语义-上下文查询增强结合到更轻量的检测器中，或用于在线适应场景。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖大型视觉基础模型可能带来计算开销；冻结先验可能限制对极端域偏移的适应能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从检测器内部机制（编码关系稳定性、解码查询对齐）入手解决域偏移，而非仅关注数据或表示层面。

en.tldr: Proposes VFM⁴SDG, a dual-prior learning framework that leverages a frozen vision foundation model as a cross-domain stability prior via relational distillation and semantic-contextual query enhancement, significantly improving single-domain generalized object detection under complex domain shifts.
en.motivation: Existing SDGOD methods rely on data augmentation or domain-invariant representation learning but overlook detector mechanisms, leading to severe missed detections under complex domain shifts due to unstable object-background and inter-instance relations in encoding and degraded semantic-spatial alignment in decoding.
en.method: A dual-prior framework: in encoding, Cross-domain Stable Relational Prior Distillation enhances robustness of relational modeling; in decoding, Semantic-Contextual Prior-based Query Enhancement injects category-level semantic prototypes and global visual context to improve query stability.
en.result: Consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods on standard SDGOD benchmarks with two mainstream DETR-based detectors, demonstrating effectiveness, robustness, and generality.
en.help_to_user: If you need to handle object detection generalization under unseen environments (e.g., weather, illumination changes), this method provides a practical solution using vision foundation model priors.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining relational distillation and semantic-contextual query enhancement in lighter detectors or for online adaptation scenarios.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on large VFMs may incur computational overhead; frozen priors might limit adaptation to extreme domain shifts.
idea_spark.inspiration: Addressing domain shift from detector internal mechanisms (encoding relation stability, decoding query alignment) rather than only data or representation levels.

papers.title: Maximum principle and local stability for a class of coupled nonlinear thermo--reaction--phase systems
papers.summary: We study a nonlinear coupled system of partial differential equations arising from thermo--reaction--phase models. The system combines a heat diffusion equation, temperature-dependent chemical reactions of Arrhenius type, and a phase variable, and is formulated as a strongly coupled parabolic problem with homogeneous Neumann boundary conditions. We first establish a maximum principle ensuring the positivity of the temperature on a suitable time interval, as well as the invariance of the physically admissible domain. In particular, we prove that the internal variables remain in the interval [0,1]. We then analyse the asymptotic behaviour of the system in the free regime, that is, in the absence of external forcing. By introducing a relative energy functional and exploiting the structure of the coupling terms, we obtain local asymptotic stability of a homogeneous stationary state. The model belongs to a broader class of coupled diffusion--reaction--phase systems.

ai.tldr: 研究了一类耦合非线性热-反应-相系统的最大值原理和局部稳定性。
ai.motivation: 分析热-反应-相耦合系统的数学性质，确保物理合理性并理解其长期行为。
ai.method: 通过建立最大值原理证明温度正性和相变量在[0,1]内的不变性，并引入相对能量泛函分析局部渐近稳定性。
ai.result: 得到了温度在适当时间区间内的正性、物理允许域的不变性以及均匀稳态的局部渐近稳定性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了分析此类耦合系统稳定性和不变性的数学工具。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑外部强迫或非均匀边界条件下的全局稳定性分析。
idea_spark.risk: 非线性耦合项可能导致更复杂的动力学行为，如多稳态或振荡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可借鉴相场模型在材料科学中的应用，研究相变过程中的热-化学耦合效应。

en.tldr: Maximum principle and local stability are established for a class of coupled nonlinear thermo-reaction-phase systems.
en.motivation: To analyze the mathematical properties of thermo-reaction-phase coupled systems, ensuring physical admissibility and understanding long-term behavior.
en.method: A maximum principle is proved to guarantee positivity of temperature and invariance of the phase variable in [0,1]; local asymptotic stability of a homogeneous steady state is obtained via a relative energy functional.
en.result: Positivity of temperature on a suitable time interval, invariance of the physically admissible domain, and local asymptotic stability of the homogeneous steady state are established.
en.help_to_user: Provides mathematical tools for analyzing stability and invariance in such coupled systems.

idea_spark.idea: Consider global stability analysis under external forcing or non-homogeneous boundary conditions.
idea_spark.risk: Nonlinear coupling may lead to complex dynamics such as multistability or oscillations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Phase-field models in materials science could inspire studies of thermo-chemical coupling during phase transitions.

papers.title: Efficient generation of expected-degree graphs via edge-arrivals
papers.summary: We study the efficient generation of random graphs with a prescribed expected degree sequence, focusing on rank-1 inhomogeneous models in which vertices are assigned weights and edges are drawn independently with probabilities proportional to the product of endpoint weights. We adopt a temporal viewpoint, adding edges to the graph one at a time up to a fixed time horizon, and allowing for self-loops or duplicate edges in the first stage. Then, the simple projection of the resulting multigraph recovers exactly the simple Norros--Reittu random graph, whose expected degrees match the prescribed targets under mild conditions. Building on this representation, we develop an exact generator based on \textit{edge-arrivals} for expected-degree random graphs with running time $O(n+m)$, where $m$ is the number of generated edges, and hence proportional to the output size. This removes the typical vertex sorting used by widely-used fast generator algorithms based on \textit{edge-skipping} for rank-1 expected-degree models, which leads to a total running time of $O(n \log n + m)$. In addition, our algorithm is simpler than those in the literature, easy to implement, and very flexible, thus opening up to extensions to directed and temporal random graphs, generalization to higher-order structures, and improvements through parallelization.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于边到达的算法，能在O(n+m)时间内生成期望度序列随机图，无需顶点排序。
ai.motivation: 现有快速生成算法（如边跳过）需要O(n log n + m)时间，且依赖顶点排序，效率受限。
ai.method: 采用时间视角，逐步添加边（允许自环和重复边），然后简单投影得到Norros-Reittu随机图。
ai.result: 新算法运行时间O(n+m)，与输出规模成正比，且更简单、灵活。
ai.help_to_user: 若需高效生成大规模期望度随机图，此算法可显著加速。

idea_spark.idea: 利用边到达过程替代顶点排序，简化生成逻辑。
idea_spark.risk: 投影步骤可能引入额外开销，需验证实际性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将静态图生成转化为动态过程，启发其他图模型的高效采样。

en.tldr: Proposes an edge-arrival algorithm that generates expected-degree random graphs in O(n+m) time, eliminating vertex sorting.
en.motivation: Existing fast generators (e.g., edge-skipping) require O(n log n + m) time and rely on vertex sorting, limiting efficiency.
en.method: Adopts a temporal viewpoint, adding edges one by one (allowing self-loops and duplicates), then projects to obtain the Norros-Reittu random graph.
en.result: The new algorithm runs in O(n+m) time, proportional to output size, and is simpler and more flexible.
en.help_to_user: For efficient generation of large-scale expected-degree random graphs, this algorithm offers significant speedup.

idea_spark.idea: Replace vertex sorting with an edge-arrival process to simplify generation logic.
idea_spark.risk: The projection step may introduce overhead; actual performance needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Transforming static graph generation into a dynamic process inspires efficient sampling for other graph models.

papers.title: Long-time dynamics of stochastic 2D hydrodynamic-type evolution equations driven by multiplicative Lévy noise
papers.summary: This paper investigates the long-time dynamics of solutions for an abstract nonlinear stochastic hydrodynamic-type equation driven by multiplicative Lévy noise. The framework encompasses several key hydrodynamical models, including the stochastic 2D Navier-Stokes equations, magnetohydrodynamic equations, the magnetic Bérnard problem, as well as various stochastic shell models of turbulence. Under the assumption that the nonlinear noise coefficients satisfy local Lipschitz and linear growth conditions, we first establish global well-posedness using a truncation technique. Then, by introducing a mean random dynamical system, we prove the existence and uniqueness of weak pullback mean random attractors for the system. Furthermore, when the external force is time-independent, we study the existence of invariant measures for the corresponding autonomous system, as well as the double limiting behavior of invariant measures with respect to the intensities of Gaussian and Lévy noise. Finally, under additional assumptions on the bilinear nonlinear term (e.g., as in the Navier-Stokes equations), we examine the existence and uniqueness of pullback measure attractors, along with the asymptotically autonomous stability of such attractors as the time parameter tends to negative infinity. It is worth noting that the results of this paper are new even for the single stochastic 2D Navier-Stokes equations.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了由乘性Lévy噪声驱动的抽象非线性随机流体动力学型方程的长时间动力学，涵盖2D Navier-Stokes方程等多种模型，建立了全局适定性、弱拉回均值随机吸引子、不变测度及拉回测度吸引子的存在唯一性。
ai.motivation: 理解随机流体动力学模型在乘性Lévy噪声下的长期行为，为湍流等复杂现象提供数学基础。
ai.method: 采用截断技术证明全局适定性；引入均值随机动力系统证明弱拉回均值随机吸引子；利用不变测度理论分析双极限行为；对双线性非线性项附加假设后研究拉回测度吸引子及其渐近自治稳定性。
ai.result: 建立了全局适定性；证明了弱拉回均值随机吸引子的存在唯一性；得到了不变测度的存在性及其关于高斯和Lévy噪声强度的双极限行为；在Navier-Stokes方程等情形下证明了拉回测度吸引子的存在唯一性和渐近自治稳定性。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究随机流体动力学方程的长期行为提供了统一的数学框架和分析工具，尤其适用于含乘性Lévy噪声的系统。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将均值随机动力系统与测度吸引子理论结合，用于分析气候模型或海洋动力学中的随机效应。
idea_spark.risk: 理论假设（如局部Lipschitz和线性增长条件）可能限制实际应用；数值验证复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于随机Navier-Stokes方程与湍流模型的联系，可探索将类似方法用于机器学习驱动的随机偏微分方程求解器。

en.tldr: This paper studies the long-time dynamics of an abstract nonlinear stochastic hydrodynamic-type equation driven by multiplicative Lévy noise, covering models like 2D Navier-Stokes equations, and establishes global well-posedness, weak pullback mean random attractors, invariant measures, and pullback measure attractors.
en.motivation: To understand the long-term behavior of stochastic hydrodynamic models under multiplicative Lévy noise, providing a mathematical foundation for complex phenomena such as turbulence.
en.method: Global well-posedness via truncation; mean random dynamical system for weak pullback mean random attractors; invariant measure theory for double limiting behavior; additional assumptions on bilinear nonlinear term for pullback measure attractors and asymptotic autonomous stability.
en.result: Global well-posedness; existence and uniqueness of weak pullback mean random attractors; existence of invariant measures and their double limiting behavior with respect to Gaussian and Lévy noise intensities; existence and uniqueness of pullback measure attractors and asymptotic autonomous stability for cases like Navier-Stokes equations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified mathematical framework and analytical tools for studying the long-time dynamics of stochastic hydrodynamic equations, especially those driven by multiplicative Lévy noise.

idea_spark.idea: Combine mean random dynamical systems with measure attractor theory to analyze stochastic effects in climate models or ocean dynamics.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical assumptions (e.g., local Lipschitz and linear growth) may limit practical applications; numerical verification is challenging.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the connection between stochastic Navier-Stokes equations and turbulence models, similar methods could be applied to machine learning-driven solvers for stochastic PDEs.

papers.title: On the dynamic behavior of the network SIRS epidemic model
papers.summary: We study the Suscectible-Infected-Recovered-Susceptible (SIRS) epidemic model on deterministic networks. For connected but otherwise general interaction patterns and heterogeneous recovery and loss-of-immunity rates, we identify a fundamental parameter R_0 (the basic reproduction number), which fully characterizes the qualitative dynamic behavior of the system. This parameter is the dominant eigenvalue of a rescaled version of the interaction matrix, whose rows are normalized by the corresponding recovery rates. We prove that a transcritical bifurcation occurs as R_0 crosses the threshold value 1. Specifically, we show that, if R_0 does not exceed 1, then the disease-free equilibrium is globally asymptotically stable, whereas, if R_0 is larger than 1, then the disease-free equilibrium is unstable and there exists a unique endemic equilibrium, which is asymptotically stable. As a byproduct of our analysis, we also identify key monotonicity properties of the dependence of the endemic equilibrium on the model parameters (the interaction matrix as well as the recovery rates and the loss-of-immunity rates) and obtain a distributed iterative algorithm for its computation, with provable convergence guarantees. Our results extend existing ones available in the literature for network SIRS epidemic models with rank-one interaction matrices and homogeneous recovery rates (including the single homogeneous population SIRS epidemic model).

ai.tldr: 研究了确定性网络上SIRS流行病模型的动态行为，确定了基本再生数R0，并证明了当R0跨过阈值1时发生跨临界分岔。
ai.motivation: 现有网络SIRS模型多假设秩一交互矩阵和同质恢复率，缺乏对一般网络和异质参数下动态行为的完整刻画。
ai.method: 通过重新缩放交互矩阵的特征值定义R0，利用稳定性分析和分岔理论证明全局渐近稳定性。
ai.result: R0≤1时无病平衡点全局渐近稳定；R0>1时存在唯一且渐近稳定的地方病平衡点；并给出迭代算法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解异质网络中传染病传播的阈值条件和长期行为，可用于预测和控制策略设计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用R0的特征值定义和迭代算法，可设计分布式监测与干预策略。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设网络结构固定且参数已知，实际应用中参数估计和网络动态变化可能带来偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将恢复率和免疫丧失率纳入交互矩阵的重新缩放，为处理异质参数提供了新思路。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将恢复率和免疫丧失率纳入交互矩阵的重新缩放，为处理异质参数提供了新思路。

en.tldr: We study the SIRS epidemic model on deterministic networks, identify the basic reproduction number R0, and prove a transcritical bifurcation as R0 crosses 1.
en.motivation: Existing network SIRS models often assume rank-one interaction matrices and homogeneous recovery rates, lacking a complete characterization for general networks and heterogeneous parameters.
en.method: Define R0 as the dominant eigenvalue of a rescaled interaction matrix; use stability analysis and bifurcation theory to prove global asymptotic stability.
en.result: If R0 ≤ 1, the disease-free equilibrium is globally asymptotically stable; if R0 > 1, there exists a unique and asymptotically stable endemic equilibrium; a distributed iterative algorithm is provided.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand threshold conditions and long-term behavior of epidemic spread on heterogeneous networks, aiding prediction and control strategy design.

idea_spark.idea: Using the eigenvalue definition of R0 and the iterative algorithm, one can design distributed monitoring and intervention strategies.
idea_spark.risk: The model assumes fixed network structure and known parameters; in practice, parameter estimation and network dynamics may introduce biases.
idea_spark.inspiration: Incorporating recovery and loss-of-immunity rates into the rescaling of the interaction matrix provides a new approach for handling heterogeneous parameters.

papers.title: Temporal decay estimates for global solutions of the Navier-Stokes equations with the Coriolis force
papers.summary: We consider temporal decay estimates for global solutions of the Navier-Stokes equations with the Coriolis force. We show that under several conditions including the smallness of the initial data, the solution decays as fast as the corresponding linearized solutions, and its decay rate is higher than expected from the flow of the heat equation. The estimates are derived for all $L^p$-norms with $p\in[2, \infty].$

ai.tldr: 研究了带有科里奥利力的纳维-斯托克斯方程全局解的时间衰减估计，证明在初始数据小等条件下，解的衰减速度与线性化解相当，且高于热方程预期。
ai.motivation: 理解旋转流体中解的长时间行为，特别是科里奥利力对衰减速率的影响。
ai.method: 通过分析线性化系统并结合小初始数据条件，推导所有Lp范数（p∈[2,∞]）的衰减估计。
ai.result: 解的衰减速率与线性化解一致，且比热方程流更快。

en.tldr: Temporal decay estimates for global solutions of the Navier-Stokes equations with the Coriolis force show that under small initial data, the solution decays as fast as linearized solutions and faster than the heat equation flow.
en.motivation: To understand the long-time behavior of solutions in rotating fluids, specifically the effect of the Coriolis force on decay rates.
en.method: Analysis of the linearized system combined with small initial data conditions to derive decay estimates for all Lp-norms (p∈[2,∞]).
en.result: The decay rate matches that of linearized solutions and is faster than the heat equation flow.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous mathematical estimates for solution decay in rotating fluid dynamics, useful for validating numerical simulations or simplified models.

idea_spark.idea: Explore whether the Coriolis force can accelerate decay under more general initial conditions or interact with viscosity to produce new phenomena.
idea_spark.risk: The small initial data condition may limit practical applications; behavior under large initial data needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine with numerical experiments to study the effect of the Coriolis force on turbulent decay.

papers.title: TRAVELFRAUDBENCH: A Configurable Evaluation Framework for GNN Fraud Ring Detection in Travel Networks
papers.summary: We introduce TravelFraudBench (TFG), a configurable benchmark for evaluating graph neural networks (GNNs) on fraud ring detection in travel platform graphs. Existing benchmarks--YelpChi, Amazon-Fraud, Elliptic, PaySim--cover single node types or domain-generic patterns with no mechanism to evaluate across structurally distinct fraud ring topologies. TFG simulates three travel-specific ring types--ticketing fraud (star topology with shared device/IP clusters), ghost hotel schemes (reviewer x hotel bipartite cliques), and account takeover rings (loyalty transfer chains)--in a heterogeneous graph with 9 node types and 12 edge types. Ring size, count, fraud rate, scale (500 to 200,000 nodes), and composition are fully configurable. We evaluate six methods--MLP, GraphSAGE, RGCN-proj, HAN, RGCN, and PC-GNN--under a ring-based split where each ring appears entirely in one partition, eliminating transductive label leakage. GraphSAGE achieves AUC=0.992 and RGCN-proj AUC=0.987, outperforming the MLP baseline (AUC=0.938) by 5.5 and 5.0 pp, confirming graph structure adds substantial discriminative power. HAN (AUC=0.935) is a negative result, matching the MLP baseline. On the ring recovery task (>=80% of ring members flagged simultaneously), GraphSAGE achieves 100% recovery across all ring types; MLP recovers only 17-88%. The edge-type ablation shows device and IP co-occurrence are the primary signals: removing uses_device drops AUC by 5.2 pp. TFG is released as an open-source Python package (MIT license) with PyG, DGL, and NetworkX exporters and pre-generated datasets at https://huggingface.co/datasets/bsajja7/travel-fraud-graphs, with Croissant metadata including Responsible AI fields.

papers.title: Shadow and percolation III: chemical distance in continuous landscapes with correlations
papers.summary: We study some geometric properties of the excursion set of a slope field alpha associated to a smooth, planar, centered, Gaussian field f. That, is we consider the set of all points such that the value of alpha is at most l where l is a real parameter called the level. We restrict our attention to the levels l that are supercritical. We show that for almost such l, in the sense of the Lebesgue measure, then with high probability the chemical distance between two points connected in the excursion set at level l is comparable to the usual Euclidean distance between those two points. This result is in the spirit of the Antal Pisztora theorem for Bernoulli percolation. However, many new difficulties arise such as the fact that alpha is a continuous field (not differentiable everywhere) with long range correlations and whose law is still not well understood.

ai.tldr: 研究了光滑高斯场斜率场超临界水平集的化学距离与欧氏距离的可比性。
ai.motivation: 将Antal Pisztora定理从伯努利渗流推广到具有长程相关性的连续场。
ai.method: 利用测度论和概率方法，对几乎所有的超临界水平证明化学距离与欧氏距离可比。
ai.result: 对于几乎所有的超临界水平，以高概率成立化学距离与欧氏距离可比。
ai.help_to_user: 为连续渗流模型中的几何性质分析提供理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用场的正则性和水平集的几何结构来建立距离可比性。
idea_spark.risk: 连续场的不可微性和长程相关性可能使证明复杂化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将离散渗流中的经典结果推广到连续场，启发新的渗流模型研究。

en.tldr: We study the chemical distance in supercritical excursion sets of a smooth planar Gaussian field's slope, showing it is comparable to Euclidean distance for almost all supercritical levels.
en.motivation: Extend the Antal Pisztora theorem from Bernoulli percolation to continuous fields with long-range correlations.
en.method: Using measure-theoretic and probabilistic arguments, we prove comparability for almost every supercritical level.
en.result: For almost every supercritical level, with high probability the chemical distance is comparable to Euclidean distance.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical foundation for geometric properties in continuous percolation models.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the regularity of the field and the geometric structure of level sets to establish distance comparability.
idea_spark.risk: Non-differentiability and long-range correlations of the continuous field may complicate the proof.
idea_spark.inspiration: Generalizing classical results from discrete percolation to continuous fields inspires new percolation model studies.

papers.title: Doubly Saturated Ramsey Graphs: A Case Study in Computer-Assisted Mathematical Discovery
papers.summary: Ramsey-good graphs are graphs that contain neither a clique of size $s$ nor an independent set of size $t$. We study doubly saturated Ramsey-good graphs, defined as Ramsey-good graphs in which the addition or removal of any edge necessarily creates an $s$-clique or a $t$-independent set. We present a method combining SAT solving with bespoke LLM-generated code to discover infinite families of such graphs, answering a question of Grinstead and Roberts from 1982. In addition, we use LLMs to generate and formalize correctness proofs in Lean. This case study highlights the potential of integrating automated reasoning, large language models, and formal verification to accelerate mathematical discovery. We argue that such tool-driven workflows will play an increasingly central role in experimental mathematics.

ai.tldr: 通过SAT求解与LLM生成代码相结合的方法，发现了无穷族双饱和Ramsey好图，并用Lean形式化验证了正确性，回答了1982年的开放问题。
ai.motivation: 寻找双饱和Ramsey好图的无穷族，解决Grinstead和Roberts在1982年提出的问题。
ai.method: 结合SAT求解器和LLM生成的代码来发现图结构，并使用LLM辅助在Lean中生成和形式化正确性证明。
ai.result: 成功发现了无穷族双饱和Ramsey好图，并完成了形式化验证。
ai.help_to_user: 展示了如何将自动推理、大语言模型和形式验证集成到数学发现中，为实验数学提供了可复用的工具驱动工作流。

idea_spark.idea: 利用LLM生成候选代码片段，再由SAT求解器验证，最后用Lean形式化证明，形成闭环。

en.tldr: By combining SAT solving with LLM-generated code, we discovered infinite families of doubly saturated Ramsey-good graphs and formalized correctness proofs in Lean, answering a 1982 open problem.
en.motivation: To find infinite families of doubly saturated Ramsey-good graphs, solving a question posed by Grinstead and Roberts in 1982.

en.result: Successfully discovered infinite families of doubly saturated Ramsey-good graphs and completed formal verification.
en.help_to_user: Demonstrates how automated reasoning, large language models, and formal verification can be integrated to accelerate mathematical discovery, providing a reusable tool-driven workflow for experimental mathematics.

idea_spark.inspiration: Using LLMs as 'code generators' rather than direct reasoners, in synergy with exact solvers, could become a new paradigm for mathematical discovery.

papers.title: Boxing inequalities for relative fractional perimeter and fractional Poincaré-type inequalities on John domains with the BBM factor
papers.summary: For $0<δ,τ<1$ and $1\le s\le \frac{n}{n-δ}$, we prove that for a given $s$-John domain   $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^n$, the following Boxing inequality holds for every Lebesgue measurable set $U\subsetΩ$ with $|U|/|Ω|\leγ<1$:   \[   \mathcal{H}^{s(n-δ)}_{\infty}(U\setminus\mathcal{N}_U)\le C(1-δ)\int_Ω\int_{|x-y|<τ\operatorname{dist}(y,\partialΩ)}\frac{|χ_U(x)-χ_U(y)|}{|x-y|^{n+δ}}\,dx\,dy,   \]   where $\mathcal{H}^{s(n-δ)}_{\infty}(U)$ denotes the $s(n-δ)$-dimensional Hausdorff content of $U$, $\mathcal{N}_U$ is a set of Lebesgue measure zero and the constant $C$ depends only on $n,τ,s,γ$, the John constant and the diameter of $Ω$. Moreover, we establish the functional formulation of the above Boxing inequality and discuss the equivalence between these two formulations. Based on the Boxing inequality, we prove the fractional Poincaré--Wirtinger trace inequality on $s$-John domains, of which the fractional Sobolev--Poincaré inequality and fractional Hardy-type inequality are special cases. Notably, we prove all of the aforementioned inequalities with the Bourgain--Brezis--Mironescu (BBM) factor $1-δ$. Furthermore, with the aid of the Bourgain--Brezis--Mironescu formula, we recover the Poincaré--Wirtinger trace inequality. Finally, by showing that, under the separation property, any domain supporting the Boxing inequality is necessarily a John domain, we conclude that the John domain condition is essentially sharp for the above inequalities. All the above inequalities with the BBM factor are new even for Lipschitz domains.

ai.tldr: 本文在s-John域上建立了带BBM因子的相对分数阶周长的Boxing不等式，并由此推导出分数阶Poincaré型不等式，证明了John域条件是这些不等式成立的本质条件。
ai.motivation: 将经典的Boxing不等式推广到分数阶情形，并引入BBM因子以得到更优的常数，同时刻画使不等式成立的域几何条件。
ai.method: 利用Hausdorff内容、分数阶周长和John域的定义，通过精细的几何测度论分析证明Boxing不等式，再通过函数化形式推导出各种分数阶Poincaré型不等式。
ai.result: 得到了带BBM因子的Boxing不等式、分数阶Poincaré-Wirtinger迹不等式、分数阶Sobolev-Poincaré不等式和分数阶Hardy型不等式，并证明了John域条件是这些不等式成立的充要条件。
ai.help_to_user: 为分数阶Sobolev空间中的不等式理论提供了新的工具和结果，有助于理解非局部算子在奇异域上的行为。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将BBM因子引入其他分数阶不等式（如分数阶Sobolev嵌入不等式）以改进常数。
idea_spark.risk: BBM因子的引入可能依赖于域的特殊几何结构，推广到更一般的域时可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用Hausdorff内容与分数阶周长的关系，可以探索其他几何量（如Minkowski内容）在不等式中的作用。

idea_spark.risk: BBM因子的引入可能依赖于域的特殊几何结构，推广到更一般的域时可能失效。

en.tldr: This paper establishes a Boxing inequality for relative fractional perimeter with the BBM factor on s-John domains, and derives fractional Poincaré-type inequalities, showing that the John domain condition is essentially sharp.
en.motivation: To extend the classical Boxing inequality to the fractional setting with the BBM factor for improved constants, and to characterize the geometric conditions on domains that support such inequalities.
en.method: Using Hausdorff content, fractional perimeter, and the definition of John domains, the Boxing inequality is proved via fine geometric measure theory, and then functional formulations yield various fractional Poincaré-type inequalities.
en.result: Boxing inequality, fractional Poincaré-Wirtinger trace inequality, fractional Sobolev-Poincaré inequality, and fractional Hardy-type inequality are obtained with the BBM factor, and the John domain condition is shown to be necessary and sufficient.
en.help_to_user: Provides new tools and results for inequalities in fractional Sobolev spaces, aiding understanding of nonlocal operators on singular domains.

idea_spark.idea: Try to introduce the BBM factor into other fractional inequalities (e.g., fractional Sobolev embedding inequalities) to improve constants.
idea_spark.risk: The BBM factor may rely on specific domain geometry and could fail for more general domains.
idea_spark.inspiration: The relationship between Hausdorff content and fractional perimeter suggests exploring other geometric quantities (e.g., Minkowski content) in inequalities.

papers.title: Yang-Baxter Integrability and Exceptional-Point Structure in Pseudo-Hermitian Quantum Impurity Systems
papers.summary: We develop a mathematically controlled framework for Yang--Baxter integrability in pseudo-Hermitian quantum impurity systems arising from periodic driving of a Dirac-like bath. The effective impurity Hamiltonian possesses a dynamically generated $\PT$ symmetry and exhibits exceptional points (EPs) where it becomes non-diagonalizable. We construct a Lax operator based on a rank-one biorthogonal projector associated with the impurity contact sector and prove that it satisfies an RLL relation within a projector algebra, leading to an $\etamet$-modified RTT structure and a commuting family of transfer matrices. The associated rational projector-type $R$-matrix satisfies the Yang--Baxter equation in the $\PT$-unbroken phase and extends continuously to the EP through a regularization of the biorthogonal projector. Within this framework we derive biorthogonal Bethe equations and show that the Gaudin matrix becomes defective at the EP, motivating the diagnostic $\mathcal{R}=κ(G)\,|\det G|$ that sharply separates EP singularities from Kondo criticality. We further prove that Bethe rapidities exhibit square-root coalescence and $\mathbb{Z}_2$ monodromy at the EP, reflecting the underlying Jordan structure, and that the effective pseudo-Hermitian Hamiltonian emerges from the periodically driven microscopic system with controlled operator-norm error $\mathcal{O}(1/Ω)$ via the Floquet--Magnus expansion.

ai.tldr: 在周期性驱动的类狄拉克浴中，建立了赝厄米量子杂质系统的杨-巴克斯特可积性框架，揭示了动态PT对称性和异常点结构。
ai.motivation: 将杨-巴克斯特可积性推广到非厄米（赝厄米）量子杂质系统，并理解异常点对可积结构的影响。
ai.method: 基于秩一双正交投影子构造Lax算符，证明投影子代数中的RLL关系，得到η-修正的RTT结构和交换传递矩阵族；通过正则化将R矩阵连续延拓到异常点；推导双正交Bethe方程，并引入诊断量R=κ(G)|det G|区分异常点与近藤临界性。
ai.result: 证明了Bethe快度在异常点处呈现平方根合并和Z₂单值性，反映了Jordan结构；赝厄米有效哈密顿量通过Floquet-Magnus展开从周期性驱动微观系统以O(1/Ω)算子范数误差导出。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究非厄米可积系统、异常点物理以及周期性驱动量子杂质提供了严格的数学框架和诊断工具。

idea_spark.idea: 利用异常点处的平方根合并行为设计量子传感或开关器件，或探索异常点与拓扑相变的关系。
idea_spark.risk: 实验实现周期性驱动赝厄米杂质系统可能面临参数调控和退相干挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将可积性理论与非厄米奇异点结合，为理解非平衡量子多体系统提供了新视角。

zh.tldr: 在周期性驱动的类狄拉克浴中，建立了赝厄米量子杂质系统的杨-巴克斯特可积性框架，揭示了动态PT对称性和异常点结构。
zh.motivation: 将杨-巴克斯特可积性推广到非厄米（赝厄米）量子杂质系统，并理解异常点对可积结构的影响。
zh.method: 基于秩一双正交投影子构造Lax算符，证明投影子代数中的RLL关系，得到η-修正的RTT结构和交换传递矩阵族；通过正则化将R矩阵连续延拓到异常点；推导双正交Bethe方程，并引入诊断量R=κ(G)|det G|区分异常点与近藤临界性。
zh.result: 证明了Bethe快度在异常点处呈现平方根合并和Z₂单值性，反映了Jordan结构；赝厄米有效哈密顿量通过Floquet-Magnus展开从周期性驱动微观系统以O(1/Ω)算子范数误差导出。
zh.help_to_user: 为研究非厄米可积系统、异常点物理以及周期性驱动量子杂质提供了严格的数学框架和诊断工具。

idea_spark.risk: 实验实现周期性驱动赝厄米杂质系统可能面临参数调控和退相干挑战。

en.tldr: A mathematically controlled framework for Yang-Baxter integrability in pseudo-Hermitian quantum impurity systems under periodic driving, revealing dynamic PT symmetry and exceptional-point structure.
en.motivation: To extend Yang-Baxter integrability to non-Hermitian (pseudo-Hermitian) quantum impurity systems and understand the impact of exceptional points on integrable structures.
en.method: Constructs a Lax operator via a rank-one biorthogonal projector, proves an RLL relation in a projector algebra leading to an η-modified RTT structure and commuting transfer matrices; extends the R-matrix continuously to the EP via regularization; derives biorthogonal Bethe equations and introduces a diagnostic R=κ(G)|det G| to separate EP singularities from Kondo criticality.
en.result: Bethe rapidities exhibit square-root coalescence and Z₂ monodromy at the EP, reflecting the Jordan structure; the effective pseudo-Hermitian Hamiltonian emerges from the periodically driven microscopic system with controlled operator-norm error O(1/Ω) via the Floquet-Magnus expansion.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework and diagnostic tools for studying non-Hermitian integrable systems, exceptional-point physics, and periodically driven quantum impurities.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit square-root coalescence at EPs for quantum sensing or switching devices, or explore connections between EPs and topological phase transitions.
idea_spark.risk: Experimental realization of periodically driven pseudo-Hermitian impurity systems may face challenges in parameter control and decoherence.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining integrability theory with non-Hermitian singularities offers a new perspective for understanding nonequilibrium quantum many-body systems.

papers.title: Modeling Gaps in Hydropower Cascading System Models: A Systematic Review of Rule-Based Formulations
papers.summary: The coordination of cascading hydropower systems represents a fundamental challenge in modern energy systems engineering, requiring a sophisticated balance between multi-reservoir physics, stringent environmental regulations, and dynamic market participation. As intermittent energy sources increase, the transition to high-fidelity hydropower modeling has become a core requirement for ensuring power system reliability, long-term energy resilience and affordability. This review provides a comprehensive analysis of 131 seminal articles through the exclusive lens of optimization-based approaches, intentionally omitting pure simulation and heuristic methods to focus on rigorous mathematical formulations. A generalized 10-equation mathematical framework is established as a formal baseline, capturing the full physical and hydraulic behavior of cascading systems, including spatiotemporal inflow routing, storage-to-elevation relationships, head-dependent power generation, and prohibited operating zones. Each article is evaluated against every equation of this Standard Model in a systematic census documenting which physical relationships are included, simplified, or omitted, providing an empirical measure of modeling fidelity across the field. Modeling simplifications are evaluated through the lens of grid reliability rather than water management performance alone. The review makes a focused technical case for mixed-integer linear programming with piecewise linear approximations as the optimal balance between physical accuracy and computational tractability, highlighting recent optimal regression techniques that minimize combinatorial overhead. Finally, a bibliometric analysis of solver usage identifies the near-absence of high-performance open-source solvers as a critical reproducibility barrier, and a promising avenue for broader adoption of high-fidelity cascading hydropower models.

ai.tldr: 系统综述了131篇关于梯级水电站系统建模的文献，建立了包含10个方程的通用数学框架，评估了各模型对物理关系的保真度，并推荐混合整数线性规划与分段线性近似作为精度与计算效率的最佳平衡。
ai.motivation: 随着间歇性能源占比增加，高保真水电站模型对电力系统可靠性至关重要，但现有模型在物理关系简化与计算可行性之间缺乏系统评估。
ai.method: 建立10方程标准模型作为基线，对131篇文献进行逐方程普查，记录每个物理关系是否被包含、简化或省略，并分析求解器使用情况。
ai.result: 混合整数线性规划结合分段线性近似是最优折中方案；高性能开源求解器的缺失是复现性和推广的主要障碍。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员快速了解梯级水电站建模中常见的简化策略及其对电网可靠性的影响，并指导选择建模方法和求解器。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个开源基准测试套件，包含标准模型和典型梯级水电站案例，用于公平比较不同求解器和建模方法的性能。
idea_spark.risk: 开源求解器在大型混合整数规划问题上的性能可能仍落后于商业求解器，需谨慎评估实际应用中的计算时间。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受“逐方程普查”启发，可对电力系统其他领域（如输电网络、储能调度）的模型简化进行类似系统化评估。

en.tldr: A systematic review of 131 articles on cascading hydropower system modeling establishes a 10-equation standard framework, evaluates modeling fidelity per physical relationship, and recommends mixed-integer linear programming with piecewise linear approximations as the best trade-off between accuracy and tractability.
en.motivation: With increasing intermittent energy sources, high-fidelity hydropower models are critical for grid reliability, yet existing models lack systematic evaluation of physical relationship simplifications and computational feasibility.
en.method: A 10-equation standard model is defined as baseline; each of 131 articles is censused against every equation to record inclusion, simplification, or omission of physical relationships; solver usage is bibliometrically analyzed.
en.result: Mixed-integer linear programming with piecewise linear approximations offers the optimal balance; the near-absence of high-performance open-source solvers is a major reproducibility barrier.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers quickly understand common simplification strategies in cascading hydropower modeling and their impact on grid reliability, and guides model and solver selection.

idea_spark.idea: Develop an open-source benchmark suite with the standard model and typical cascading hydropower cases for fair comparison of solvers and modeling approaches.
idea_spark.risk: Open-source solvers may still underperform commercial ones on large mixed-integer programs; computational time in real applications must be carefully evaluated.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the 'per-equation census', similar systematic assessments of model simplifications could be applied to other power system domains (e.g., transmission networks, storage scheduling).

papers.title: Seeing Fast and Slow: Learning the Flow of Time in Videos
papers.summary: How can we tell whether a video has been sped up or slowed down? How can we generate videos at different speeds? Although videos have been central to modern computer vision research, little attention has been paid to perceiving and controlling the passage of time. In this paper, we study time as a learnable visual concept and develop models for reasoning about and manipulating the flow of time in videos. We first exploit the multimodal cues and temporal structure naturally present in videos to learn, in a self-supervised manner, to detect speed changes and estimate playback speed. We then show that these learned temporal reasoning models enable us to curate the largest slow-motion video dataset to date from noisy in-the-wild sources. Such slow-motion footage, typically filmed by high-speed cameras, contains substantially richer temporal detail than standard videos. Using this data, we further develop models capable of temporal control, including speed-conditioned video generation, which produces motion at specified playback speed, and temporal super-resolution, which tranforms low-FPS, blurry videos into high-FPS sequences with fine-grained temporal details. Our findings highlight time as a manipulable, perceptual dimension in video learning, opening doors to temporally controllable video generation, temporal forensics detection, and potentially richer world-models that understand how events unfold over time.

ai.tldr: 本文研究视频中时间流速的感知与控制，通过自监督学习检测速度变化、估计播放速度，并构建大规模慢动作视频数据集，实现速度条件视频生成和时间超分辨率。
ai.motivation: 现有视频研究忽视了对时间流速的感知与控制，而时间作为视觉概念具有可学习性，可用于视频生成、取证和世界模型。
ai.method: 利用视频中的多模态线索和时间结构进行自监督学习，检测速度变化并估计播放速度；基于此从嘈杂网络视频中筛选慢动作数据，训练速度条件视频生成和时间超分辨率模型。
ai.result: 构建了最大规模的慢动作视频数据集，实现了速度可控的视频生成和低帧率模糊视频到高帧率精细时间细节的转换。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解视频时间流速的可学习性，提供速度变化检测、慢动作数据构建和时域超分辨率的技术思路。

idea_spark.idea: 利用自监督学习从自然视频中提取时间流速先验，无需人工标注即可训练速度相关模型。
idea_spark.risk: 慢动作数据筛选可能引入噪声，影响生成质量；速度条件生成需确保运动一致性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将时间视为可操控的感知维度，启发视频理解中时间动态的显式建模。

en.tldr: This paper studies perceiving and controlling the flow of time in videos, using self-supervised learning to detect speed changes, estimate playback speed, curate a large slow-motion dataset, and enable speed-conditioned video generation and temporal super-resolution.
en.motivation: Existing video research overlooks the perception and control of temporal speed, which is a learnable visual concept with applications in video generation, forensics, and world models.
en.method: Leverages multimodal cues and temporal structure in videos for self-supervised learning of speed change detection and playback speed estimation; then curates slow-motion data from noisy in-the-wild sources to train speed-conditioned video generation and temporal super-resolution models.
en.result: Constructs the largest slow-motion video dataset to date, enabling speed-controllable video generation and conversion of low-FPS blurry videos into high-FPS sequences with fine temporal details.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the learnability of temporal speed in videos, providing techniques for speed change detection, slow-motion data curation, and temporal super-resolution.

idea_spark.idea: Uses self-supervised learning to extract temporal speed priors from natural videos without manual annotation.
idea_spark.risk: Slow-motion data curation may introduce noise affecting generation quality; speed-conditioned generation must ensure motion consistency.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treating time as a manipulable perceptual dimension inspires explicit modeling of temporal dynamics in video understanding.

papers.title: Percolation Critical Probability of Aperiodic Smith Hat tile(1, $\sqrt3$)
papers.summary: The Smith Hat tile is the first known aperiodic monotile, having been discovered in 2023. The simple structure, constructed using only 8 kites, is unique and well motivated for analysis within percolation theory. The primary goal of this paper is to discover the critical threshold $p_c$ in both site and bond Bernoulli structures using Monte Carlo simulation for the Smith hat tile(1,$\sqrt3$). Our findings are site and bond values of $p_c^s = 0.822725 \pm 0.000044$ and $p_c^b = 0.798161 \pm 0.000044$ for edge percolation and $0.544247 \pm 0.000101$ for site percolation on the dual graph.

ai.tldr: 通过蒙特卡洛模拟，首次确定了Smith Hat tile(1,√3)在点渗流和边渗流模型中的临界概率。
ai.motivation: Smith Hat tile是2023年发现的首个非周期单瓷砖，其简单结构适合渗流理论分析，但临界阈值未知。
ai.method: 使用蒙特卡洛模拟，分别对原始图和其对偶图进行点渗流和边渗流模拟，估计临界概率。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了非周期单瓷砖渗流临界值的精确估计，有助于理解非周期结构中的相变行为。

idea_spark.idea: 探索Smith Hat tile在更高维或不同边界条件下的渗流行为。
idea_spark.risk: 蒙特卡洛模拟的精度受限于计算资源，可能无法捕捉极低概率事件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 非周期单瓷砖的渗流临界值可能与其几何对称性有内在联系，值得进一步理论分析。

zh.tldr: 通过蒙特卡洛模拟，首次确定了Smith Hat tile(1,√3)在点渗流和边渗流模型中的临界概率。

idea_spark.inspiration: 非周期单瓷砖的渗流临界值可能与其几何对称性有内在联系，值得进一步理论分析。

en.tldr: Using Monte Carlo simulations, we determine the critical percolation thresholds for the Smith Hat tile (1,√3) in both site and bond models.
en.motivation: The Smith Hat tile, discovered in 2023 as the first aperiodic monotile, has a simple structure suitable for percolation analysis, but its critical thresholds were unknown.
en.method: Monte Carlo simulations are performed for site and bond Bernoulli percolation on the original and dual graphs.
en.result: We obtain pc = 0.822725 ± 0.000044 for edge percolation, pc = 0.544247 ± 0.000101 for site percolation on the dual graph, and pc = 0.798161 ± 0.000044 for another bond percolation.
en.help_to_user: Provides precise estimates of percolation thresholds for an aperiodic monotile, aiding understanding of phase transitions in non-periodic structures.

idea_spark.idea: Investigate percolation on the Smith Hat tile under higher dimensions or different boundary conditions.
idea_spark.risk: Monte Carlo accuracy is limited by computational resources and may miss rare events.
idea_spark.inspiration: The critical thresholds may be intrinsically linked to the geometric symmetries of the aperiodic monotile, warranting further theoretical study.

papers.title: Calderón-Zygmund estimates for parabolic $p$-Laplacian systems with non-divergence form right-hand sides
papers.summary: We establish local Calderón-Zygmund type estimates for weak solutions to nonlinear parabolic systems with $p$-growth and VMO coefficients. In particular, we prove that if the right-hand side belongs locally to $L^{μs}$, where the exponent $μ$ depends explicitly on $p$, $N$, and a prescribed target exponent $s>p$, then the spatial gradient of the solution enjoys improved integrability $Du \in L^s_{\rm{loc}}$. The result provides a sharp transfer of integrability from the data to the gradient, consistent with the natural parabolic scaling, and recovers the optimal exponents in the linear case $p=2$. The proof combines intrinsic scaling techniques with a Calderón-Zygmund type iteration scheme.

ai.tldr: 建立了具有非散度形式右端项的抛物p-Laplacian系统的局部Calderón-Zygmund型估计，证明右端项在L^{μs}中时，解的梯度具有改进的可积性。
ai.motivation: 研究非线性抛物系统在非散度形式右端项下的梯度可积性提升问题，推广线性情形的最优指数。
ai.method: 结合内在尺度技术和Calderón-Zygmund型迭代方案。
ai.result: 若右端项局部属于L^{μs}（μ依赖于p、N和目标指数s>p），则空间梯度Du ∈ L^s_loc，且指数与自然抛物尺度一致，线性情形p=2时恢复最优指数。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解非线性抛物系统解的正则性提供理论工具，可用于偏微分方程和数学物理中的正则性分析。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将类似估计推广到具有更一般非线性或变系数的问题中。
idea_spark.risk: 非散度形式右端项可能引入额外技术困难，需调整迭代参数。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从线性情形的最优指数恢复出发，启发非线性情形下可积性提升的精确刻画。

zh.motivation: 研究非线性抛物系统在非散度形式右端项下的梯度可积性提升问题，推广线性情形的最优指数。

en.tldr: Establishes local Calderón-Zygmund type estimates for parabolic p-Laplacian systems with non-divergence form right-hand sides, showing improved integrability of the gradient when the right-hand side lies in L^{μs}.
en.motivation: To study the gradient integrability improvement for nonlinear parabolic systems under non-divergence form right-hand sides, generalizing optimal exponents from the linear case.
en.method: Combines intrinsic scaling techniques with a Calderón-Zygmund type iteration scheme.
en.result: If the right-hand side belongs locally to L^{μs} (μ depends on p, N, and target exponent s>p), then the spatial gradient Du ∈ L^s_loc, consistent with natural parabolic scaling, recovering optimal exponents for p=2.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical tools for understanding regularity of solutions to nonlinear parabolic systems, useful in PDE and mathematical physics regularity analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Try to generalize similar estimates to problems with more general nonlinearities or variable coefficients.
idea_spark.risk: Non-divergence form right-hand sides may introduce additional technical difficulties, requiring adjustment of iteration parameters.
idea_spark.inspiration: Recovering optimal exponents from the linear case inspires precise characterization of integrability improvement in nonlinear settings.

papers.title: Bounding the density of spherical polygon packings
papers.summary: We determine putative optimal packings of regular spherical polygons via optimization on smooth manifolds. For several cases, we establish maximality by extending the Lovász theta number to Cayley graphs on the special orthogonal group ${\rm SO}(3)$. To this end, we introduce an algebraic criterion characterizing when congruent regular spherical polygons have disjoint interiors, leading to a unified formulation of the packing constraints. Using harmonic analysis on ${\rm SO}(3)$, we reduce the theta number to a trigonometric sum-of-squares problem, which can be solved via semidefinite programming.

ai.motivation: 球面多边形堆积是几何堆积问题的重要变体，但缺乏统一的密度上界方法。
ai.method: 将堆积约束转化为代数判据，利用SO(3)上的调和分析将theta数简化为三角平方和问题，并通过半定规划求解。
ai.result: 给出了若干正则球面多边形堆积的候选最优构型，并证明了其密度极大性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种计算球面多边形堆积密度上界的系统框架，可推广到其他对称堆积问题。

idea_spark.risk: 计算复杂度随多边形边数增加而快速增长，可能限制实际应用规模。
