zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种将数论（Farey对）、热带几何与凸几何结合的新工具，可用于研究凸域的等仿射周长和格点渐近计数。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将热带zeta函数与等仿射周长以外的几何量（如体积、表面积）建立类似极点-留数关系，或探索高维情形的渐近行为。
idea_spark.risk: 高维解析延拓可能更复杂，且Tauber论证的适用条件可能受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Farey对与Dirichlet级数的联系出发，可启发将模形式或自守形式中的工具引入凸几何渐近分析。

en.tldr: Defines an SL_n(Z)-invariant tropical zeta function for convex domains; in dimension 2 it has a boundary Dirichlet series indexed by Farey pairs; for C^3 strictly convex domains it extends meromorphically to Re(s)>3/5 with a simple pole at s=2/3 whose residue equals the equiaffine perimeter; a Tauberian argument yields a t^{1/3} wave-front lattice-perimeter asymptotic as t→0.
en.motivation: Extend zeta function methods to the intersection of tropical geometry and convex geometry, establishing an SL_n(Z)-invariant tropical zeta function and exploring its analytic properties and connections to geometric invariants such as equiaffine perimeter.
en.method: Define the tropical zeta function, construct a boundary Dirichlet series representation in dimension 2 using Farey pairs; perform analytic continuation and residue calculation to obtain the pole and residue; apply a Tauberian argument to derive asymptotic behavior.
en.result: For C^3 strictly convex domains, the tropical zeta function has a simple pole at s=2/3 with residue equal to the equiaffine perimeter; the wave-front lattice perimeter asymptotically behaves as t^{1/3} as t→0.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new tool combining number theory (Farey pairs), tropical geometry, and convex geometry, useful for studying equiaffine perimeter and lattice-point asymptotics of convex domains.

idea_spark.idea: Attempt to establish similar pole-residue relations between the tropical zeta function and other geometric quantities (e.g., volume, surface area), or explore asymptotic behavior in higher dimensions.
idea_spark.risk: Analytic continuation in higher dimensions may be more complicated, and the applicability of Tauberian arguments may be limited.
idea_spark.inspiration: The connection between Farey pairs and Dirichlet series suggests that tools from modular forms or automorphic forms could be introduced into asymptotic analysis of convex geometry.

papers.title: A rigorous quasipolynomial-time classical algorithm for SYK thermal expectations
papers.summary: Estimating local observables in Gibbs states is a central problem in quantum simulation. While this task is BQP-complete at asymptotically low temperatures, the possibility of quantum advantage at constant temperature remains open. The Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev (SYK) model is a natural candidate: at any constant temperature, its Gibbs states have polynomial quantum circuit complexity and are not described by Gaussian states. Rigorous analyses of the SYK model are difficult due to the failure of known techniques using random matrix theory, cluster expansions, and rigorous formulations of the quantum path integral and replica trick. Despite this, we give a rigorous proof of a quasipolynomial-time classical algorithm that estimates SYK local thermal expectations at sufficiently high constant temperature. Our result introduces a new Wick-pair cluster expansion that we expect to be broadly useful for disordered quantum many-body systems.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种严格的多项式对数时间经典算法，用于在足够高的恒定温度下估计SYK模型的局部热期望值。
ai.motivation: 在恒定温度下，Gibbs态的局部观测值估计是否具有量子优势仍是一个开放问题，而SYK模型因其多项式量子电路复杂度且非高斯态的特性成为理想候选。
ai.method: 引入了一种新的Wick对簇展开方法，克服了随机矩阵理论、簇展开和量子路径积分等传统技术的困难。
ai.result: 严格证明了在足够高的恒定温度下，存在一个拟多项式时间的经典算法来估计SYK局部热期望值。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究无序量子多体系统的热态性质提供了一种新的经典算法工具，并可能启发其他类似系统的分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将Wick对簇展开与经典采样技术结合，设计更高效的算法。
idea_spark.risk: 该方法在低温或强无序条件下可能失效，需要进一步验证其适用范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从量子路径积分和复制技巧的失败中，转而采用组合展开方法，体现了理论创新的价值。

zh.tldr: 本文提出了一种严格的多项式对数时间经典算法，用于在足够高的恒定温度下估计SYK模型的局部热期望值。
zh.motivation: 在恒定温度下，Gibbs态的局部观测值估计是否具有量子优势仍是一个开放问题，而SYK模型因其多项式量子电路复杂度且非高斯态的特性成为理想候选。

zh.result: 严格证明了在足够高的恒定温度下，存在一个拟多项式时间的经典算法来估计SYK局部热期望值。
zh.help_to_user: 为研究无序量子多体系统的热态性质提供了一种新的经典算法工具，并可能启发其他类似系统的分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将Wick对簇展开与经典采样技术结合，设计更高效的算法。

en.tldr: This paper presents a rigorous quasipolynomial-time classical algorithm for estimating local thermal expectations of the SYK model at sufficiently high constant temperature.
en.motivation: Whether quantum advantage exists for estimating local observables in Gibbs states at constant temperature remains open, and the SYK model is a natural candidate due to its polynomial quantum circuit complexity and non-Gaussian nature.
en.method: A new Wick-pair cluster expansion is introduced, overcoming difficulties of random matrix theory, cluster expansions, and quantum path integral techniques.
en.result: A rigorous proof is given that a quasipolynomial-time classical algorithm can estimate SYK local thermal expectations at sufficiently high constant temperature.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new classical algorithmic tool for studying thermal properties of disordered quantum many-body systems, potentially inspiring analyses of similar systems.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the Wick-pair cluster expansion with classical sampling techniques to design more efficient algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: The method may fail at low temperatures or under strong disorder, requiring further validation of its applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: The shift from failed quantum path integral and replica trick approaches to combinatorial expansion methods highlights the value of theoretical innovation.

papers.title: To See the Unseen: on the Generalization Ability of Transformers in Symbolic Reasoning
papers.summary: We investigate the ability of decoder-only transformer models to perform abstract symbolic reasoning; specifically solving propositional logic reasoning problems given in-context. Previous work demonstrated that models fail to generalize to problems involving variable names that were not observed during training, and it was shown that one reason behind this is the difficulty of copying (or generating) unseen tokens. We show both theoretically and empirically that a particular representational collapse also has a crucial role: the unembeddings (last-layer weights) of unseen tokens collapse to nearly the same vector during training. The collapse makes distinguishing multiple unseen variables difficult for the model (especially when the embedding and unembedding parameters are shared), and provides a mechanistic explanation for the effectiveness of existing heuristic interventions like "active forgetting", which periodically reset the token (un)embeddings. Based on these observations, we devise a combination of techniques, involving a small architecture change facilitating copying, data diversity, and freezing or resetting (un)embeddings, that achieves generalization to unseen tokens. We support our claims with extensive controlled experiments on propositional logic reasoning problems. Beyond synthetic experiments, we also observe evidence of (un)embedding collapse in the open-weight models in the Gemma 3 family, which includes 99 unused tokens reserved for downstream use. Empirically we find that the correlated embeddings of these tokens are a poor initialization for finetuning applications.

ai.tldr: 研究解码器-only Transformer在命题逻辑推理中泛化到未见令牌的能力，发现未嵌入层权重坍塌是关键障碍，并提出组合改进方法。
ai.motivation: 先前工作表明模型难以泛化到训练中未出现的变量名，原因之一是复制未见令牌困难，但本文揭示未嵌入层权重坍塌是更根本的机制。
ai.method: 通过理论分析和实验验证未嵌入层权重坍塌现象，结合小架构修改（便于复制）、数据多样性、冻结或重置（反）嵌入，实现泛化。
ai.result: 所提组合方法在命题逻辑推理任务上成功泛化到未见令牌；在Gemma 3模型中也观察到未嵌入层坍塌现象，且相关令牌嵌入作为微调初始化效果差。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Transformer在符号推理中泛化失败的根本原因，并提供实用的训练技巧（如重置嵌入）来提升泛化能力。

idea_spark.idea: 利用未嵌入层坍塌作为检测模型对未见令牌敏感度的指标，或设计主动正则化方法防止坍塌。
idea_spark.risk: 重置嵌入可能干扰已学到的表示，需谨慎控制重置频率和范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从“主动遗忘”启发，思考在持续学习中如何通过周期性重置部分参数来避免灾难性遗忘。

en.tldr: Investigates decoder-only Transformers' generalization to unseen tokens in propositional logic reasoning, identifies unembedding weight collapse as a key obstacle, and proposes a combination of techniques to overcome it.
en.motivation: Prior work showed models fail to generalize to unseen variable names due to difficulty copying unseen tokens; this paper reveals that unembedding weight collapse is a more fundamental mechanism.
en.method: Theoretically and empirically demonstrates unembedding collapse, then combines a small architecture change (facilitating copying), data diversity, and freezing/resetting (un)embeddings to achieve generalization.
en.result: The proposed combination successfully generalizes to unseen tokens on propositional logic tasks; evidence of unembedding collapse is also found in Gemma 3 models, where correlated token embeddings serve as poor initialization for finetuning.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into why Transformers fail at symbolic reasoning generalization and offers practical training techniques (e.g., resetting embeddings) to improve it.

idea_spark.idea: Use unembedding collapse as a metric to detect model sensitivity to unseen tokens, or design active regularization to prevent collapse.
idea_spark.risk: Resetting embeddings may disrupt learned representations; careful tuning of reset frequency and scope is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by 'active forgetting', consider periodic resetting of certain parameters in continual learning to avoid catastrophic forgetting.

papers.title: Deep kernel video approximation for unsupervised action segmentation
papers.summary: This work focuses on per-video unsupervised action segmentation, which is of interest to applications where storing large datasets is either not possible, or nor permitted. We propose to segment videos by learning in deep kernel space, to approximate the underlying frame distribution, as closely as possible. To define this closeness metric between the original video distribution and its approximation, we rely on maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) which is a geometry-preserving metric in distribution space, and thus gives more reliable estimates. Moreover, unlike the commonly used optimal transport metric, MMD is both easier to optimize, and faster. We choose to use neural tangent kernels (NTKs) to define the kernel space where MMD operates, because of their improved descriptive power as opposed to fixed kernels. And, also, because NTKs sidestep the trivial solution, when jointly learning the inputs (video approximation) and the kernel function. Finally, we show competitive results when compared to state-of-the-art per-video methods, on six standard benchmarks. Additionally, our method has higher F1 scores than prior agglomerative work, when the number of segments is unknown.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于深度核空间的逐视频无监督动作分割方法，利用最大均值差异和神经正切核逼近帧分布。
ai.motivation: 在无法或不允许存储大型数据集的场景中，需要无监督的逐视频动作分割方法。
ai.method: 在深度核空间中学习视频近似，使用最大均值差异衡量分布距离，并采用神经正切核定义核空间以避免平凡解。
ai.result: 在六个标准基准上取得与最先进方法竞争的结果，且在未知分割数时F1分数优于先前的凝聚方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需标注数据即可分割视频动作的实用方法，适用于隐私敏感或存储受限的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将神经正切核与对比学习结合，进一步提升分布逼近的判别性。
idea_spark.risk: 核函数选择对性能敏感，且在大规模视频上计算成本可能较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受最大均值差异在分布匹配中的几何保持特性启发，可推广到其他无监督表示学习问题。

zh.tldr: 提出一种基于深度核空间的逐视频无监督动作分割方法，利用最大均值差异和神经正切核逼近帧分布。
zh.motivation: 在无法或不允许存储大型数据集的场景中，需要无监督的逐视频动作分割方法。

en.tldr: Proposes a deep kernel space method for per-video unsupervised action segmentation, using maximum mean discrepancy and neural tangent kernels to approximate frame distributions.
en.motivation: To enable unsupervised action segmentation in scenarios where storing large datasets is infeasible or prohibited.
en.method: Learns a video approximation in deep kernel space, measures distribution distance via maximum mean discrepancy, and uses neural tangent kernels to define the kernel space, avoiding trivial solutions.
en.result: Achieves competitive results on six standard benchmarks, with higher F1 scores than prior agglomerative methods when the number of segments is unknown.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical method for segmenting video actions without annotations, suitable for privacy-sensitive or storage-limited applications.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining neural tangent kernels with contrastive learning to further improve discriminative distribution approximation.
idea_spark.risk: Kernel choice is sensitive to performance, and computational cost may be high for large-scale videos.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the geometry-preserving property of maximum mean discrepancy in distribution matching, which can be extended to other unsupervised representation learning problems.

papers.title: FryNet: Dual-Stream Adversarial Fusion for Non-Destructive Frying Oil Oxidation Assessment
papers.summary: Monitoring frying oil degradation is critical for food safety, yet current practice relies on destructive wet-chemistry assays that provide no spatial information and are unsuitable for real-time use. We identify a fundamental obstacle in thermal-image-based inspection, the camera-fingerprint shortcut, whereby models memorize sensor-specific noise and thermal bias instead of learning oxidation chemistry, collapsing under video-disjoint evaluation. We propose FryNet, a dual-stream RGB-thermal framework that jointly performs oil-region segmentation, serviceability classification, and regression of four chemical oxidation indices (PV, p-AV, Totox, temperature) in a single forward pass. A ThermalMiT-B2 backbone with channel and spatial attention extracts thermal features, while an RGB-MAE Encoder learns chemically grounded representations via masked autoencoding and chemical alignment. Dual-Encoder DANN adversarially regularizes both streams against video identity via Gradient Reversal Layers, and FiLM fusion bridges thermal structure with RGB chemical context. On 7,226 paired frames across 28 frying videos, FryNet achieves 98.97% mIoU, 100% classification accuracy, and 2.32 mean regression MAE, outperforming all seven baselines.

ai.tldr: 提出FryNet双流RGB-热成像框架，通过对抗融合解决热成像中的相机指纹捷径问题，实现煎炸油氧化状态的非破坏性评估。
ai.motivation: 传统煎炸油检测依赖破坏性湿化学方法，无法提供空间信息且不适用于实时监测；热成像检测存在相机指纹捷径，模型记忆传感器噪声而非氧化化学特征。
ai.method: 采用ThermalMiT-B2骨干网络提取热特征，RGB-MAE编码器通过掩码自编码和化学对齐学习化学表征；双编码器DANN通过梯度反转层对抗正则化消除视频身份偏差，FiLM融合桥接热结构与RGB化学上下文。
ai.result: 在28个煎炸视频的7226帧上，达到98.97% mIoU、100%分类准确率、2.32平均回归MAE，超越所有七个基线。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种非破坏性、实时、空间感知的煎炸油质量评估方法，可集成到工业监控系统。

idea_spark.idea: 利用掩码自编码和化学对齐学习鲁棒表征，结合域对抗训练消除传感器偏差。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖配对RGB-热数据，实际部署中可能面临传感器校准和光照变化挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将化学指标回归与分割、分类联合学习，实现多任务统一框架。

zh.help_to_user: 提供一种非破坏性、实时、空间感知的煎炸油质量评估方法，可集成到工业监控系统。

idea_spark.risk: 依赖配对RGB-热数据，实际部署中可能面临传感器校准和光照变化挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将化学指标回归与分割、分类联合学习，实现多任务统一框架。

en.tldr: Proposes FryNet, a dual-stream RGB-thermal framework with adversarial fusion to overcome the camera-fingerprint shortcut in thermal imaging, enabling non-destructive assessment of frying oil oxidation.
en.motivation: Traditional frying oil monitoring relies on destructive wet-chemistry assays lacking spatial information and real-time capability; thermal imaging suffers from camera-fingerprint shortcut where models memorize sensor noise instead of oxidation chemistry.
en.method: Uses ThermalMiT-B2 backbone for thermal features, RGB-MAE encoder with masked autoencoding and chemical alignment for chemically grounded representations; Dual-Encoder DANN adversarially regularizes both streams via Gradient Reversal Layers, and FiLM fusion bridges thermal structure with RGB chemical context.
en.result: On 7,226 paired frames from 28 frying videos, achieves 98.97% mIoU, 100% classification accuracy, and 2.32 mean regression MAE, outperforming all seven baselines.
en.help_to_user: Provides a non-destructive, real-time, spatially-aware method for frying oil quality assessment, suitable for integration into industrial monitoring systems.

idea_spark.idea: Leverages masked autoencoding and chemical alignment for robust representations, combined with domain-adversarial training to eliminate sensor bias.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on paired RGB-thermal data; real-world deployment may face challenges in sensor calibration and varying illumination.
idea_spark.inspiration: Jointly learns chemical regression with segmentation and classification in a unified multi-task framework.

papers.title: The Geometry Underlying the Quantum Harmonic Oscillator
papers.summary: We consider two-dimensional harmonic oscillator in the complex Bargmann-Fock-Segal representation with $T^*{\mathbb R}^{2}={\mathbb C}^2$ as classical phase space. We show that the eigenfunctions $ψ_n$ of the quantum Hamiltonian correspond to complex radial coordinates in the reduced phase space ${\mathbb C}^2/{\mathbb Z}_n\subset{\mathbb C}^2$. They describe ${\mathbb Z}_n$-invariant motion of particle along a circle $S^1$ in lens space $S^3/{\mathbb Z}_n\subset{\mathbb C}^2/{\mathbb Z}_n$, where ${\mathbb Z}_n$ is the cyclic group of rotation by an angle $2π/n$ on the circle $S^1$, $n=1,2,...\,$. Thus the general solution of the Schrödinger equation carries information about an infinite number of admissible classical states $ψ_n$ that can be mapped to other states after lifting into the quantum bundle. We show that in the Kepler/hydrogen atom problem there is a similar correspondence between classical and quantum states.

ai.tldr: 在复Bargmann-Fock-Segal表示中，二维量子谐振子的本征函数对应于约化相空间中的复径向坐标，描述了透镜空间中的Z_n不变圆周运动，并揭示了经典与量子态之间的对应关系。
ai.motivation: 探索量子谐振子几何结构，揭示经典相空间与量子态之间的深层联系。
ai.method: 利用复Bargmann-Fock-Segal表示，将二维谐振子的本征函数映射到约化相空间C^2/Z_n中的复径向坐标，并分析透镜空间S^3/Z_n中的Z_n不变运动。

en.tldr: In the complex Bargmann-Fock-Segal representation, eigenfunctions of the 2D quantum harmonic oscillator correspond to complex radial coordinates in the reduced phase space, describing Z_n-invariant circular motion in lens spaces, revealing a classical-quantum correspondence.
en.motivation: To explore the geometry underlying the quantum harmonic oscillator and uncover deep connections between classical phase space and quantum states.
en.method: Using the complex Bargmann-Fock-Segal representation, eigenfunctions of the 2D harmonic oscillator are mapped to complex radial coordinates in the reduced phase space C^2/Z_n, and Z_n-invariant motion in lens spaces S^3/Z_n is analyzed.
en.result: Quantum eigenstates correspond to Z_n-invariant circular motions in classical phase space, and this correspondence extends to the Kepler/hydrogen atom problem.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the geometric foundations of the quantum harmonic oscillator and the correspondence principle between classical and quantum mechanics.

idea_spark.idea: Use lens spaces and cyclic group symmetries to construct explicit maps between classical orbits and quantum eigenstates.
idea_spark.risk: This geometric correspondence may be limited to systems with specific symmetries; generalization requires verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Re-examining quantization from the perspective of reduced phase space symmetries may reveal new classical-quantum correspondences.

papers.title: DiffNR: Diffusion-Enhanced Neural Representation Optimization for Sparse-View 3D Tomographic Reconstruction
papers.summary: Neural representations (NRs), such as neural fields and 3D Gaussians, effectively model volumetric data in computed tomography (CT) but suffer from severe artifacts under sparse-view settings. To address this, we propose DiffNR, a novel framework that enhances NR optimization with diffusion priors. At its core is SliceFixer, a single-step diffusion model designed to correct artifacts in degraded slices. We integrate specialized conditioning layers into the network and develop tailored data curation strategies to support model finetuning. During reconstruction, SliceFixer periodically generates pseudo-reference volumes, providing auxiliary 3D perceptual supervision to fix underconstrained regions. Compared to prior methods that embed CT solvers into time-consuming iterative denoising, our repair-and-augment strategy avoids frequent diffusion model queries, leading to better runtime performance. Extensive experiments show that DiffNR improves PSNR by 3.99 dB on average, generalizes well across domains, and maintains efficient optimization.

ai.tldr: 提出DiffNR框架，利用扩散模型增强神经表示优化，实现稀疏视角CT高质量重建。
ai.motivation: 神经表示在稀疏视角CT中存在严重伪影，现有迭代去噪方法耗时。
ai.method: 设计单步扩散模型SliceFixer，通过修复退化切片生成伪参考体，提供3D感知监督。
ai.result: 平均PSNR提升3.99 dB，跨域泛化好，优化效率高。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何用扩散先验加速稀疏视角CT重建。

idea_spark.idea: 用单步扩散模型替代迭代去噪，减少查询次数。
idea_spark.risk: 单步修复可能引入新伪影，需精细数据策展。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将扩散模型作为正则化器而非生成器，平衡速度与质量。

en.tldr: Proposes DiffNR, a framework that enhances neural representation optimization with diffusion priors for high-quality sparse-view CT reconstruction.
en.motivation: Neural representations suffer from severe artifacts under sparse-view CT, and prior iterative denoising methods are time-consuming.
en.method: Designs a single-step diffusion model SliceFixer to correct degraded slices and generate pseudo-reference volumes for 3D perceptual supervision.
en.result: Achieves average PSNR improvement of 3.99 dB, good cross-domain generalization, and efficient optimization.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage diffusion priors for efficient sparse-view CT reconstruction.

idea_spark.idea: Replace iterative denoising with a single-step diffusion model to reduce query frequency.
idea_spark.risk: Single-step repair may introduce new artifacts, requiring careful data curation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use diffusion model as a regularizer rather than a generator to balance speed and quality.

papers.title: StyleVAR: Controllable Image Style Transfer via Visual Autoregressive Modeling
papers.summary: We build on the Visual Autoregressive Modeling (VAR) framework and formulate style transfer as conditional discrete sequence modeling in a learned latent space. Images are decomposed into multi-scale representations and tokenized into discrete codes by a VQ-VAE; a transformer then autoregressively models the distribution of target tokens conditioned on style and content tokens. To inject style and content information, we introduce a blended cross-attention mechanism in which the evolving target representation attends to its own history, while style and content features act as queries that decide which aspects of this history to emphasize. A scale-dependent blending coefficient controls the relative influence of style and content at each stage, encouraging the synthesized representation to align with both the content structure and the style texture without breaking the autoregressive continuity of VAR. We train StyleVAR in two stages from a pretrained VAR checkpoint: supervised fine-tuning on a large triplet dataset of content--style--target images, followed by reinforcement fine-tuning with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) against a DreamSim-based perceptual reward, with per-action normalization weighting to rebalance credit across VAR's multi-scale hierarchy. Across three benchmarks spanning in-, near-, and out-of-distribution regimes, StyleVAR consistently outperforms an AdaIN baseline on Style Loss, Content Loss, LPIPS, SSIM, DreamSim, and CLIP similarity, and the GRPO stage yields further gains over the SFT checkpoint, most notably on the reward-aligned perceptual metrics. Qualitatively, the method transfers texture while maintaining semantic structure, especially for landscapes and architectural scenes, while a generalization gap on internet images and difficulty with human faces highlight the need for better content diversity and stronger structural priors.

ai.tldr: 提出StyleVAR，基于视觉自回归建模实现可控图像风格迁移，通过混合交叉注意力机制和两阶段训练（监督微调+强化微调）在多个基准上超越AdaIN基线。
ai.motivation: 现有风格迁移方法难以在保持内容结构的同时有效传递风格纹理，且缺乏对自回归生成连续性的考虑。
ai.method: 将图像分解为多尺度离散编码，使用Transformer自回归建模目标令牌分布，引入混合交叉注意力机制（风格和内容作为查询）和尺度依赖的混合系数控制风格与内容影响，两阶段训练：监督微调+GRPO强化微调。
ai.result: 在分布内、近分布和分布外三个基准上，StyleVAR在风格损失、内容损失、LPIPS、SSIM、DreamSim和CLIP相似度上均优于AdaIN基线，GRPO阶段进一步提升了感知指标。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种可控且高质量的图像风格迁移方法，尤其适用于风景和建筑场景，可帮助用户实现纹理迁移同时保持语义结构。

idea_spark.idea: 将风格迁移建模为条件离散序列预测，利用自回归框架的生成能力，并通过强化学习优化感知质量。
idea_spark.risk: 对互联网图像和人脸存在泛化差距，需要更好的内容多样性和更强的结构先验。
idea_spark.inspiration: 视觉自回归建模（VAR）与强化微调的结合为可控生成提供了新范式，可探索更多感知奖励函数和层次化控制策略。

en.tldr: StyleVAR proposes controllable image style transfer via visual autoregressive modeling, using blended cross-attention and two-stage training (SFT + GRPO) to outperform AdaIN baselines across multiple benchmarks.
en.motivation: Existing style transfer methods struggle to preserve content structure while effectively transferring style texture, and lack consideration for autoregressive generation continuity.

Two-stage training: supervised fine-tuning on triplets followed by GRPO with DreamSim-based perceptual reward.

idea_spark.idea: Formulate style transfer as conditional discrete sequence prediction, leveraging autoregressive generation and reinforcement learning to optimize perceptual quality.
idea_spark.risk: Generalization gap on internet images and human faces indicates need for better content diversity and stronger structural priors.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining visual autoregressive modeling with reinforcement fine-tuning offers a new paradigm for controllable generation; explore more perceptual reward functions and hierarchical control strategies.

papers.title: TingIS: Real-time Risk Event Discovery from Noisy Customer Incidents at Enterprise Scale
papers.summary: Real-time detection and mitigation of technical anomalies are critical for large-scale cloud-native services, where even minutes of downtime can result in massive financial losses and diminished user trust. While customer incidents serve as a vital signal for discovering risks missed by monitoring, extracting actionable intelligence from this data remains challenging due to extreme noise, high throughput, and semantic complexity of diverse business lines. In this paper, we present TingIS, an end-to-end system designed for enterprise-grade incident discovery. At the core of TingIS is a multi-stage event linking engine that synergizes efficient indexing techniques with Large Language Models (LLMs) to make informed decisions on event merging, enabling the stable extraction of actionable incidents from just a handful of diverse user descriptions. This engine is complemented by a cascaded routing mechanism for precise business attribution and a multi-dimensional noise reduction pipeline that integrates domain knowledge, statistical patterns, and behavioral filtering. Deployed in a production environment handling a peak throughput of over 2,000 messages per minute and 300,000 messages per day, TingIS achieves a P90 alert latency of 3.5 minutes and a 95\% discovery rate for high-priority incidents. Benchmarks constructed from real-world data demonstrate that TingIS significantly outperforms baseline methods in routing accuracy, clustering quality, and Signal-to-Noise Ratio.

ai.tldr: 提出TingIS系统，通过多阶段事件链接引擎和LLM，从嘈杂客户事件中实时发现企业级风险事件。
ai.motivation: 大规模云原生服务中，客户事件虽能发现监控遗漏的风险，但存在噪声大、吞吐量高、语义复杂等挑战。
ai.method: 核心是多阶段事件链接引擎，结合高效索引与LLM进行事件合并决策；辅以级联路由进行业务归属，以及集成领域知识、统计模式和行为过滤的多维降噪流水线。
ai.result: 在生产环境（峰值>2000条/分钟，日处理30万条）中，P90告警延迟3.5分钟，高优先级事件发现率95%，在路由准确率、聚类质量和信噪比上显著优于基线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助运维人员从海量嘈杂客户反馈中快速提取可操作的故障事件，减少误报和漏报。

idea_spark.idea: 利用LLM的语义理解能力，结合高效索引，从少量用户描述中稳定提取可操作事件。
idea_spark.risk: LLM推理延迟可能影响实时性，需平衡模型大小与性能；领域知识依赖人工维护。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将LLM与传统索引和规则结合，实现高噪声环境下的实时事件发现，启发其他实时分析系统设计。

papers.title: Predicting Scale-Up of Metal-Organic Framework Syntheses with Large Language Models
papers.summary: Scalable synthesis remains the gate between MOF discovery and industrial deployment, as scale-up know-how is fragmented across disparate reports. We introduce ESU-MOF, a literature-mined dataset and a positive-unlabeled learning strategy that fine-tunes large language models to predict scalability potential with 91.4% accuracy, enabling rapid data-driven triage for industrial MOF discovery.

ai.tldr: 提出ESU-MOF数据集和正无标签学习策略，微调大语言模型预测MOF合成放大潜力，准确率达91.4%。
ai.motivation: MOF从发现到工业部署的关键瓶颈是合成放大，但放大知识分散于不同文献，缺乏系统预测工具。
ai.method: 构建文献挖掘的ESU-MOF数据集，采用正无标签学习策略微调大语言模型，预测合成可放大性。
ai.result: 模型预测准确率达91.4%，实现快速数据驱动的工业MOF发现筛选。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员快速评估MOF合成放大潜力，加速从实验室发现到工业应用的转化。

idea_spark.idea: 结合实验验证，构建主动学习循环，持续优化模型并推荐高潜力合成条件。
idea_spark.risk: 数据集可能偏向已报道成功案例，对未报道或失败案例的泛化能力需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用大语言模型从文献中提取隐式放大知识，启发其他材料合成领域的知识挖掘与预测。

en.tldr: Introduces ESU-MOF dataset and positive-unlabeled learning to fine-tune large language models for predicting MOF synthesis scalability with 91.4% accuracy.
en.motivation: Scalable synthesis is the gate between MOF discovery and industrial deployment, but scale-up know-how is fragmented across reports.
en.method: Constructs a literature-mined dataset (ESU-MOF) and uses positive-unlabeled learning to fine-tune large language models for scalability prediction.
en.result: Achieves 91.4% accuracy, enabling rapid data-driven triage for industrial MOF discovery.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers quickly assess MOF synthesis scalability, accelerating translation from lab discovery to industrial application.

idea_spark.idea: Combine with experimental validation to build an active learning loop, continuously optimizing the model and recommending high-potential synthesis conditions.
idea_spark.risk: The dataset may be biased toward reported successes; generalization to unreported or failed cases needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging large language models to extract implicit scale-up knowledge from literature inspires knowledge mining and prediction in other materials synthesis domains.

papers.title: A Systematic Review and Taxonomy of Reinforcement Learning-Model Predictive Control Integration for Linear Systems
papers.summary: The integration of Model Predictive Control (MPC) and Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for constrained decision-making and adaptive control. MPC offers structured optimization, explicit constraint handling, and established stability tools, whereas RL provides data-driven adaptation and performance improvement in the presence of uncertainty and model mismatch. Despite the rapid growth of research on RL--MPC integration, the literature remains fragmented, particularly for control architectures built on linear or linearized predictive models. This paper presents a comprehensive Systematic Literature Review (SLR) of RL--MPC integrations for linear and linearized systems, covering peer-reviewed and formally indexed studies published until 2025. The reviewed studies are organized through a multi-dimensional taxonomy covering RL functional roles, RL algorithm classes, MPC formulations, cost-function structures, and application domains. In addition, a cross-dimensional synthesis is conducted to identify recurring design patterns and reported associations among these dimensions within the reviewed corpus. The review highlights methodological trends, commonly adopted integration strategies, and recurring practical challenges, including computational burden, sample efficiency, robustness, and closed-loop guarantees. The resulting synthesis provides a structured reference for researchers and practitioners seeking to design or analyze RL--MPC architectures based on linear or linearized predictive control formulations.

papers.title: Entropic regularization of Monge's problem
papers.summary: We study the vanishing-regularization limit of entropically regularized optimal transport (EOT) for the Euclidean distance cost $c(x,y)=\|x-y\|$ in dimension $d>1$. We develop a comprehensive variational convergence framework that entails two main results. First, we resolve the longstanding entropic selection problem: the EOT minimizer converges to a distinguished optimal transport plan that is characterized explicitly as the solution of a constrained EOT problem on each transport ray. Denoting by $\varepsilon>0$ the regularization parameter, this selection holds for all $o(\varepsilon)$-approximate minimizers, with sharp failure at the $O(\varepsilon)$ scale. Second, we establish an explicit second-order expansion of the entropic transport cost. The second-order term encodes the geometry of the regularization and reveals the optimal asymptotic tradeoff between entropy and transport cost.

ai.tldr: 研究了欧几里得距离代价下熵正则化最优传输在正则化参数趋于零时的极限行为，解决了熵选择问题并给出了成本的二阶展开。
ai.motivation: 理解熵正则化最优传输在消失正则化极限下的行为，特别是解决长期存在的熵选择问题。
ai.method: 建立了变分收敛框架，分析了所有o(ε)近似最小化器的收敛性，并推导了熵传输成本的显式二阶展开。
ai.result: 熵正则化最小化器收敛到一个特定的最优传输计划，该计划由每个传输射线上的约束EOT问题刻画；二阶展开揭示了正则化几何与最优熵-成本权衡。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解熵正则化在最优传输中的极限行为提供了严格的理论基础，有助于设计更高效的算法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用二阶展开项设计自适应正则化参数选择策略。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于特定代价函数，推广需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将熵正则化视为一种几何正则化，启发其他领域中的类似极限分析。

en.tldr: Studies the vanishing-regularization limit of entropically regularized optimal transport for Euclidean distance cost, resolves the entropic selection problem, and provides a second-order expansion of the transport cost.
en.motivation: To understand the behavior of entropic optimal transport in the limit of vanishing regularization, particularly to resolve the longstanding entropic selection problem.
en.method: Develops a variational convergence framework, analyzes convergence of all o(ε)-approximate minimizers, and derives an explicit second-order expansion of the entropic transport cost.

idea_spark.idea: Use the second-order expansion to design adaptive regularization parameter selection strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results depend on the specific cost function; generalization requires verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing entropic regularization as a geometric regularizer may inspire similar limit analyses in other fields.

papers.title: Gaussian fluctuations for Internal DLA on cylinders
papers.summary: Internal DLA is a discrete random growth model describing growing clusters of particles. Its limiting shape and fluctuations are well understood when the underlying graph is the $d$-dimensional lattice or the cylinder $\mathbb{Z}_N \times \mathbb{Z}$. In the latter geometry, the average fluctuations of IDLA have been shown to converge to the GFF. In this note we generalise this result by showing that, for any vertex-transitive base graph $V_N$ satisfying an eigenvalue convergence condition, the average fluctuations of IDLA on the cylinder $V_N \times \mathbb{Z}$ are given by a GFF. On the way, we present an improved bound on the clusters' maximal fluctuations, which is of independent interest and which implies a shape theorem for IDLA on $V_N \times \mathbb{Z}$ for any vertex-transitive base graph $V_N$.

ai.tldr: 本文证明在满足特征值收敛条件的顶点传递基图构成的圆柱上，内部扩散限制凝聚（IDLA）的平均涨落由高斯自由场（GFF）给出，并改进了簇的最大涨落界。
ai.motivation: 理解IDLA在圆柱图上的极限形状和涨落，并将已知的GFF收敛结果推广到更一般的顶点传递基图。
ai.method: 利用特征值收敛条件和随机游走分析，推导IDLA簇的涨落界，并证明平均涨落收敛到GFF。
ai.result: 对任意满足条件的顶点传递基图，IDLA在圆柱上的平均涨落由GFF描述；同时得到改进的最大涨落界和形状定理。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究随机增长模型在非平凡图上的涨落行为提供了理论工具和一般性结果。

idea_spark.idea: 探索IDLA在更复杂图（如随机图、分形图）上的涨落行为，或研究非平均涨落的精细结构。
idea_spark.risk: 特征值条件可能难以验证，且GFF收敛性对图结构敏感，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将IDLA的涨落与统计物理中的界面生长模型（如KPZ方程）对比，可能发现新的普适类。

en.tldr: This paper proves that for cylinders with vertex-transitive base graphs satisfying an eigenvalue convergence condition, the average fluctuations of Internal DLA converge to the Gaussian free field, and improves the bound on maximal fluctuations.
en.motivation: To understand the limiting shape and fluctuations of IDLA on cylinders and extend the known GFF convergence result to more general vertex-transitive base graphs.
en.method: Using eigenvalue convergence conditions and random walk analysis to derive fluctuation bounds for IDLA clusters and prove convergence of average fluctuations to the GFF.
en.result: For any vertex-transitive base graph satisfying the condition, the average fluctuations of IDLA on the cylinder are given by a GFF; improved maximal fluctuation bounds and a shape theorem are also obtained.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical tools and general results for studying fluctuations of random growth models on non-trivial graphs.

idea_spark.idea: Explore IDLA fluctuations on more complex graphs (e.g., random graphs, fractal graphs) or study fine structure beyond average fluctuations.
idea_spark.risk: Eigenvalue conditions may be hard to verify, and GFF convergence is sensitive to graph structure, so generalization requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Compare IDLA fluctuations with interface growth models in statistical physics (e.g., KPZ equation) to potentially discover new universality classes.

papers.title: Pre-process for segmentation task with nonlinear diffusion filters
papers.summary: This paper deals with the case of using nonlinear diffusion filters to obtain piecewise constant images as a previous process for segmentation techniques.   We first show an intrinsic formulation for the nonlinear diffusion equation to provide some design conditions on the diffusion filters. According to this theoretical framework, we propose a new family of diffusivities; they are obtained from nonlinear diffusion techniques and are related with backward diffusion. Their goal is to split the image in closed contours with a homogenized grey intensity inside and with no blurred edges.   We also prove that our filters satisfy the well-posedness semi-discrete and full discrete scale-space requirements. This shows that by using semi-implicit schemes, a forward nonlinear diffusion equation is solved, instead of a backward nonlinear diffusion equation, connecting with an edge-preserving process. Under the conditions established for the diffusivity and using a stopping criterion for the diffusion time, we get piecewise constant images with a low computational effort.   Finally, we test our filter with real images and we illustrate the effects of our diffusivity function as a method to get piecewise constant images.   The code is available at https://github.com/cplatero/NonlinearDiffusion.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于非线性扩散滤波的预处理方法，将图像转化为分段常数图像，以提升分割算法的效果。
ai.motivation: 分割任务中，原始图像往往包含噪声和细节，直接分割效果不佳。需要一种预处理方法，在保留边缘的同时平滑内部区域，得到分段常数图像。
ai.method: 从非线性扩散方程的内在形式出发，推导扩散滤波器的设计条件，并提出一族新的扩散率函数，结合反向扩散特性。采用半隐式格式求解前向非线性扩散方程，并设置停止准则，以低计算代价获得分段常数图像。
ai.result: 在真实图像上测试，所提滤波器能有效生成封闭轮廓、内部灰度均匀且边缘不模糊的分段常数图像，满足半离散和全离散尺度空间适定性要求。
ai.help_to_user: 如果你需要对图像进行分割，可以先使用该非线性扩散滤波器进行预处理，获得分段常数图像，从而简化后续分割步骤。

idea_spark.idea: 将扩散率函数与反向扩散结合，设计一种自适应停止准则，使得扩散过程在边缘处停止，在均匀区域快速平滑。
idea_spark.risk: 扩散时间停止准则的选取可能依赖经验，不同图像需要调整参数；反向扩散可能引入不稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受尺度空间理论和边缘保持滤波启发，将非线性扩散与分割预处理结合，利用半隐式格式保证数值稳定性。

en.tldr: Proposes a preprocessing method using nonlinear diffusion filters to obtain piecewise constant images for improved segmentation.
en.motivation: Raw images often contain noise and fine details that hinder segmentation. A preprocessing step that smooths interiors while preserving edges is needed to produce piecewise constant images.
en.method: Derives design conditions for diffusion filters from an intrinsic formulation of the nonlinear diffusion equation, and proposes a new family of diffusivities related to backward diffusion. Uses semi-implicit schemes to solve a forward nonlinear diffusion equation with a stopping criterion, achieving piecewise constant images with low computational cost.
en.result: Tests on real images show the filter produces closed contours with homogenized gray intensity inside and no blurred edges, satisfying semi-discrete and fully discrete scale-space well-posedness.
en.help_to_user: If you need to segment an image, you can first apply this nonlinear diffusion filter as preprocessing to obtain piecewise constant images, simplifying subsequent segmentation.

idea_spark.idea: Combine diffusivity functions with backward diffusion and design an adaptive stopping criterion that stops diffusion at edges while smoothing rapidly in uniform regions.
idea_spark.risk: The stopping criterion may require empirical tuning for different images; backward diffusion could introduce instability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by scale-space theory and edge-preserving filtering, combining nonlinear diffusion with segmentation preprocessing, using semi-implicit schemes for numerical stability.

papers.title: Causal Disentanglement for Full-Reference Image Quality Assessment
papers.summary: Existing deep network-based full-reference image quality assessment (FR-IQA) models typically work by performing pairwise comparisons of deep features from the reference and distorted images. In this paper, we approach this problem from a different perspective and propose a novel FR-IQA paradigm based on causal inference and decoupled representation learning. Unlike typical feature comparison-based FR-IQA models, our approach formulates degradation estimation as a causal disentanglement process guided by intervention on latent representations. We first decouple degradation and content representations by exploiting the content invariance between the reference and distorted images. Second, inspired by the human visual masking effect, we design a masking module to model the causal relationship between image content and degradation features, thereby extracting content-influenced degradation features from distorted images. Finally, quality scores are predicted from these degradation features using either supervised regression or label-free dimensionality reduction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves highly competitive performance on standard IQA benchmarks across fully supervised, few-label, and label-free settings. Furthermore, we evaluate the approach on diverse non-standard natural image domains with scarce data, including underwater, radiographic, medical, neutron, and screen-content images. Benefiting from its ability to perform scenario-specific training and prediction without labeled IQA data, our method exhibits superior cross-domain generalization compared to existing training-free FR-IQA models.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于因果推断和解耦表示学习的全参考图像质量评估新范式，通过干预潜在表征来估计退化，在多种场景下表现优异。
ai.motivation: 现有深度FR-IQA模型依赖特征比较，缺乏对退化与内容因果关系的建模，泛化能力有限。
ai.method: 利用参考与失真图像的内容不变性解耦退化与内容表征，设计掩码模块模拟视觉掩蔽效应，提取受内容影响的退化特征，最后通过监督回归或无标签降维预测质量分数。
ai.result: 在标准IQA基准上达到高度竞争性能，并在水下、放射、医学、中子、屏幕内容等非标准领域展现出优越的跨域泛化能力。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过因果解耦提升图像质量评估的准确性和跨域适应性。

idea_spark.idea: 将视觉掩蔽效应建模为因果掩码，实现内容感知的退化特征提取。
idea_spark.risk: 掩码模块设计可能依赖特定假设，在极端退化场景下失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类视觉系统启发，利用因果推断替代简单特征比较，提升模型可解释性和泛化性。

idea_spark.risk: 掩码模块设计可能依赖特定假设，在极端退化场景下失效。

en.tldr: Proposes a novel FR-IQA paradigm based on causal inference and decoupled representation learning, estimating degradation via intervention on latent representations, achieving strong performance across diverse settings.
en.motivation: Existing deep FR-IQA models rely on feature comparison, lacking causal modeling of degradation and content, limiting generalization.
en.method: Decouples degradation and content representations using content invariance between reference and distorted images, designs a masking module inspired by human visual masking to extract content-influenced degradation features, and predicts quality via supervised regression or label-free dimensionality reduction.
en.result: Achieves highly competitive performance on standard IQA benchmarks and superior cross-domain generalization on underwater, radiographic, medical, neutron, and screen-content images.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how causal disentanglement improves accuracy and cross-domain adaptability in image quality assessment.

idea_spark.idea: Model visual masking effect as a causal mask to extract content-aware degradation features.
idea_spark.risk: The masking module may rely on specific assumptions and fail under extreme degradation scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the human visual system, uses causal inference instead of simple feature comparison to enhance model interpretability and generalization.

papers.title: A microwave super-resolution imaging approach towards breast cancer margin mapping
papers.summary: Accurate characterisation of margins in excised breast cancer tumours is critical to the success of surgical interventions, yet margin status is typically confirmed post-operatively using histopathology. Here we present a new approach to intraoperative margin assessment based on microwave single pixel imaging, demonstrating tissue phantom hydration mapping across large areas (~10 cm x 10 cm) at ~1 mm resolution. By leveraging the photo-induced change in microwave transparency of a silicon modulator placed under the sample, we map the microwave reflectivity and identify positive margins with deeply sub-wavelength resolution. We test the discriminatory capabilities of our approach using gelatine-based tumour phantoms with variations in water density representative of the margin and cancerous tissues of a resected tumour. We demonstrate the capability to identify, locate and quantify inadequate margins up to the typically targeted minimum thickness of 2 mm. Furthermore, using numerical modelling, we show that our approach is expected to be resilient to patient-specific tissue differences. Our technique has potential for future deployment as a real-time intraoperative tissue margin analysis tool.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于微波单像素成像的术中切缘评估方法，利用硅调制器的光致微波透明性，实现大面积（~10 cm x 10 cm）约1 mm分辨率的组织水合映射，可识别2 mm厚度的阳性切缘。
ai.motivation: 乳腺癌手术中切缘状态的准确评估对手术成功至关重要，但传统组织病理学检查是术后进行的，缺乏术中实时评估手段。
ai.method: 将硅调制器置于样本下方，利用光致微波透明性变化，通过单像素成像映射微波反射率，以亚波长分辨率识别阳性切缘。使用明胶肿瘤模型验证，并借助数值建模评估对患者间组织差异的鲁棒性。
ai.result: 成功识别、定位并量化了最小2 mm厚度的不足切缘，数值模型表明该方法对患者特异性组织差异具有鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种潜在的术中实时切缘分析工具，帮助外科医生在手术中即时判断切缘状态，减少二次手术风险。

idea_spark.idea: 结合深度学习算法，从微波反射率数据中自动分割并分类切缘区域，实现全自动术中诊断。
idea_spark.risk: 硅调制器的光致响应速度可能限制实时成像帧率；组织水合变化与肿瘤边界的对应关系需更多临床验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用光控半导体材料实现微波透明性调制，为无标记、非接触式组织成像提供了新思路，可启发其他频段（如太赫兹）的类似设计。

en.tldr: A microwave single-pixel imaging approach for intraoperative margin assessment, leveraging photo-induced microwave transparency of a silicon modulator to map tissue hydration over large areas (~10 cm x 10 cm) at ~1 mm resolution, capable of identifying positive margins up to 2 mm thickness.
en.motivation: Accurate margin characterization in excised breast cancer tumors is critical for surgical success, but current histopathology is post-operative and lacks intraoperative real-time feedback.
en.method: A silicon modulator placed under the sample changes its microwave transparency upon photo-excitation; microwave reflectivity is mapped via single-pixel imaging to achieve deeply sub-wavelength resolution. Gelatin-based tumor phantoms with varying water density are used for validation, and numerical modeling assesses robustness to patient-specific tissue differences.
en.result: Inadequate margins down to 2 mm thickness are identified, located, and quantified; numerical modeling indicates resilience to inter-patient tissue variability.
en.help_to_user: Provides a potential real-time intraoperative margin analysis tool to help surgeons assess margin status during surgery, reducing the need for re-excision.

idea_spark.idea: Integrate deep learning to automatically segment and classify margin regions from microwave reflectivity data, enabling fully automated intraoperative diagnosis.
idea_spark.risk: The photo-response speed of the silicon modulator may limit real-time frame rates; correlation between tissue hydration changes and tumor boundaries requires further clinical validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using photo-controlled semiconductor materials to modulate microwave transparency offers a label-free, non-contact imaging paradigm that could inspire similar designs in other frequency bands (e.g., terahertz).

papers.title: Frozen LLMs as Map-Aware Spatio-Temporal Reasoners for Vehicle Trajectory Prediction
papers.summary: Large language models (LLMs) have recently demonstrated strong reasoning capabilities and attracted increasing research attention in the field of autonomous driving (AD). However, safe application of LLMs on AD perception and prediction still requires a thorough understanding of both the dynamic traffic agents and the static road infrastructure. To this end, this study introduces a framework to evaluate the capability of LLMs in understanding the behaviors of dynamic traffic agents and the topology of road networks. The framework leverages frozen LLMs as the reasoning engine, employing a traffic encoder to extract spatial-level scene features from observed trajectories of agents, while a lightweight Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) encodes the local high-definition (HD) maps. To assess the intrinsic reasoning ability of LLMs, the extracted scene features are then transformed into LLM-compatible tokens via a reprogramming adapter. By residing the prediction burden with the LLMs, a simpler linear decoder is applied to output future trajectories. The framework enables a quantitative analysis of the influence of multi-modal information, especially the impact of map semantics on trajectory prediction accuracy, and allows seamless integration of frozen LLMs with minimal adaptation, thereby demonstrating strong generalizability across diverse LLM architectures and providing a unified platform for model evaluation.

ai.tldr: 提出利用冻结的大语言模型作为地图感知的时空推理器，通过交通编码器和轻量CNN编码HD地图，实现车辆轨迹预测。
ai.motivation: 大语言模型在自动驾驶中具有推理潜力，但需理解动态交通和静态道路拓扑，现有方法缺乏对地图语义的深入利用。
ai.method: 使用冻结LLM作为推理引擎，交通编码器提取轨迹空间特征，CNN编码局部HD地图，通过重编程适配器将特征转为LLM令牌，线性解码器输出未来轨迹。
ai.result: 框架能定量分析多模态信息影响，特别是地图语义对预测精度的作用，且冻结LLM适应性强，跨架构泛化性好。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何将冻结LLM用于轨迹预测，并评估地图信息的重要性。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将地图语义与LLM推理结合，可能启发更高效的多模态融合方法。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖冻结LLM可能限制对复杂场景的适应，且重编程适配器可能丢失部分信息。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受LLM推理能力启发，可进一步研究如何利用预训练模型处理结构化空间数据。

en.tldr: Proposes using frozen LLMs as map-aware spatio-temporal reasoners for vehicle trajectory prediction, leveraging a traffic encoder and lightweight CNN for HD map encoding.
en.motivation: LLMs show reasoning potential in autonomous driving but need to understand dynamic traffic and static road topology; existing methods lack deep use of map semantics.
en.method: Uses frozen LLM as reasoning engine, traffic encoder extracts spatial features from trajectories, CNN encodes local HD maps, reprogramming adapter converts features to LLM tokens, linear decoder outputs future trajectories.
en.result: Framework enables quantitative analysis of multi-modal information impact, especially map semantics on prediction accuracy, with strong generalizability across LLM architectures.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to apply frozen LLMs for trajectory prediction and evaluate the importance of map information.

idea_spark.idea: Exploring integration of map semantics with LLM reasoning may inspire more efficient multi-modal fusion methods.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on frozen LLMs may limit adaptation to complex scenarios, and reprogramming adapter might lose some information.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by LLM reasoning capabilities, further research could leverage pretrained models for structured spatial data processing.

papers.title: Local Neighborhood Instability in Parametric Projections: Quantitative and Visual Analysis
papers.summary: Parametric projections let analysts embed new points in real time, but input variations from measurement noise or data drift can produce unpredictable shifts in the 2D layout. Whether and where a projection is locally stable remains largely unexamined. In this paper, we present a stability evaluation framework that probes parametric projections with Gaussian perturbations around selected anchor points and assesses how neighborhoods deform in the 2D embedding. Our approach combines quantitative measures of mean displacement, bias, and nearest-anchor assignment error with per-anchor visualizations of displacement vectors, local PCA ellipsoids, and Voronoi misassignment for detailed inspection. We demonstrate the framework's effectiveness on UMAP- and t-SNE-based neural projectors of varying network sizes and study the effect of Jacobian regularization as a gradient-based robustness strategy. We apply our framework to the MNIST and Fashion-MNIST datasets. The results show that our framework identifies unstable projection regions invisible to reconstruction error or neighborhood-preservation metrics.

ai.tldr: 提出一个评估参数化投影局部稳定性的框架，通过高斯扰动和邻域变形分析，识别出传统指标无法发现的投影不稳定区域。
ai.motivation: 参数化投影允许实时嵌入新点，但输入噪声或数据漂移会导致二维布局不可预测的偏移，而局部稳定性尚未被系统研究。
ai.method: 在锚点周围施加高斯扰动，计算平均位移、偏差和最近锚点分配误差，并结合位移向量、局部PCA椭球和Voronoi误分配可视化进行详细检查。
ai.result: 在MNIST和Fashion-MNIST上，框架成功识别了重建误差或邻域保持指标无法揭示的不稳定投影区域。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户识别参数化投影中不可靠的局部区域，从而更谨慎地解读嵌入结果。

idea_spark.idea: 结合Jacobian正则化作为梯度级鲁棒策略，可进一步优化投影稳定性。
idea_spark.risk: 高斯扰动假设可能不适用于非高斯噪声场景，需验证框架的泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将局部稳定性与下游任务（如分类、聚类）的可靠性关联，可能产生新的评估范式。

idea_spark.risk: 高斯扰动假设可能不适用于非高斯噪声场景，需验证框架的泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将局部稳定性与下游任务（如分类、聚类）的可靠性关联，可能产生新的评估范式。

en.tldr: Proposes a framework to evaluate local stability of parametric projections by probing with Gaussian perturbations and analyzing neighborhood deformation, revealing unstable regions invisible to traditional metrics.
en.motivation: Parametric projections enable real-time embedding of new points, but input noise or data drift can cause unpredictable shifts in 2D layout, and local stability remains largely unexamined.
en.method: Apply Gaussian perturbations around anchor points, compute mean displacement, bias, and nearest-anchor assignment error, combined with per-anchor visualizations of displacement vectors, local PCA ellipsoids, and Voronoi misassignment.
en.result: On MNIST and Fashion-MNIST, the framework identifies unstable projection regions that reconstruction error or neighborhood-preservation metrics fail to detect.
en.help_to_user: Helps users identify unreliable local regions in parametric projections, enabling more cautious interpretation of embeddings.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporating Jacobian regularization as a gradient-level robustness strategy can further optimize projection stability.
idea_spark.risk: Gaussian perturbation assumption may not hold for non-Gaussian noise scenarios; generalization needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Linking local stability to downstream task reliability (e.g., classification, clustering) could yield new evaluation paradigms.

papers.title: Optimization Workshop Notes for Mathematical Programming with Equilibrium Constraints (MPECs): Verification of MPEC Hypotheses
papers.summary: In this workshop, we present a compact but rigorous introduction to the basic language of nonlinear programming, variational inequalities, and complementarity systems. The goal is twofold. First, we explain the mathematical logic of hypotheses under which first-order optimality conditions for MPECs become valid. Second, we explain how to use that theory in research practice: how to classify a model, choose the appropriate verification route, prove the right hypotheses, and derive a correct first-order analysis.

ai.tldr: 本讲习班笔记紧凑而严谨地介绍了非线性规划、变分不等式和互补系统的基本语言，重点解释MPEC一阶最优性条件成立所需的假设逻辑，并指导如何在实际研究中验证这些假设。
ai.motivation: MPEC问题的一阶最优性条件依赖于若干假设，但现有文献对假设的逻辑关系和验证路径缺乏系统梳理，导致研究者难以正确应用。
ai.method: 从非线性规划、变分不等式和互补系统的基础语言出发，逐步构建MPEC假设的数学逻辑，并给出分类模型、选择验证路径、证明假设和推导一阶分析的实用步骤。
ai.result: 提供了一套清晰的假设验证框架，使研究者能够正确判断MPEC模型是否满足一阶最优性条件。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解MPEC假设的数学基础，并掌握在实际研究中验证这些假设的系统方法。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个自动化工具，根据用户输入的MPEC模型自动推荐需要验证的假设并生成证明草图。
idea_spark.risk: 自动化工具可能过度简化假设的数学细节，导致用户忽略关键条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将假设验证过程模块化，类似软件测试中的单元测试，每个假设对应一个可独立检查的模块。

zh.tldr: 本讲习班笔记紧凑而严谨地介绍了非线性规划、变分不等式和互补系统的基本语言，重点解释MPEC一阶最优性条件成立所需的假设逻辑，并指导如何在实际研究中验证这些假设。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个自动化工具，根据用户输入的MPEC模型自动推荐需要验证的假设并生成证明草图。
idea_spark.risk: 自动化工具可能过度简化假设的数学细节，导致用户忽略关键条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将假设验证过程模块化，类似软件测试中的单元测试，每个假设对应一个可独立检查的模块。

en.tldr: This workshop note provides a compact yet rigorous introduction to the basic language of nonlinear programming, variational inequalities, and complementarity systems, focusing on the logic of hypotheses for first-order optimality conditions of MPECs and how to verify them in research practice.
en.motivation: First-order optimality conditions for MPECs rely on several hypotheses, but the logical relationships and verification paths are not systematically covered, making correct application difficult for researchers.
en.method: Starting from the basic language of nonlinear programming, variational inequalities, and complementarity systems, we build the mathematical logic of MPEC hypotheses and provide practical steps for model classification, verification route selection, hypothesis proof, and first-order analysis derivation.
en.result: A clear hypothesis verification framework is provided, enabling researchers to correctly determine whether an MPEC model satisfies first-order optimality conditions.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the mathematical foundation of MPEC hypotheses and master a systematic method for verifying them in their own research.

idea_spark.idea: Develop an automated tool that, given a user-input MPEC model, recommends which hypotheses need verification and generates proof sketches.
idea_spark.risk: Automation may oversimplify the mathematical details of hypotheses, causing users to overlook critical conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Modularize the hypothesis verification process, similar to unit testing in software engineering, where each hypothesis corresponds to an independently checkable module.

papers.title: Generalized String-Stability Criteria for Consensus Protocols
papers.summary: This paper presents a unified string-stability framework for leader-follower multi-agent systems governed by first-, second-, and m-th order consensus protocols operating under an r-predecessor directed communication topology. While string stability has been extensively studied for specific vehicle models and individual consensus protocols, existing results remain fragmented across protocol orders and do not identify the fundamental factors governing disturbance amplification or attenuation. This work shows that, for all consensus orders, string stability is dictated solely by the communication richness r, while the protocol order m influences only the mid-frequency transient behavior. In particular, the low-frequency gain of the disturbance propagation coefficient is inversely proportional to r for every m, implying that higher-order consensus cannot overcome the structural limitation imposed by insufficient communication and that, under the adopted H-infinity-based string-stability definition and the present framework, string stability is achievable if and only if r >= 2. This establishes a structural-dynamic separation principle that unifies and generalizes classical platoon results, providing new insight into the interplay between topology and controller design in cooperative driving and multi-agent coordination. The framework is developed under idealized identical-agent and fixed-topology assumptions, providing a baseline for future robust extensions. Numerical simulations corroborate the analysis and illustrate how m and r jointly shape disturbance propagation along the formation.

ai.tldr: 本文针对一阶、二阶及m阶一致性协议下的领导者-跟随者多智能体系统，提出了统一的弦稳定性框架，发现弦稳定性仅由通信丰富度r决定，而协议阶数m仅影响中频瞬态行为。
ai.motivation: 现有弦稳定性研究针对特定车辆模型和一致性协议，结果碎片化，缺乏统一框架来识别扰动放大或衰减的根本因素。
ai.method: 基于H无穷弦稳定性定义，分析r-前驱有向通信拓扑下不同阶数一致性协议的扰动传播系数，建立结构-动态分离原理。
ai.result: 弦稳定性当且仅当r≥2时可达；低频频段扰动传播系数与r成反比，高阶协议无法弥补通信不足的结构限制。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解通信拓扑与控制器设计在协同驾驶和多智能体协调中的相互作用，为实际系统设计提供理论基线。

idea_spark.idea: 将通信丰富度作为设计变量，在固定拓扑下优化控制器以改善中频瞬态响应。
idea_spark.risk: 理想化假设（同质智能体、固定拓扑）可能限制实际应用中的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受通信拓扑对稳定性决定性作用的启发，可探索自适应通信策略以动态调整r。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解通信拓扑与控制器设计在协同驾驶和多智能体协调中的相互作用，为实际系统设计提供理论基线。

idea_spark.idea: 将通信丰富度作为设计变量，在固定拓扑下优化控制器以改善中频瞬态响应。
idea_spark.risk: 理想化假设（同质智能体、固定拓扑）可能限制实际应用中的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受通信拓扑对稳定性决定性作用的启发，可探索自适应通信策略以动态调整r。

en.tldr: This paper presents a unified string-stability framework for leader-follower multi-agent systems under consensus protocols of various orders, showing that string stability is solely dictated by communication richness r and achievable iff r≥2.
en.motivation: Existing string-stability results are fragmented across specific vehicle models and consensus orders, lacking a unified understanding of fundamental factors governing disturbance amplification or attenuation.
en.method: Using an H-infinity-based string-stability definition, the disturbance propagation coefficient is analyzed for r-predecessor directed topologies across first-, second-, and m-th order consensus protocols, establishing a structural-dynamic separation principle.
en.result: String stability is achievable if and only if r≥2; the low-frequency gain of disturbance propagation is inversely proportional to r, and higher-order consensus cannot overcome insufficient communication.
en.help_to_user: Provides a baseline understanding of how communication topology and controller design interact in cooperative driving and multi-agent coordination.

idea_spark.idea: Use communication richness r as a design variable and optimize controllers to improve mid-frequency transient response under fixed topology.
idea_spark.risk: Idealized assumptions (identical agents, fixed topology) may limit robustness in real-world applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the decisive role of communication topology, explore adaptive communication strategies to dynamically adjust r.

papers.title: Back to Source: Open-Set Continual Test-Time Adaptation via Domain Compensation
papers.summary: Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) aims to mitigate distributional shifts between training and test domains during inference time. However, existing TTA methods fall short in the realistic scenario where models face both continually changing domains and the simultaneous emergence of unknown semantic classes, a challenging setting we term Open-set Continual Test-Time Adaptation (OCTTA). The coupling of domain and semantic shifts often collapses the feature space, severely degrading both classification and out-of-distribution detection. To tackle this, we propose DOmain COmpensation (DOCO), a lightweight and effective framework that robustly performs domain adaptation and OOD detection in a synergistic, closed loop. DOCO first performs dynamic, adaptation-conditioned sample splitting to separate likely ID from OOD samples. Then, using only the ID samples, it learns a domain compensation prompt by aligning feature statistics with the source domain, guided by a structural preservation regularizer that prevents semantic distortion. This learned prompt is then propagated to the OOD samples within the same batch, effectively isolating their semantic novelty for more reliable detection. Extensive experiments on multiple challenging benchmarks demonstrate that DOCO outperforms prior CTTA and OSTTA methods, establishing a new state-of-the-art for the demanding OCTTA setting.

ai.tldr: 提出DOCO框架，通过域补偿提示和结构保持正则化，在开放集持续测试时适应中同时处理域偏移和语义偏移。
ai.motivation: 现有测试时适应方法无法应对域持续变化和未知语义类同时出现的现实场景，导致特征空间崩溃和分类/检测性能严重下降。
ai.method: DOCO首先根据适应状态动态划分样本为ID和OOD；仅用ID样本学习域补偿提示，通过特征统计对齐源域并加入结构保持正则化防止语义失真；然后将提示传播给同批次OOD样本，隔离语义新颖性以提升检测可靠性。
ai.result: 在多个基准上超越先前CTTA和OSTTA方法，在OCTTA设定下达到新最优。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在测试时同时应对域变化和未知类别，提升模型在动态开放环境中的鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用动态样本划分和提示传播，将域适应与OOD检测协同优化，形成闭环。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖批次内样本统计，可能受小批次或极端域偏移影响；提示传播假设ID和OOD共享域特征，若语义差异过大可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从域适应中特征对齐和提示学习获得启发，结合开放集检测的样本分离策略。

idea_spark.idea: 利用动态样本划分和提示传播，将域适应与OOD检测协同优化，形成闭环。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖批次内样本统计，可能受小批次或极端域偏移影响；提示传播假设ID和OOD共享域特征，若语义差异过大可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从域适应中特征对齐和提示学习获得启发，结合开放集检测的样本分离策略。

en.tldr: Proposes DOCO framework that handles both domain and semantic shifts in open-set continual test-time adaptation via domain compensation prompts and structural preservation regularization.
en.motivation: Existing TTA methods fail in realistic scenarios with continually changing domains and unknown semantic classes, causing feature space collapse and severe degradation in classification and OOD detection.
en.method: DOCO dynamically splits samples into ID and OOD based on adaptation status; learns a domain compensation prompt from ID samples by aligning feature statistics with source domain and applying structural preservation regularization; then propagates the prompt to OOD samples in the same batch to isolate semantic novelty for reliable detection.
en.result: Outperforms prior CTTA and OSTTA methods on multiple benchmarks, achieving new state-of-the-art for OCTTA.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to simultaneously handle domain changes and unknown classes at test time, improving model robustness in dynamic open environments.

idea_spark.idea: Leverages dynamic sample splitting and prompt propagation to synergistically optimize domain adaptation and OOD detection in a closed loop.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on batch-level statistics, which may be unstable with small batches or extreme domain shifts; prompt propagation assumes shared domain features between ID and OOD, which may fail if semantic differences are too large.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by feature alignment and prompt learning in domain adaptation, combined with sample separation strategies from open-set detection.

papers.title: an interpretable vision transformer framework for automated brain tumor classification
papers.summary: Brain tumors represent one of the most critical neurological conditions, where early and accurate diagnosis is directly correlated with patient survival rates. Manual interpretation of Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) scans is time-intensive, subject to inter-observer variability, and demands significant specialist expertise. This paper proposes a deep learning framework for automated four-class brain tumor classification distinguishing glioma, meningioma, pituitary tumor, and healthy brain tissue from a dataset of 7,023 MRI scans. The proposed system employs a Vision Transformer (ViT-B/16) pretrained on ImageNet-21k as the backbone, augmented with a clinically motivated preprocessing and training pipeline. Contrast Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization (CLAHE) is applied to enhance local contrast and accentuate tumor boundaries invisible to standard normalization. A two-stage fine-tuning strategy is adopted: the classification head is warmed up with the backbone frozen, followed by full fine-tuning with discriminative learning rates. MixUp and CutMix augmentation is applied per batch to improve generalization. Exponential Moving Average (EMA) of weights and Test-Time Augmentation (TTA) further stabilize and boost performance. Attention Rollout visualization provides clinically interpretable heatmaps of the brain regions driving each prediction. The proposed model achieves a test accuracy of 99.29%, macro F1-score of 99.25%, and perfect recall on both healthy and meningioma classes, outperforming all CNN-based baselines

ai.tldr: 提出一个基于Vision Transformer的脑肿瘤四分类框架，在7023张MRI扫描上达到99.29%准确率，并利用注意力展开提供可解释热图。
ai.motivation: 手动解读MRI耗时且存在观察者间差异，需要自动化、高精度且可解释的分类方法。
ai.method: 采用ImageNet-21k预训练的ViT-B/16，结合CLAHE增强、两阶段微调、MixUp/CutMix增强、EMA权重和测试时增强，最后用Attention Rollout生成热图。
ai.result: 测试准确率99.29%，宏F1 99.25%，健康与脑膜瘤类别召回率100%，优于所有CNN基线。
ai.help_to_user: 提供可直接用于脑肿瘤MRI分类的深度学习框架，附带可解释性可视化。

idea_spark.idea: 将Attention Rollout与临床报告生成结合，实现端到端可解释诊断。
idea_spark.risk: 数据集规模有限（7023张），可能影响泛化性；CLAHE参数需针对不同MRI序列调整。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用ViT的自注意力机制进行病灶定位，启发弱监督分割方法。

en.tldr: Proposes a Vision Transformer framework for four-class brain tumor classification, achieving 99.29% accuracy on 7,023 MRI scans with interpretable heatmaps via Attention Rollout.
en.motivation: Manual MRI interpretation is time-consuming and subject to inter-observer variability, requiring automated, accurate, and interpretable classification.
en.method: Uses ImageNet-21k pretrained ViT-B/16 with CLAHE enhancement, two-stage fine-tuning, MixUp/CutMix augmentation, EMA weights, and test-time augmentation, with Attention Rollout for heatmaps.
en.result: Test accuracy 99.29%, macro F1 99.25%, perfect recall on healthy and meningioma classes, outperforming all CNN baselines.
en.help_to_user: Provides a ready-to-use deep learning framework for brain tumor MRI classification with interpretability visualizations.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Attention Rollout with clinical report generation for end-to-end interpretable diagnosis.
idea_spark.risk: Limited dataset size (7,023 scans) may affect generalization; CLAHE parameters need tuning for different MRI sequences.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging ViT's self-attention for lesion localization inspires weakly-supervised segmentation methods.

papers.title: Symbolic Grounding Reveals Representational Bottlenecks in Abstract Visual Reasoning
papers.summary: Vision--language models (VLMs) often fail on abstract visual reasoning benchmarks such as Bongard problems, raising the question of whether the main bottleneck lies in reasoning or representation. We study this on Bongard-LOGO, a synthetic benchmark of abstract concept learning with ground-truth generative programs, by comparing end-to-end VLMs on raw images with large language models (LLMs) given symbolic inputs derived from those images. Using symbolic inputs as a diagnostic probe rather than a practical multimodal architecture, our \emph{Componential--Grammatical (C--G)} paradigm reformulates Bongard-LOGO as a symbolic reasoning task based on LOGO-style action programs or structured descriptions. LLMs achieve large and consistent gains, reaching mid--90s accuracy on Free-form problems, while a strong visual baseline remains near chance under matched task definitions. Ablations on input format, explicit concept prompts, and minimal visual grounding show that these factors matter much less than the shift from pixels to symbolic structure. These results identify representation as a key bottleneck in abstract visual reasoning and show how symbolic input can serve as a controlled diagnostic upper bound.

ai.tldr: 通过符号化输入诊断，发现视觉-语言模型在抽象视觉推理中的主要瓶颈是表征而非推理。
ai.motivation: 视觉-语言模型在Bongard等抽象视觉推理基准上表现不佳，但瓶颈在于推理能力还是视觉表征尚不明确。
ai.method: 提出组件-语法（C-G）范式，将Bongard-LOGO问题转化为基于LOGO动作程序或结构化描述的符号推理任务，用符号输入作为诊断探针。
ai.result: 大语言模型在符号输入下达到90%以上准确率，而强视觉基线在匹配任务定义下接近随机水平。输入格式、概念提示和最小视觉接地的影响远小于从像素到符号结构的转变。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解抽象视觉推理中表征瓶颈的关键作用，并展示符号输入可作为可控诊断上限。

idea_spark.idea: 结合符号化中间表征与端到端学习，设计混合架构以缓解表征瓶颈。
idea_spark.risk: 符号化过程可能丢失细微视觉信息，且依赖人工设计的符号空间。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受认知科学中符号接地问题启发，将视觉输入转化为结构化符号以隔离推理与表征因素。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受认知科学中符号接地问题启发，将视觉输入转化为结构化符号以隔离推理与表征因素。

en.tldr: Using symbolic inputs as a diagnostic probe, we find that the main bottleneck in abstract visual reasoning for VLMs is representation, not reasoning.
en.motivation: VLMs often fail on abstract visual reasoning benchmarks like Bongard problems, but it is unclear whether the bottleneck lies in reasoning or representation.
en.method: We propose the Componential-Grammatical (C-G) paradigm, reformulating Bongard-LOGO as a symbolic reasoning task based on LOGO-style action programs or structured descriptions, using symbolic inputs as a diagnostic probe.
en.result: LLMs achieve mid-90s accuracy on symbolic inputs, while a strong visual baseline remains near chance under matched task definitions. Input format, explicit concept prompts, and minimal visual grounding matter much less than the shift from pixels to symbolic structure.
en.help_to_user: Helps identify representation as a key bottleneck in abstract visual reasoning and demonstrates symbolic input as a controlled diagnostic upper bound.

idea_spark.idea: Combine symbolic intermediate representations with end-to-end learning to design hybrid architectures that alleviate the representation bottleneck.
idea_spark.risk: Symbolization may lose subtle visual information and relies on manually designed symbolic spaces.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the symbol grounding problem in cognitive science, we transform visual input into structured symbols to isolate reasoning and representation factors.

papers.title: Adaptive Test-Time Compute Allocation with Evolving In-Context Demonstrations
papers.summary: While scaling test-time compute can substantially improve model performance, existing approaches either rely on static compute allocation or sample from fixed generation distributions. In this work, we introduce a test-time compute allocation framework that jointly adapts where computation is spent and how generation is performed. Our method begins with a warm-up phase that identifies easy queries and assembles an initial pool of question-response pairs from the test set itself. An adaptive phase then concentrates further computation on unresolved queries while reshaping their generation distributions through evolving in-context demonstrations -- conditioning each generation on successful responses from semantically related queries rather than resampling from a fixed distribution. Experiments across math, coding, and reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms existing baselines while consuming substantially less inference-time compute.

ai.tldr: 提出一种自适应测试时计算分配框架，通过热身阶段识别简单查询并构建初始问答池，再在自适应阶段利用动态上下文示例集中计算资源解决未解问题，同时重塑生成分布。
ai.motivation: 现有测试时计算扩展方法要么使用静态分配，要么从固定生成分布中采样，缺乏对计算位置和生成方式的自适应调整。
ai.method: 热身阶段识别简单查询并构建初始问答池；自适应阶段对未解查询集中计算，并通过语义相关查询的成功响应动态更新上下文示例，从而改变生成分布。
ai.result: 在数学、编程和推理基准上，该方法在显著减少推理计算量的同时，持续优于现有基线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不增加过多计算成本的前提下，通过自适应分配和动态示例提升模型推理性能。

idea_spark.idea: 将热身阶段与自适应阶段结合，利用测试集自身构建动态示例池，避免依赖外部数据。
idea_spark.risk: 热身阶段对简单查询的识别可能不准确，导致计算资源浪费；动态示例的语义检索可能引入噪声。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类解题时先做简单题再攻克难题的策略启发，以及利用成功经验调整解题思路的认知过程。

idea_spark.risk: 热身阶段对简单查询的识别可能不准确，导致计算资源浪费；动态示例的语义检索可能引入噪声。

en.tldr: Proposes an adaptive test-time compute allocation framework that first identifies easy queries and builds an initial pool via a warm-up phase, then concentrates computation on unresolved queries while reshaping generation distributions through evolving in-context demonstrations.
en.motivation: Existing test-time compute scaling methods either use static allocation or sample from fixed generation distributions, lacking adaptation in where computation is spent and how generation is performed.
en.method: Warm-up phase identifies easy queries and assembles an initial pool of question-response pairs from the test set; adaptive phase focuses computation on unresolved queries and reshapes generation distributions by conditioning on successful responses from semantically related queries.
en.result: Consistently outperforms existing baselines on math, coding, and reasoning benchmarks while consuming substantially less inference-time compute.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to improve model reasoning performance without significantly increasing computational cost, through adaptive allocation and dynamic demonstrations.

idea_spark.idea: Combine a warm-up phase with an adaptive phase, using the test set itself to build a dynamic demonstration pool, avoiding reliance on external data.
idea_spark.risk: Inaccurate identification of easy queries in the warm-up phase may waste computation; semantic retrieval for dynamic demonstrations may introduce noise.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the human strategy of solving easy problems first before tackling hard ones, and using successful experiences to adjust problem-solving approaches.

papers.title: Integrated packing, placement, scheduling, and routing of personalized production: a pharmaceutical Industry 4.0 use-case with a planar transport system
papers.summary: The recent emergence of planar transport systems necessitates re-evaluation of Flexible Manufacturing Systems (FMS) to address the simultaneous scheduling of internal logistics and production operations. By operating on a tile-based planar grid, these systems allow independent movers full two-dimensional freedom, mitigating inefficiencies inherent to traditional sequential lines. This paper applies a planar FMS framework to a real-world use case in the pharmaceutical industry: the automated production of personalized drugs.   Implementing this system requires solving optimization problems at both tactical and operational levels. The tactical level involves decisions regarding production line layout and the positioning of drug dispensers. A Mixed-Integer Quadratic Programming model is utilized for the packing problem to exploit drug co-occurrence patterns found in historical patient data. Subsequently, we solve the placement problem - a bi-level problem combining an assignment problem with Shortest Hamiltonian paths with neighborhoods - to arrange dispensers in a layout minimizing expected travel distances.   The operational level is encountered daily, scheduling individual movers to process new orders as quickly as possible. This scheduling problem is formulated using Constraint Programming, modeling movers as reservoir resources to ensure order completeness, complemented by a routing phase using an iterative conflict-resolution mechanism and DAG-based reasoning to convert schedules into conflict-free paths.   Evaluation using real-world prescription data for 40 drugs shows the framework scales efficiently across several layout topologies for up to 500 orders, with schedules that are highly effective and computationally tractable for daily operations.

ai.tldr: 针对个性化药物生产，提出集成包装、布局、调度和路由的平面运输系统框架，在工业4.0背景下实现高效柔性制造。
ai.motivation: 平面运输系统带来新的调度挑战，传统顺序生产线效率低下，需要同时优化内部物流和生产操作。
ai.method: 战术层使用混合整数二次规划解决包装问题，并采用双层优化（分配+最短哈密顿路径）进行布局；操作层使用约束规划调度移动器，结合迭代冲突消解和有向无环图推理生成无冲突路径。
ai.result: 基于40种药物的真实处方数据，框架在多种布局拓扑下可扩展至500个订单，调度高效且计算可行。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何将平面运输系统应用于个性化制药，并掌握集成优化方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用历史数据中的药物共现模式优化包装布局，减少移动距离。
idea_spark.risk: 实际生产中的动态订单变化可能影响布局和调度方案的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将移动器建模为水库资源，结合DAG推理解决冲突，为多智能体路径规划提供新思路。

zh.tldr: 针对个性化药物生产，提出集成包装、布局、调度和路由的平面运输系统框架，在工业4.0背景下实现高效柔性制造。
zh.motivation: 平面运输系统带来新的调度挑战，传统顺序生产线效率低下，需要同时优化内部物流和生产操作。
zh.method: 战术层使用混合整数二次规划解决包装问题，并采用双层优化（分配+最短哈密顿路径）进行布局；操作层使用约束规划调度移动器，结合迭代冲突消解和有向无环图推理生成无冲突路径。
zh.result: 基于40种药物的真实处方数据，框架在多种布局拓扑下可扩展至500个订单，调度高效且计算可行。
