en.tldr: This paper studies a quasilinear elliptic inequality with gradient terms on weighted graphs, establishing sharp volume growth conditions for the nonexistence of nontrivial positive solutions, as a discrete generalization of results on Riemannian manifolds.
en.motivation: To extend Liouville-type results from Riemannian manifolds to discrete weighted graphs, highlighting differences between continuous and discrete settings.
en.method: Analyzing parameter ranges (m,p,q) and using volume growth conditions on weighted graphs to prove nonexistence of nontrivial positive solutions.
en.result: Sharp volume growth conditions are derived under which no nontrivial positive solutions exist, with some results differing significantly from the manifold case.
en.help_to_user: Provides a Liouville-type theoretical foundation for nonlinear elliptic equations on weighted graphs, aiding understanding of solution properties in discrete spaces.

idea_spark.idea: Replace volume growth conditions with other geometric quantities (e.g., Cheeger constant) to obtain new nonexistence results.
idea_spark.risk: Discrete graphs lack smooth structure, making direct analogies with manifold techniques challenging.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying the interaction of gradient terms and nonlinearities to diffusion processes or network dynamics on graphs.

papers.title: Temporal Prototyping and Hierarchical Alignment for Unsupervised Video-based Visible-Infrared Person Re-Identification
papers.summary: Visible-infrared person re-identification (VI-ReID) enables cross-modality identity matching for all-day surveillance, yet existing methods predominantly focus on the image level or rely heavily on costly identity annotations. While video-based VI-ReID has recently emerged to exploit temporal dynamics for improved robustness, existing studies remain limited to supervised settings. Crucially, the unsupervised video VI-ReID problem, where models must learn from RGB and infrared tracklets without identity labels, remains largely unexplored despite its practical importance in real-world deployment. To bridge this gap, we propose HiTPro (Hierarchical Temporal Prototyping), a prototype-driven framework without explicit hard pseudo-label assignment for unsupervised video-based VI-ReID. HiTPro begins with an efficient Temporal-aware Feature Encoder that first extracts discriminative frame-level features and then aggregates them into a robust tracklet-level representation. Building upon these features, HiTPro first constructs reliable intra-camera prototypes via Intra-Camera Tracklet Prototyping by aggregating features from temporally partitioned sub-tracklets. Through Hierarchical Cross-Prototype Alignment, we perform a two-stage positive mining process: progressing from within-modality associations to cross-modality matching, enhanced by Dynamic Threshold Strategy and Soft Weight Assignment. Finally, {Hierarchical Contrastive Learning} progressively optimizes feature-prototype alignment across three levels: intra-camera discrimination, cross-camera same-modality consistency, and cross-modality invariance. Extensive experiments on HITSZ-VCM and BUPTCampus demonstrate that HiTPro achieves state-of-the-art performance under fully unsupervised settings, significantly outperforming adapted baselines and establishes a strong baseline for future research.

ai.tldr: 提出HiTPro框架，无需身份标签即可从RGB和红外视频序列中学习跨模态行人重识别。
ai.motivation: 现有视频VI-ReID方法依赖昂贵身份标注，且无监督视频VI-ReID问题尚未被探索。
ai.method: 通过时间感知特征编码器提取帧级特征并聚合为轨迹级表示；利用帧内相机轨迹原型构建可靠原型；通过层次化跨原型对齐进行两阶段正样本挖掘（模内→跨模），结合动态阈值和软权重分配；最后用层次化对比学习优化三级对齐（帧内相机、跨相机同模、跨模）。
ai.result: 在HITSZ-VCM和BUPTCampus数据集上达到全无监督设置下的最优性能，显著优于基线方法。
ai.help_to_user: 可用于全天候监控场景下的无标签行人检索，降低标注成本。

idea_spark.idea: 将时间分割子轨迹用于原型构建，结合软权重避免硬伪标签噪声。
idea_spark.risk: 原型质量依赖时间分割策略，若轨迹长度变化大可能影响稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从时间维度分解轨迹并逐步对齐模内/跨模关系，启发无监督多模态学习中的渐进式对齐设计。

zh.tldr: 提出HiTPro框架，无需身份标签即可从RGB和红外视频序列中学习跨模态行人重识别。
zh.motivation: 现有视频VI-ReID方法依赖昂贵身份标注，且无监督视频VI-ReID问题尚未被探索。
zh.method: 通过时间感知特征编码器提取帧级特征并聚合为轨迹级表示；利用帧内相机轨迹原型构建可靠原型；通过层次化跨原型对齐进行两阶段正样本挖掘（模内→跨模），结合动态阈值和软权重分配；最后用层次化对比学习优化三级对齐（帧内相机、跨相机同模、跨模）。
zh.result: 在HITSZ-VCM和BUPTCampus数据集上达到全无监督设置下的最优性能，显著优于基线方法。
zh.help_to_user: 可用于全天候监控场景下的无标签行人检索，降低标注成本。

idea_spark.idea: 将时间分割子轨迹用于原型构建，结合软权重避免硬伪标签噪声。
idea_spark.risk: 原型质量依赖时间分割策略，若轨迹长度变化大可能影响稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从时间维度分解轨迹并逐步对齐模内/跨模关系，启发无监督多模态学习中的渐进式对齐设计。

en.tldr: Proposes HiTPro, a prototype-driven framework for unsupervised video-based visible-infrared person re-identification without identity labels.
en.motivation: Existing video VI-ReID methods rely on costly identity annotations, and the unsupervised video VI-ReID problem remains unexplored.
en.method: Uses a temporal-aware feature encoder to extract frame-level features and aggregate into tracklet-level representations; constructs reliable intra-camera prototypes via intra-camera tracklet prototyping; performs two-stage positive mining via hierarchical cross-prototype alignment (within-modality to cross-modality) with dynamic threshold and soft weight assignment; optimizes feature-prototype alignment via hierarchical contrastive learning at three levels (intra-camera, cross-camera same-modality, cross-modality).
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on HITSZ-VCM and BUPTCampus under fully unsupervised settings, significantly outperforming baselines.
en.help_to_user: Enables label-free person retrieval in all-day surveillance scenarios, reducing annotation cost.

idea_spark.idea: Use temporally partitioned sub-tracklets for prototype construction with soft weights to avoid hard pseudo-label noise.
idea_spark.risk: Prototype quality depends on temporal partitioning strategy; may be unstable with varying tracklet lengths.
idea_spark.inspiration: Decomposing tracklets temporally and progressively aligning intra-/cross-modality relations inspires gradual alignment design in unsupervised multi-modal learning.

papers.title: ReaGeo: Reasoning-Enhanced End-to-End Geocoding with LLMs
papers.summary: This paper proposes ReaGeo, an end-to-end geocoding framework based on large language models, designed to overcome the limitations of traditional multi-stage approaches that rely on text or vector similarity retrieval over geographic databases, including workflow complexity, error propagation, and heavy dependence on structured geographic knowledge bases. The method converts geographic coordinates into geohash sequences, reformulating the coordinate prediction task as a text generation problem, and introduces a Chain-of-Thought mechanism to enhance the model's reasoning over spatial relationships. Furthermore, reinforcement learning with a distance-deviation-based reward is applied to optimize the generation accuracy. Comprehensive experiments show that ReaGeo can accurately handle explicit address queries in single-point predictions and effectively resolve vague relative location queries. In addition, the model demonstrates strong predictive capability for non-point geometric regions, highlighting its versatility and generalization ability in geocoding tasks.

ai.tldr: 提出ReaGeo，一种基于大语言模型的端到端地理编码框架，将坐标预测转化为文本生成任务，结合思维链和强化学习，提升空间关系推理和预测精度。
ai.motivation: 传统多阶段地理编码方法依赖文本或向量相似度检索，存在流程复杂、错误传播、高度依赖结构化地理知识库等问题。
ai.method: 将地理坐标转换为geohash序列，把坐标预测转化为文本生成；引入思维链机制增强空间关系推理；使用基于距离偏差的奖励进行强化学习优化。
ai.result: 能准确处理显式地址查询的单点预测，有效解决模糊相对位置查询，并对非点状几何区域展现出强预测能力。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用LLM进行端到端地理编码，以及如何通过思维链和强化学习提升空间推理能力。

idea_spark.idea: 结合思维链和强化学习优化空间推理，可进一步探索多模态输入（如地图图像）下的地理编码。
idea_spark.risk: geohash序列的精度有限，可能影响高精度应用；强化学习奖励设计需谨慎，避免过拟合。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将结构化预测任务转化为文本生成，并利用LLM的推理能力，为其他结构化输出任务（如时间序列预测）提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes ReaGeo, an end-to-end geocoding framework based on large language models, converting coordinate prediction into text generation with Chain-of-Thought and reinforcement learning to enhance spatial reasoning and accuracy.
en.motivation: Traditional multi-stage geocoding methods rely on text or vector similarity retrieval, suffering from workflow complexity, error propagation, and heavy dependence on structured geographic knowledge bases.
en.method: Converts geographic coordinates into geohash sequences, reformulating coordinate prediction as text generation; introduces Chain-of-Thought for spatial reasoning; applies reinforcement learning with distance-deviation reward to optimize generation.
en.result: Accurately handles explicit address queries in single-point predictions, effectively resolves vague relative location queries, and demonstrates strong predictive capability for non-point geometric regions.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage LLMs for end-to-end geocoding and how Chain-of-Thought and reinforcement learning can improve spatial reasoning.

idea_spark.idea: Combining Chain-of-Thought and reinforcement learning for spatial reasoning could be extended to multimodal inputs (e.g., map images) for geocoding.
idea_spark.risk: Geohash sequences have limited precision, potentially affecting high-accuracy applications; reinforcement learning reward design needs caution to avoid overfitting.
idea_spark.inspiration: Transforming structured prediction tasks into text generation and leveraging LLM reasoning offers new ideas for other structured output tasks, such as time series prediction.

papers.title: Large deviations for non-irreducible Markov chains on Euclidean spaces
papers.summary: We establish the weak large deviations principle for empirical measures of Markov chains on $\mathbb R^d$ under mild assumptions. In particular, no irreducibility is assumed and the initial measure may be arbitrary. The proof is entirely self-contained and relies on subadditivity. In the absence of irreducibility, examples show that the rate function is not convex in general.

ai.tldr: 在温和假设下，为非不可约马尔可夫链建立了经验测度的弱大偏差原理，并证明速率函数通常非凸。
ai.motivation: 现有大偏差理论通常要求马尔可夫链具有不可约性，限制了应用范围。
ai.method: 利用次可加性给出完全自包含的证明，不依赖不可约性假设。
ai.result: 建立了弱大偏差原理，并通过反例说明速率函数一般不是凸函数。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解非不可约马尔可夫链的大偏差行为，拓宽了理论适用范围。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将非凸速率函数的结构用于设计新的统计检验或异常检测算法。
idea_spark.risk: 非凸性可能导致优化困难，需要开发专门的数值方法。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从非不可约链的弱大偏差原理出发，探索更一般的随机动力系统的大偏差理论。

zh.tldr: 在温和假设下，为非不可约马尔可夫链建立了经验测度的弱大偏差原理，并证明速率函数通常非凸。
zh.motivation: 现有大偏差理论通常要求马尔可夫链具有不可约性，限制了应用范围。
zh.method: 利用次可加性给出完全自包含的证明，不依赖不可约性假设。
zh.result: 建立了弱大偏差原理，并通过反例说明速率函数一般不是凸函数。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解非不可约马尔可夫链的大偏差行为，拓宽了理论适用范围。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将非凸速率函数的结构用于设计新的统计检验或异常检测算法。
idea_spark.risk: 非凸性可能导致优化困难，需要开发专门的数值方法。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从非不可约链的弱大偏差原理出发，探索更一般的随机动力系统的大偏差理论。

en.tldr: Establishes the weak large deviations principle for empirical measures of non-irreducible Markov chains on Euclidean spaces under mild assumptions, with a non-convex rate function.
en.motivation: Existing large deviation theory typically requires irreducibility of Markov chains, limiting applicability.
en.method: A self-contained proof using subadditivity, without assuming irreducibility.
en.result: Proves the weak large deviations principle and shows via examples that the rate function is generally non-convex.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand large deviation behavior of non-irreducible Markov chains, broadening theoretical scope.

idea_spark.idea: Explore using the structure of non-convex rate functions to design new statistical tests or anomaly detection algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Non-convexity may cause optimization difficulties, requiring specialized numerical methods.
idea_spark.inspiration: From the weak large deviations principle for non-irreducible chains, investigate large deviation theory for more general stochastic dynamical systems.

papers.title: Beyond N-gram: Data-Aware X-GRAM Extraction for Efficient Embedding Parameter Scaling
papers.summary: Large token-indexed lookup tables provide a compute-decoupled scaling path, but their practical gains are often limited by poor parameter efficiency and rapid memory growth. We attribute these limitations to Zipfian under-training of the long tail, heterogeneous demand across layers, and "slot collapse" that produces redundant embeddings. To address this, we propose X-GRAM, a frequency-aware dynamic token-injection framework. X-GRAM employs hybrid hashing and alias mixing to compress the tail while preserving head capacity, and refines retrieved vectors via normalized SwiGLU ShortConv to extract diverse local n-gram features. These signals are integrated into attention value streams and inter-layer residuals using depth-aware gating, effectively aligning static memory with dynamic context. This design introduces a memory-centric scaling axis that decouples model capacity from FLOPs. Extensive evaluations at the 0.73B and 1.15B scales show that X-GRAM improves average accuracy by as much as 4.4 points over the vanilla backbone and 3.2 points over strong retrieval baselines, while using substantially smaller tables in the 50% configuration. Overall, by decoupling capacity from compute through efficient memory management, X-GRAM offers a scalable and practical paradigm for future memory-augmented architectures. Code aviliable in https://github.com/Longyichen/X-gram.

ai.tldr: 提出X-GRAM框架，通过频率感知的动态令牌注入和混合哈希等技术，在保持模型容量的同时压缩长尾令牌，实现高效嵌入参数缩放。
ai.motivation: 传统令牌索引查找表参数效率低、内存增长快，受长尾欠训练、层间异构需求和槽坍塌问题限制。
ai.method: 采用混合哈希与别名混合压缩尾部，保留头部容量；通过归一化SwiGLU ShortConv提取局部n-gram特征；利用深度感知门控将信号集成到注意力值流和层间残差中。
ai.result: 在0.73B和1.15B规模上，平均准确率比基线提升4.4点，比强检索基线提升3.2点，且使用更小的表（50%配置）。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种内存与计算解耦的缩放方法，适用于需要高效嵌入参数的大规模语言模型。

idea_spark.idea: 将深度感知门控与局部n-gram特征提取结合，可能启发设计更高效的记忆增强架构。
idea_spark.risk: 混合哈希和别名混合的复杂度可能增加实现难度，且在不同数据分布下效果需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Zipf分布和槽坍塌问题出发，思考如何通过动态内存管理提升参数效率。

zh.tldr: 提出X-GRAM框架，通过频率感知的动态令牌注入和混合哈希等技术，在保持模型容量的同时压缩长尾令牌，实现高效嵌入参数缩放。

idea_spark.idea: 将深度感知门控与局部n-gram特征提取结合，可能启发设计更高效的记忆增强架构。
idea_spark.risk: 混合哈希和别名混合的复杂度可能增加实现难度，且在不同数据分布下效果需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Zipf分布和槽坍塌问题出发，思考如何通过动态内存管理提升参数效率。

en.tldr: Proposes X-GRAM, a frequency-aware dynamic token injection framework that compresses the long tail while preserving head capacity, achieving efficient embedding parameter scaling.
en.motivation: Large token-indexed lookup tables suffer from poor parameter efficiency and rapid memory growth due to Zipfian under-training, heterogeneous layer demands, and slot collapse.
en.method: Uses hybrid hashing and alias mixing to compress the tail, normalized SwiGLU ShortConv to extract local n-gram features, and depth-aware gating to integrate signals into attention value streams and inter-layer residuals.
en.result: At 0.73B and 1.15B scales, improves average accuracy by up to 4.4 points over vanilla backbone and 3.2 points over strong retrieval baselines, using substantially smaller tables (50% config).
en.help_to_user: Provides a memory-centric scaling axis that decouples model capacity from FLOPs, useful for large language models needing efficient embedding parameters.

idea_spark.idea: Combining depth-aware gating with local n-gram feature extraction may inspire more efficient memory-augmented architectures.
idea_spark.risk: Complexity of hybrid hashing and alias mixing may increase implementation difficulty; effectiveness across different data distributions needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Zipf distribution and slot collapse, thinking about how dynamic memory management can improve parameter efficiency.

papers.title: UAU-Net: Uncertainty-aware Representation Learning and Evidential Classification for Facial Action Unit Detection
papers.summary: Facial action unit (AU) detection remains challenging because it involves heterogeneous, AU-specific uncertainties arising at both the representation and decision stages. Recent methods have improved discriminative feature learning, but they often treat the AU representations as deterministic, overlooking uncertainty caused by visual noise, subject-dependent appearance variations, and ambiguous inter-AU relationships, all of which can substantially degrade robustness. Meanwhile, conventional point-estimation classifiers often provide poorly calibrated confidence, producing overconfident predictions, especially under the severe label imbalance typical of AU datasets. We propose UAU-Net, an Uncertainty-aware AU detection framework that explicitly models uncertainty at both stages. At the representation stage, we introduce CV-AFE, a conditional VAE (CVAE)-based AU feature extraction module that learns probabilistic AU representations by jointly estimating feature means and variances across multiple spatio-temporal scales; conditioning on AU labels further enables CV-AFE to capture uncertainty associated with inter-AU dependencies. At the decision stage, we design AB-ENN, an Asymmetric Beta Evidential Neural Network for multi-label AU detection, which parameterizes predictive uncertainty with Beta distributions and mitigates overconfidence via an asymmetric loss tailored to highly imbalanced binary labels. Extensive experiments on BP4D and DISFA show that UAU-Net achieves strong AU detection performance, and further analyses indicate that modeling uncertainty in both representation learning and evidential prediction improves robustness and reliability.

ai.tldr: 提出UAU-Net，在表示和决策阶段显式建模不确定性，提升面部动作单元检测的鲁棒性和可靠性。
ai.motivation: 现有方法将AU表示视为确定性，忽略视觉噪声、个体差异和AU间模糊关系带来的不确定性；点估计分类器在标签不平衡下产生过度自信预测。
ai.method: 表示阶段用基于条件VAE的CV-AFE模块学习概率AU表示，估计多尺度时空均值和方差；决策阶段用非对称Beta证据神经网络AB-ENN参数化预测不确定性，并设计非对称损失缓解过自信。
ai.result: 在BP4D和DISFA数据集上取得强检测性能，不确定性建模提升了鲁棒性和可靠性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种显式建模不确定性的AU检测框架，可应用于表情分析、人机交互等场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将条件VAE与证据深度学习结合，同时建模表示和决策不确定性，并针对多标签不平衡设计非对称损失。
idea_spark.risk: 条件VAE训练可能不稳定，非对称损失的超参数调优需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在其他多标签分类任务中同时建模表示和决策不确定性，尤其是标签高度不平衡的场景。

zh.tldr: 提出UAU-Net，在表示和决策阶段显式建模不确定性，提升面部动作单元检测的鲁棒性和可靠性。
zh.motivation: 现有方法将AU表示视为确定性，忽略视觉噪声、个体差异和AU间模糊关系带来的不确定性；点估计分类器在标签不平衡下产生过度自信预测。
zh.method: 表示阶段用基于条件VAE的CV-AFE模块学习概率AU表示，估计多尺度时空均值和方差；决策阶段用非对称Beta证据神经网络AB-ENN参数化预测不确定性，并设计非对称损失缓解过自信。
zh.result: 在BP4D和DISFA数据集上取得强检测性能，不确定性建模提升了鲁棒性和可靠性。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种显式建模不确定性的AU检测框架，可应用于表情分析、人机交互等场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将条件VAE与证据深度学习结合，同时建模表示和决策不确定性，并针对多标签不平衡设计非对称损失。
idea_spark.risk: 条件VAE训练可能不稳定，非对称损失的超参数调优需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在其他多标签分类任务中同时建模表示和决策不确定性，尤其是标签高度不平衡的场景。

en.tldr: Proposes UAU-Net, which explicitly models uncertainty at both representation and decision stages to improve robustness and reliability in facial action unit detection.
en.motivation: Existing methods treat AU representations as deterministic, ignoring uncertainties from visual noise, subject variations, and ambiguous inter-AU relationships; point-estimation classifiers yield overconfident predictions under severe label imbalance.
en.method: At representation stage, uses CV-AFE, a CVAE-based module to learn probabilistic AU representations by estimating means and variances across spatio-temporal scales; at decision stage, designs AB-ENN, an asymmetric Beta evidential neural network, parameterizing predictive uncertainty with Beta distributions and mitigating overconfidence via an asymmetric loss.
en.result: Achieves strong detection performance on BP4D and DISFA; modeling uncertainty improves robustness and reliability.
en.help_to_user: Provides an uncertainty-aware AU detection framework applicable to expression analysis and human-computer interaction.

idea_spark.idea: Combines conditional VAE with evidential deep learning to model both representation and decision uncertainty, with an asymmetric loss for multi-label imbalance.
idea_spark.risk: CVAE training may be unstable; hyperparameter tuning for the asymmetric loss requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires simultaneous modeling of representation and decision uncertainty in other multi-label classification tasks, especially with highly imbalanced labels.

papers.title: Gravitational Collapse of a Chiellini Integrable Scalar Field
papers.summary: We study the gravitational collapse of a non-interacting mix of perfect fluid and a spatially homogeneous scalar field within a Chiellini-integrable framework. We choose an extended Higgs-type self-interaction potential and reduce the Klein-Gordon equation into a generalized damped Milne-Pinney class of differential equation. We derive a closed-form analytical solution for the scalar field, the scale factor and explore the collapsing branch of the same. We find that it exhibits an asymptotic collapse in which the proper volume decreases monotonically but never reaches zero at finite time. We analyze the energy conditions for the constituent elements of the collapsing sphere. While the scalar field remains canonical in nature, we find that the perfect fluid can violated the Null Energy Condition. We also study the formation of apparent horizon condition and find multiple possibilities depending on the parameter space : either no trapped surface or the formation of multiple apparent horizons. We match the interior homogeneous solution to a generalized Vaidya exterior via the Israel-Darmois junction conditions, yielding the corresponding boundary mass function, ensuring a smooth collapse scenario.

ai.tldr: 在Chiellini可积框架下，研究了完美流体与空间均匀标量场混合物的引力坍缩，得到了标量场和尺度因子的闭式解析解，发现渐近坍缩行为，并分析了能量条件与视界形成。
ai.motivation: 探索非相互作用完美流体与标量场混合系统在Chiellini可积框架下的引力坍缩解析解，以理解其动力学和奇点形成。
ai.method: 选取扩展Higgs型自相互作用势，将Klein-Gordon方程化为广义阻尼Milne-Pinney型微分方程，推导标量场和尺度因子的闭式解析解，分析能量条件，通过Israel-Darmois匹配条件连接内部解与广义Vaidya外部解。
ai.result: 系统呈现渐近坍缩，体积单调递减但有限时间内不归零；标量场保持正则，完美流体可违反零能量条件；参数空间内可能无陷获面或形成多个表观视界。

en.tldr: We study gravitational collapse of a non-interacting mixture of perfect fluid and a spatially homogeneous scalar field in a Chiellini-integrable framework, obtaining closed-form analytical solutions and finding asymptotic collapse with possible violation of the null energy condition and multiple apparent horizons.
en.motivation: To explore the dynamics and singularity formation in a mixed perfect-fluid–scalar-field system under gravitational collapse using the Chiellini integrability framework.
en.method: We choose an extended Higgs-type self-interaction potential, reduce the Klein-Gordon equation to a generalized damped Milne-Pinney equation, derive closed-form solutions for the scalar field and scale factor, analyze energy conditions, and match the interior to a generalized Vaidya exterior via Israel-Darmois junction conditions.
en.result: The system exhibits asymptotic collapse with monotonically decreasing proper volume that never reaches zero in finite time; the scalar field remains canonical while the perfect fluid can violate the null energy condition; depending on parameters, either no trapped surface or multiple apparent horizons form.
en.help_to_user: Provides exact analytical solutions for an integrable scalar-field collapse model, aiding understanding of non-singular collapse, energy condition violations, and multi-horizon structures.

idea_spark.idea: Apply similar integrable frameworks to interacting scalar-field–fluid systems, or study horizon thermodynamics in asymptotic collapse scenarios.
idea_spark.risk: Analytic integrability relies on specific potential forms, limiting generality; stability of multi-horizon solutions requires further investigation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The connection between damped Milne-Pinney equations and gravitational collapse suggests exploring other integrable differential equations in general relativity.

papers.title: Dimension Drop for Harmonic Measure on Ahlfors Regular Boundaries
papers.summary: We provide quantitative estimates for the dimension drop of harmonic measure. We show that for a domain $Ω= \mathbb{R}^{n+1} \setminus E$ where $E$ is an $s$-Ahlfors regular compact set satisfying a uniform $L^2$-based non-flatness condition $β_2 \ge δ_0$, the dimension of its harmonic measure is strictly less than $s$ for $s \in (n - cδ_0^2, n]$. For planar domains, we establish an analogous quantitative threshold $s_0 = 1 - cδ_0^2$ under Azzam's uniform non-flatness condition $β_\infty + β_{\operatorname{hole}} \ge δ_0$.

ai.tldr: 本文给出了调和测度维数下降的定量估计，证明在满足非平坦条件的Ahlfors正则边界上，调和测度的维数严格小于边界维数。
ai.motivation: 调和测度的维数下降是几何测度论中的经典问题，但此前缺乏定量结果。本文旨在建立维数下降与边界非平坦程度之间的显式关系。
ai.method: 利用L²基非平坦条件β₂和Azzam的β_∞+β_hole条件，结合调和测度的势论分析和Ahlfors正则集的性质。
ai.result: 对于s-Ahlfors正则紧集E，若满足β₂≥δ₀，则当s∈(n-cδ₀²,n]时调和测度维数严格小于s；平面情形下阈值s₀=1-cδ₀²。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解调和测度维数下降的定量机制，为几何测度论和复分析中的边界行为研究提供新工具。

idea_spark.idea: 能否将β₂条件替换为更弱的积分条件，从而覆盖更广泛的边界？
idea_spark.risk: 弱化条件可能导致维数下降不再严格，或需要更精细的调和测度估计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将调和测度的维数问题与几何流或随机游走的逃逸概率联系起来，可能产生新的交叉方向。

zh.tldr: 本文给出了调和测度维数下降的定量估计，证明在满足非平坦条件的Ahlfors正则边界上，调和测度的维数严格小于边界维数。

en.tldr: This paper provides quantitative estimates for the dimension drop of harmonic measure, showing that on Ahlfors regular boundaries satisfying a non-flatness condition, the dimension of harmonic measure is strictly less than the boundary dimension.
en.motivation: The dimension drop of harmonic measure is a classical problem in geometric measure theory, but quantitative results were lacking. This work aims to establish an explicit relationship between dimension drop and boundary non-flatness.
en.method: Using the L²-based non-flatness condition β₂ and Azzam's β_∞+β_hole condition, combined with potential theory for harmonic measure and properties of Ahlfors regular sets.
en.result: For an s-Ahlfors regular compact set E with β₂≥δ₀, the dimension of harmonic measure is strictly less than s when s∈(n-cδ₀²,n]; in the planar case the threshold is s₀=1-cδ₀².
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the quantitative mechanism of dimension drop for harmonic measure, providing new tools for boundary behavior in geometric measure theory and complex analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Can the β₂ condition be replaced by a weaker integral condition to cover a wider class of boundaries?
idea_spark.risk: Weakening the condition may cause the dimension drop to no longer be strict, or require more delicate estimates for harmonic measure.
idea_spark.inspiration: Connecting the dimension problem of harmonic measure with geometric flows or escape probabilities of random walks may yield new cross-disciplinary directions.

papers.title: Thinking with Reasoning Skills: Fewer Tokens, More Accuracy
papers.summary: Reasoning LLMs often spend substantial tokens on long intermediate reasoning traces (e.g., chain-of-thought) when solving new problems. We propose to summarize and store reusable reasoning skills distilled from extensive deliberation and trial-and-error exploration, and to retrieve these skills at inference time to guide future reasoning. Unlike the prevailing \emph{reasoning from scratch} paradigm, our approach first recalls relevant skills for each query, helping the model avoid redundant detours and focus on effective solution paths. We evaluate our method on coding and mathematical reasoning tasks, and find that it significantly reduces reasoning tokens while improving overall performance. The resulting lower per-request cost indicates strong practical and economic potential for real-world deployment.

ai.tldr: 提出通过总结和检索可复用的推理技能，减少推理LLM的token消耗并提高准确性。
ai.motivation: 现有推理LLM在解决新问题时，往往需要大量中间推理步骤（如思维链），导致token消耗高、效率低。
ai.method: 从大量推理和试错中提炼可复用的推理技能，并在推理时检索相关技能，引导模型避免冗余路径。
ai.result: 在编程和数学推理任务上，显著减少推理token，同时提升整体性能，降低每次请求的成本。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过技能复用提升LLM推理效率，降低实际部署成本。

idea_spark.idea: 将推理技能视为可检索的知识单元，类似RAG但针对推理过程本身。
idea_spark.risk: 技能库的构建和维护成本较高，且可能引入检索偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将人类专家的问题解决策略（如启发式规则）形式化为可复用的推理技能。

zh.motivation: 现有推理LLM在解决新问题时，往往需要大量中间推理步骤（如思维链），导致token消耗高、效率低。

idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将人类专家的问题解决策略（如启发式规则）形式化为可复用的推理技能。

en.tldr: Proposes to summarize and retrieve reusable reasoning skills to reduce token usage and improve accuracy in reasoning LLMs.
en.motivation: Current reasoning LLMs spend excessive tokens on long intermediate reasoning traces (e.g., chain-of-thought) when solving new problems, leading to inefficiency.
en.method: Distills reusable reasoning skills from extensive deliberation and trial-and-error, then retrieves relevant skills at inference time to guide the model away from redundant paths.
en.result: On coding and mathematical reasoning tasks, significantly reduces reasoning tokens while improving overall performance, lowering per-request cost.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how skill reuse can improve LLM reasoning efficiency and reduce deployment costs.

idea_spark.idea: Treat reasoning skills as retrievable knowledge units, analogous to RAG but for the reasoning process itself.
idea_spark.risk: Building and maintaining the skill library may be costly and could introduce retrieval bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires formalizing human expert problem-solving strategies (e.g., heuristics) as reusable reasoning skills.

papers.title: Grounding Video Reasoning in Physical Signals
papers.summary: Physical video understanding requires more than naming an event correctly. A model can answer a question about pouring, sliding, or collision from textual regularities while still failing to localize the event in time or space. We introduce a grounded benchmark for physical video understanding that extends the what--when--where evaluation structure of V-STaR to four video sources, six physics domains, three prompt families (physics, vstar_like, and neutral_rstr), and four input conditions (original, shuffled, ablated, and frame-masked). The benchmark contains 1,560 base video clips from SSV2, YouCook2, HoloAssist, and Roundabout-TAU. Each clip is first converted into a shared grounded event record, and the three query families are derived from that record. Temporal and spatial targets are shared across prompt families, while the non-physics families use deterministic family-appropriate semantic a_what targets derived from the same record. Across models and prompt families, physics remains the strongest regime overall, vstar_like is the clearest non-physics semantic comparison, and neutral_rstr behaves as a harder templated control. Prompt-family robustness is selective rather than universal, perturbation gains cluster in weak original cases, and spatial grounding is the weakest across settings. These results suggest that video Q&A reasoning benchmarks shall report physically grounded, prompt-aware, and perturbation-aware diagnostics alongside aggregate accuracy.

ai.tldr: 提出一个物理视频理解的接地基准，扩展V-STaR的“什么-何时-何处”评估结构，涵盖四个视频源、六个物理领域、三种提示族和四种输入条件，发现物理提示最强，空间接地最弱。
ai.motivation: 现有视频问答模型能从文本规律中正确回答物理事件问题，但无法在时间或空间上定位事件，缺乏物理接地能力。
ai.method: 构建包含1560个基础视频片段的基准，将每个片段转换为共享接地事件记录，从中派生三种提示族（物理、vstar_like、neutral_rstr）和四种输入条件（原始、打乱、消融、帧掩码），评估模型在时间、空间和语义上的接地性能。
ai.result: 物理提示族整体最强，vstar_like是非物理语义的最佳对照，neutral_rstr作为更难模板控制；提示族鲁棒性具有选择性，扰动增益集中在弱原始案例，空间接地最弱。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究者理解视频问答模型在物理接地方面的真实能力，强调报告物理接地、提示感知和扰动感知诊断的必要性。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一个物理视频推理模型，显式融合时间-空间接地模块，并利用扰动训练增强鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 基准可能受限于特定视频源和物理领域，泛化性需验证；空间接地弱可能反映模型架构固有缺陷。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从物理提示族最强这一发现出发，可探索将物理先验知识（如牛顿定律）嵌入模型以提升接地能力。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助研究者理解视频问答模型在物理接地方面的真实能力，强调报告物理接地、提示感知和扰动感知诊断的必要性。

idea_spark.risk: 基准可能受限于特定视频源和物理领域，泛化性需验证；空间接地弱可能反映模型架构固有缺陷。

en.tldr: Proposes a grounded benchmark for physical video understanding, extending V-STaR's what-when-where evaluation across four video sources, six physics domains, three prompt families, and four input conditions, finding physics prompts strongest and spatial grounding weakest.
en.motivation: Existing video QA models can answer physical event questions from textual regularities but fail to localize events in time or space, lacking physical grounding.
en.method: Constructs a benchmark of 1,560 base video clips, converts each to a shared grounded event record, derives three prompt families (physics, vstar_like, neutral_rstr) and four input conditions (original, shuffled, ablated, frame-masked), and evaluates temporal, spatial, and semantic grounding.
en.result: Physics prompt family is strongest overall; vstar_like is the clearest non-physics semantic comparison; neutral_rstr acts as a harder templated control. Prompt-family robustness is selective, perturbation gains cluster in weak original cases, and spatial grounding is weakest.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers understand the true physical grounding capability of video QA models, emphasizing the need to report physically grounded, prompt-aware, and perturbation-aware diagnostics.

idea_spark.idea: Design a physical video reasoning model that explicitly integrates temporal-spatial grounding modules and uses perturbation training to enhance robustness.
idea_spark.risk: The benchmark may be limited to specific video sources and physics domains; generalizability needs verification. Weak spatial grounding may reflect inherent architectural flaws.
idea_spark.inspiration: From the finding that physics prompts are strongest, explore embedding physical priors (e.g., Newton's laws) into models to improve grounding.

papers.title: A Systematic Study of Biomedical Retrieval Pipeline Trade-offs in Performance and Efficiency
papers.summary: Retrieval systems are increasingly used in biomedical and clinical natural language processing applications, yet practical guidance for researchers building such systems is limited. In this work, we provide such guidance through an empirical study of how retrieval pipeline design choices affect performance and efficiency at scale.   In particular, we examine retrieval over a variety of existing, public biomedical text datasets, leveraging a variety of disparate types of queries, including exam-style questions, conversational medical queries, community-asked questions, and non-question formulations across various retrieval pipeline settings spanning corpus selection, chunk granularity, and vector index configuration. Retrieval results are judged using a robust, win-rate comparison assessment via an LLM-as-a-judge setting with human validation.   Across these experiments, we identify several points of concrete guidance for reviewers, including the superiority of corpus aggregation for absolute retrieval quality, and the emergence of MedRAG/pubmed as the Pareto-optimal singleton corpus under graph-based (HNSW) indexing, appropriate chunking strategies, and FAISS indexing choices that offer the best trade-offs in speed and efficiency.

ai.tldr: 通过系统实验，研究了生物医学检索流水线中不同设计选择（语料库、分块粒度、向量索引）对性能和效率的影响，并给出了具体指导。
ai.motivation: 生物医学NLP中检索系统使用增多，但缺乏关于如何平衡性能与效率的实用指南。
ai.method: 在多个公开生物医学文本数据集上，使用多种查询类型（考试题、对话查询、社区问题等），通过LLM作为裁判结合人工验证进行胜率比较评估。
ai.result: 语料库聚合在绝对检索质量上最优；MedRAG/pubmed在HNSW索引下是帕累托最优单语料库；合适的分块策略和FAISS索引选择能提供最佳速度与效率权衡。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员在设计生物医学检索系统时做出更明智的权衡决策。

idea_spark.idea: 探索动态调整分块粒度和索引策略的自适应检索流水线，根据查询类型自动选择最优配置。
idea_spark.risk: LLM作为裁判可能存在偏见，需要持续验证；动态调整可能增加系统复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受帕累托最优概念启发，可进一步研究多目标优化下的检索系统设计空间。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员在设计生物医学检索系统时做出更明智的权衡决策。

idea_spark.risk: LLM作为裁判可能存在偏见，需要持续验证；动态调整可能增加系统复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受帕累托最优概念启发，可进一步研究多目标优化下的检索系统设计空间。

en.tldr: A systematic empirical study of biomedical retrieval pipeline trade-offs between performance and efficiency, providing concrete guidance on corpus selection, chunking, and indexing.
en.motivation: Limited practical guidance exists for building efficient and effective retrieval systems in biomedical NLP.
en.method: Evaluated multiple retrieval pipeline configurations (corpus, chunk granularity, vector index) across diverse biomedical datasets and query types using LLM-as-a-judge with human validation.
en.result: Corpus aggregation yields best absolute retrieval quality; MedRAG/pubmed is Pareto-optimal singleton corpus under HNSW indexing; appropriate chunking and FAISS indexing offer best speed-efficiency trade-offs.
en.help_to_user: Provides actionable insights for researchers to optimize biomedical retrieval systems.

idea_spark.idea: Develop an adaptive retrieval pipeline that dynamically adjusts chunk granularity and indexing based on query type.
idea_spark.risk: LLM-as-a-judge may introduce bias; dynamic adaptation increases system complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Pareto optimality, further explore multi-objective optimization of retrieval system design space.

papers.title: BioMiner: A Multi-modal System for Automated Mining of Protein-Ligand Bioactivity Data from Literature
papers.summary: Protein-ligand bioactivity data published in the literature are essential for drug discovery, yet manual curation struggles to keep pace with rapidly growing literature. Automated bioactivity extraction remains challenging because it requires not only interpreting biochemical semantics distributed across text, tables, and figures, but also reconstructing chemically exact ligand structures (e.g., Markush structures). To address this bottleneck, we introduce BioMiner, a multi-modal extraction framework that explicitly separates bioactivity semantic interpretation from ligand structure construction. Within BioMiner, bioactivity semantics are inferred through direct reasoning, while chemical structures are resolved via a chemical-structure-grounded visual semantic reasoning paradigm, in which multi-modal large language models operate on chemically grounded visual representations to infer inter-structure relationships, and exact molecular construction is delegated to domain chemistry tools. For rigorous evaluation and method development, we further establish BioVista, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 16,457 bioactivity entries curated from 500 publications. BioMiner validates its extraction ability and provides a quantitative baseline, achieving an F1 score of 0.32 for bioactivity triplets. BioMiner's practical utility is demonstrated via three applications: (1) extracting 82,262 data from 11,683 papers to build a pre-training database that improves downstream models performance by 3.9%; (2) enabling a human-in-the-loop workflow that doubles the number of high-quality NLRP3 bioactivity data, helping 38.6% improvement over 28 QSAR models and identification of 16 hit candidates with novel scaffolds; and (3) accelerating protein-ligand complex bioactivity annotation, achieving a 5.59-fold speed increase and 5.75% accuracy improvement over manual workflows in PoseBusters dataset.

ai.tldr: 提出多模态系统BioMiner，自动从文献中提取蛋白质-配体生物活性数据，并构建基准BioVista。
ai.motivation: 手动整理文献中的生物活性数据速度慢，难以跟上文献增长，且自动提取需同时理解文本、表格、图中的生化语义并重建精确配体结构。
ai.method: 将生物活性语义解释与配体结构构建分离：语义通过直接推理获取，结构通过化学结构引导的视觉语义推理（多模态大模型操作化学可视化表示）结合领域化学工具完成。
ai.result: 在BioVista基准上F1=0.32；从11683篇论文提取82262条数据，预训练数据库提升下游模型3.9%；人机协同工作流使NLRP3高质量数据翻倍，28个QSAR模型提升38.6%，发现16个新骨架候选；PoseBusters数据集上加速5.59倍，准确率提升5.75%。
ai.help_to_user: 可帮助研究人员自动从海量文献中提取蛋白质-配体生物活性数据，加速药物发现和QSAR建模。

idea_spark.idea: 将化学结构引导的视觉推理与领域工具结合，用于自动解析专利中的Markush结构。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖多模态大模型的视觉理解能力，对罕见或复杂化学结构可能产生错误。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用人机协同工作流提升数据质量，启发开发交互式文献挖掘工具。

en.tldr: Proposes BioMiner, a multi-modal system for automated extraction of protein-ligand bioactivity data from literature, and establishes the BioVista benchmark.
en.motivation: Manual curation of bioactivity data from literature is slow and cannot keep up with the growing volume; automated extraction requires interpreting biochemical semantics across text, tables, and figures while reconstructing exact ligand structures.
en.method: Separates bioactivity semantic interpretation from ligand structure construction: semantics via direct reasoning, structures via chemical-structure-grounded visual semantic reasoning (multi-modal LLMs on chemically grounded visual representations) combined with domain chemistry tools.

en.help_to_user: Helps researchers automatically extract protein-ligand bioactivity data from large volumes of literature, accelerating drug discovery and QSAR modeling.

idea_spark.idea: Combine chemical-structure-guided visual reasoning with domain tools for automatic parsing of Markush structures in patents.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on multi-modal LLM visual understanding, which may produce errors for rare or complex chemical structures.
idea_spark.inspiration: The human-in-the-loop workflow for improving data quality inspires the development of interactive literature mining tools.

papers.title: MISTY: High-Throughput Motion Planning via Mixer-based Single-step Drifting
papers.summary: Multi-modal trajectory generation is essential for safe autonomous driving, yet existing diffusion-based planners suffer from high inference latency due to iterative neural function evaluations. This paper presents MISTY (Mixer-based Inference for Single-step Trajectory-drifting Yield), a high-throughput generative motion planner that achieves state-of-the-art closed-loop performance with pure single-step inference. MISTY integrates a vectorized Sub-Graph encoder to capture environment context, a Variational Autoencoder to structure expert trajectories into a compact 32-dimensional latent manifold, and an ultra-lightweight MLP-Mixer decoder to eliminate quadratic attention complexity. Importantly, we introduce a latent-space drifting loss that shifts the complex distribution evolution entirely to the training phase. By formulating explicit attractive and repulsive forces, this mechanism empowers the model to synthesize novel, proactive maneuvers, such as active overtaking, that are virtually absent from the raw expert demonstrations. Extensive evaluations on the nuPlan benchmark demonstrate that MISTY achieves state-of-the-art results on the challenging Test14-hard split, with comprehensive scores of 80.32 and 82.21 in non-reactive and reactive settings, respectively. Operating at over 99 FPS with an end-to-end latency of 10.1 ms, MISTY offers an order-of-magnitude speedup over iterative diffusion planners while while achieving significantly robust generation.

ai.tldr: 提出MISTY，一种基于MLP-Mixer的单步生成式运动规划器，在nuPlan上达到SOTA，推理速度比扩散规划器快一个数量级。
ai.motivation: 现有扩散规划器推理延迟高，难以满足自动驾驶实时性要求。
ai.method: 使用向量化子图编码器、VAE压缩轨迹到32维潜空间、MLP-Mixer解码器，并引入潜空间漂移损失将分布演化转移到训练阶段。
ai.result: 在nuPlan Test14-hard上非反应/反应设置综合得分80.32/82.21，端到端延迟10.1ms，帧率>99 FPS。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、高质量的运动规划方案，适用于实时自动驾驶系统。

idea_spark.idea: 将扩散模型的迭代去噪过程压缩为单步潜空间漂移，通过显式吸引-排斥力引导生成。
idea_spark.risk: 潜空间漂移可能限制生成轨迹的多样性，需在训练时精细调节力场参数。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用MLP-Mixer替代Transformer注意力机制，结合VAE潜空间设计，实现轻量高效生成。

zh.tldr: 提出MISTY，一种基于MLP-Mixer的单步生成式运动规划器，在nuPlan上达到SOTA，推理速度比扩散规划器快一个数量级。

idea_spark.inspiration: 利用MLP-Mixer替代Transformer注意力机制，结合VAE潜空间设计，实现轻量高效生成。

en.tldr: MISTY is a single-step generative motion planner using MLP-Mixer, achieving SOTA on nuPlan with an order-of-magnitude speedup over diffusion planners.
en.motivation: Existing diffusion planners suffer from high inference latency, hindering real-time autonomous driving.
en.method: Employs a vectorized Sub-Graph encoder, VAE to compress trajectories into a 32D latent space, an MLP-Mixer decoder, and a latent-space drifting loss that shifts distribution evolution to training.
en.result: On nuPlan Test14-hard, achieves 80.32/82.21 non-reactive/reactive scores, 10.1ms latency, and >99 FPS.
en.help_to_user: Provides a high-throughput, high-quality motion planning solution suitable for real-time autonomous driving systems.

idea_spark.idea: Compress iterative diffusion denoising into single-step latent drifting guided by explicit attractive and repulsive forces.
idea_spark.risk: Latent drifting may limit trajectory diversity; careful tuning of force fields during training is required.
idea_spark.inspiration: Replace Transformer attention with MLP-Mixer and leverage VAE latent space for lightweight, efficient generation.

papers.title: The KMS and GNS Spectral Gap of Quantum Markov Semigroups
papers.summary: We establish a relation between the exponential decay rates of quantum Markov semigroups with respect to different inner products. More precisely, it was conjectured by Fagnola, Poletti, Sasso and Umanità that for a Gaussian quantum Markov semigroup, the exponential decay rate with respect to the KMS inner product is bounded below by the exponential decay rate for the GNS inner product. We show that this is indeed the case and not limited to Gaussian quantum Markov semigroups, but holds for quantum Markov semigroups with a faithful normal invariant state on arbitrary von Neumann algebras. Additionally, the KMS inner product can be replaced by a whole class of inner products induced by operator monotone functions.

ai.tldr: 证明了量子马尔可夫半群在KMS内积下的指数衰减率不小于GNS内积下的指数衰减率，且该结论不限于高斯情形，适用于任意von Neumann代数上的忠实正规不变态。
ai.motivation: 验证Fagnola等人关于高斯量子马尔可夫半群KMS与GNS谱间隙关系的猜想，并推广到更一般的框架。
ai.method: 利用算子单调函数诱导的内积类，建立不同内积下指数衰减率之间的不等式关系。
ai.result: KMS内积下的指数衰减率总是大于或等于GNS内积下的指数衰减率，且该性质对任意von Neumann代数上的忠实正规不变态成立。
ai.help_to_user: 为量子马尔可夫半群的混合速率比较提供了严格的理论基础，有助于理解不同内积选择对动力学分析的影响。

idea_spark.idea: 探索KMS与GNS谱间隙之比与系统维数或耦合强度的标度关系，可能揭示量子耗散系统的普适行为。
idea_spark.risk: 结论依赖于忠实正规不变态的存在性，对于非忠实或非正规态的情形需要额外假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将内积比较思想应用于量子纠错码的恢复保真度分析，可能导出新的性能下界。

zh.tldr: 证明了量子马尔可夫半群在KMS内积下的指数衰减率不小于GNS内积下的指数衰减率，且该结论不限于高斯情形，适用于任意von Neumann代数上的忠实正规不变态。
zh.motivation: 验证Fagnola等人关于高斯量子马尔可夫半群KMS与GNS谱间隙关系的猜想，并推广到更一般的框架。
zh.method: 利用算子单调函数诱导的内积类，建立不同内积下指数衰减率之间的不等式关系。
zh.result: KMS内积下的指数衰减率总是大于或等于GNS内积下的指数衰减率，且该性质对任意von Neumann代数上的忠实正规不变态成立。
zh.help_to_user: 为量子马尔可夫半群的混合速率比较提供了严格的理论基础，有助于理解不同内积选择对动力学分析的影响。

idea_spark.idea: 探索KMS与GNS谱间隙之比与系统维数或耦合强度的标度关系，可能揭示量子耗散系统的普适行为。
idea_spark.risk: 结论依赖于忠实正规不变态的存在性，对于非忠实或非正规态的情形需要额外假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将内积比较思想应用于量子纠错码的恢复保真度分析，可能导出新的性能下界。

en.tldr: We prove that the exponential decay rate of a quantum Markov semigroup with respect to the KMS inner product is always at least as large as that with respect to the GNS inner product, extending a conjecture for Gaussian semigroups to arbitrary von Neumann algebras with a faithful normal invariant state.
en.motivation: To verify and generalize a conjecture by Fagnola, Poletti, Sasso, and Umanità about the relation between KMS and GNS spectral gaps for Gaussian quantum Markov semigroups.
en.method: Using a class of inner products induced by operator monotone functions to establish inequalities between exponential decay rates under different inner products.
en.result: The KMS spectral gap is always greater than or equal to the GNS spectral gap, and this holds for any faithful normal invariant state on arbitrary von Neumann algebras.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous foundation for comparing mixing rates of quantum Markov semigroups under different inner products, aiding in the analysis of dynamics in noncommutative probability.

idea_spark.idea: Investigate the scaling of the ratio between KMS and GNS spectral gaps with system dimension or coupling strength, potentially revealing universal behavior in quantum dissipative systems.
idea_spark.risk: The result relies on the existence of a faithful normal invariant state; additional assumptions are needed for non-faithful or non-normal states.
idea_spark.inspiration: Apply the inner product comparison idea to analyze recovery fidelity in quantum error correction codes, possibly yielding new performance lower bounds.

papers.title: Residual Risk Analysis in Benign Code: How Far Are We? A Multi-Model Semantic and Structural Similarity Approach
papers.summary: Software security relies on effective vulnerability detection and patching, yet determining whether a patch fully eliminates risk remains an underexplored challenge. Existing vulnerability benchmarks often treat patched functions as inherently benign, overlooking the possibility of residual security risks. In this work, we analyze vulnerable-benign function pairs from the PrimeVul, a benchmark dataset using multiple code language models (Code LMs) to capture semantic similarity, complemented by Tree-sitter-based abstract syntax tree (AST) analysis for structural similarity. Building on these signals, we propose Residual Risk Scoring (RRS), a unified framework that integrates embedding-based semantic similarity, localized AST-based structural similarity, and cross-model agreement to estimate residual risk in code. Our analysis shows that benign functions often remain highly similar to their vulnerable counterparts both semantically and structurally, indicating potential persistence of residual risk. We further find that approximately $61\%$ of high-RRS code pairs exhibit $13$ distinct categories of residual issues (e.g., null pointer dereferences, unsafe memory allocation), validated using state-of-the-art static analysis tools including Cppcheck, Clang-Tidy, and Facebook-Infer. These results demonstrate that code-level similarity provides a practical signal for prioritizing post-patch inspection, enabling more reliable and scalable security assessment in real-world open-source software pipelines.

ai.tldr: 提出一种多模型语义与结构相似性方法，分析良性代码中的残余风险，发现约61%的高风险代码对存在13类残余问题。
ai.motivation: 现有漏洞基准将修补后的函数视为完全安全，忽略了残余风险的存在。
ai.method: 利用多个代码语言模型计算语义相似性，结合Tree-sitter的抽象语法树分析结构相似性，提出残余风险评分框架。
ai.result: 良性函数与漏洞函数在语义和结构上高度相似，61%的高分对存在13类残余问题。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助安全工程师优先检查修补后仍存在风险的代码，提升安全评估效率。

idea_spark.idea: 结合动态分析或运行时监控，进一步验证残余风险的实际可触发性。
idea_spark.risk: 静态分析工具可能产生误报，需人工验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用代码相似性作为信号，可扩展至自动化补丁验证或回归测试优先级排序。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助安全工程师优先检查修补后仍存在风险的代码，提升安全评估效率。

idea_spark.risk: 静态分析工具可能产生误报，需人工验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用代码相似性作为信号，可扩展至自动化补丁验证或回归测试优先级排序。

en.tldr: Proposes a multi-model semantic and structural similarity approach to analyze residual risk in benign code, finding that about 61% of high-risk code pairs exhibit 13 categories of residual issues.
en.motivation: Existing vulnerability benchmarks treat patched functions as inherently benign, overlooking residual security risks.
en.method: Uses multiple code language models for semantic similarity and Tree-sitter-based AST analysis for structural similarity, then proposes Residual Risk Scoring (RRS).
en.result: Benign functions remain highly similar to vulnerable counterparts; 61% of high-RRS pairs have 13 categories of residual issues.
en.help_to_user: Helps security engineers prioritize post-patch inspection for more reliable security assessment.

idea_spark.idea: Combine with dynamic analysis or runtime monitoring to further verify the exploitability of residual risks.
idea_spark.risk: Static analysis tools may produce false positives, requiring manual verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using code similarity as a signal can be extended to automated patch validation or regression test prioritization.

papers.title: Bounding the Black Box: A Statistical Certification Framework for AI Risk Regulation
papers.summary: Artificial intelligence now decides who receives a loan, who is flagged for criminal investigation, and whether an autonomous vehicle brakes in time. Governments have responded: the EU AI Act, the NIST Risk Management Framework, and the Council of Europe Convention all demand that high-risk systems demonstrate safety before deployment. Yet beneath this regulatory consensus lies a critical vacuum: none specifies what ``acceptable risk'' means in quantitative terms, and none provides a technical method for verifying that a deployed system actually meets such a threshold. The regulatory architecture is in place; the verification instrument is not.   This gap is not theoretical. As the EU AI Act moves into full enforcement, developers face mandatory conformity assessments without established methodologies for producing quantitative safety evidence - and the systems most in need of oversight are opaque statistical inference engines that resist white-box scrutiny.   This paper provides the missing instrument. Drawing on the aviation certification paradigm, we propose a two-stage framework that transforms AI risk regulation into engineering practice. In Stage One, a competent authority formally fixes an acceptable failure probability $δ$ and an operational input domain $\varepsilon$ - a normative act with direct civil liability implications. In Stage Two, the RoMA and gRoMA statistical verification tools compute a definitive, auditable upper bound on the system's true failure rate, requiring no access to model internals and scaling to arbitrary architectures. We demonstrate how this certificate satisfies existing regulatory obligations, shifts accountability upstream to developers, and integrates with the legal frameworks that exist today.

ai.tldr: 提出一个两阶段统计认证框架，将AI风险监管转化为可操作的工程实践，填补了法规要求与验证方法之间的空白。
ai.motivation: 现有AI法规（如欧盟AI法案）要求高风险系统证明安全性，但未定义“可接受风险”的量化标准，也缺乏验证方法。
ai.method: 借鉴航空认证范式，第一阶段由权威机构设定可接受失效概率δ和操作输入域ε；第二阶段使用RoMA和gRoMA统计验证工具计算系统真实失效概率的可审计上界，无需访问模型内部。
ai.result: 该证书满足现有监管义务，将责任前移至开发者，并与现行法律框架兼容。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何将法规要求转化为可量化的安全验证流程，适用于高风险AI系统的合规评估。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个标准化工具，自动生成符合欧盟AI法案的合规证书，并集成到CI/CD流水线中。
idea_spark.risk: 权威机构设定δ和ε可能引发争议，且统计验证的置信度依赖于测试样本的代表性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将法律中的“合理风险”概念转化为工程上的统计阈值，类似航空业的失效概率标准。

zh.tldr: 提出一个两阶段统计认证框架，将AI风险监管转化为可操作的工程实践，填补了法规要求与验证方法之间的空白。
zh.motivation: 现有AI法规（如欧盟AI法案）要求高风险系统证明安全性，但未定义“可接受风险”的量化标准，也缺乏验证方法。
zh.method: 借鉴航空认证范式，第一阶段由权威机构设定可接受失效概率δ和操作输入域ε；第二阶段使用RoMA和gRoMA统计验证工具计算系统真实失效概率的可审计上界，无需访问模型内部。
zh.result: 该证书满足现有监管义务，将责任前移至开发者，并与现行法律框架兼容。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何将法规要求转化为可量化的安全验证流程，适用于高风险AI系统的合规评估。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个标准化工具，自动生成符合欧盟AI法案的合规证书，并集成到CI/CD流水线中。
idea_spark.risk: 权威机构设定δ和ε可能引发争议，且统计验证的置信度依赖于测试样本的代表性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将法律中的“合理风险”概念转化为工程上的统计阈值，类似航空业的失效概率标准。

en.tldr: Proposes a two-stage statistical certification framework that transforms AI risk regulation into engineering practice, filling the gap between regulatory requirements and verification methods.
en.motivation: Existing AI regulations (e.g., EU AI Act) require high-risk systems to demonstrate safety but lack quantitative definitions of 'acceptable risk' and verification methodologies.
en.method: Inspired by aviation certification, Stage One sets an acceptable failure probability δ and operational input domain ε by a competent authority; Stage Two uses RoMA and gRoMA statistical verification tools to compute an auditable upper bound on the system's true failure rate without model internals.
en.result: The certificate satisfies regulatory obligations, shifts accountability upstream to developers, and integrates with existing legal frameworks.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to translate regulatory requirements into quantifiable safety verification processes for high-risk AI systems compliance.

idea_spark.idea: Develop a standardized tool that automatically generates compliance certificates for the EU AI Act and integrates into CI/CD pipelines.
idea_spark.risk: Setting δ and ε by authorities may be contentious, and statistical verification confidence depends on test sample representativeness.
idea_spark.inspiration: Translating legal 'reasonable risk' into engineering statistical thresholds, similar to aviation's failure probability standards.

papers.title: Derivation of Gibbs measure from Gibbs state with the fractional Bessel interaction in Two Dimensions
papers.summary: We derive the classical Gibbs measure on $\mathbb{T}^2$ associated with the fractional Bessel interaction potential $\widehat{v}_β(k)=\langle k\rangle^{-β}$ from a renormalized grand-canonical quantum Bose gas with the same interaction. Our result covers the whole range $\frac32<β\leq2$, where $\widehat{v}_β(k)$ is not summable and the quantum model cannot be written in the usual density-square form, as the associated self-energy diverges. We therefore need to renormalize the zero mode by a centered number-fluctuation term and then develop a detailed analysis for the high-frequency remainders. All this allows us to implement a low-frequency localization and obtain the convergence of the quantum relative free energy to the classical fractional-Bessel free energy, as well as the convergence of the reduced density matrices to the limiting Gibbs measure.

ai.tldr: 从重整化的巨正则量子玻色气体推导出二维环面上具有分数阶Bessel相互作用的经典Gibbs测度，覆盖β在3/2到2之间的范围。
ai.motivation: 经典Gibbs测度与量子模型之间的联系在非可加相互作用下尚未完全建立，特别是当相互作用势不可求和时。
ai.method: 通过重整化零模的中心数涨落项，并对高频余项进行详细分析，实现低频局域化，从而证明量子相对自由能收敛到经典分数阶Bessel自由能。
ai.result: 成功推导出经典Gibbs测度，并证明了约化密度矩阵收敛到极限Gibbs测度。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了从量子模型构造经典Gibbs测度的一般框架，可用于研究非标准相互作用下的统计力学。

idea_spark.idea: 将分数阶Bessel相互作用视为一种介于短程和长程之间的中间情形，可能为理解临界现象提供新视角。
idea_spark.risk: 重整化步骤依赖于具体势函数形式，推广到更一般势函数时可能需要额外假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将类似的重整化方法应用于非平衡统计力学或量子场论中的类似问题。

zh.tldr: 从重整化的巨正则量子玻色气体推导出二维环面上具有分数阶Bessel相互作用的经典Gibbs测度，覆盖β在3/2到2之间的范围。
zh.motivation: 经典Gibbs测度与量子模型之间的联系在非可加相互作用下尚未完全建立，特别是当相互作用势不可求和时。
zh.method: 通过重整化零模的中心数涨落项，并对高频余项进行详细分析，实现低频局域化，从而证明量子相对自由能收敛到经典分数阶Bessel自由能。
zh.result: 成功推导出经典Gibbs测度，并证明了约化密度矩阵收敛到极限Gibbs测度。

idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将类似的重整化方法应用于非平衡统计力学或量子场论中的类似问题。

en.tldr: We derive the classical Gibbs measure on the 2D torus with fractional Bessel interaction from a renormalized grand-canonical quantum Bose gas, covering β in (3/2, 2].
en.motivation: The connection between classical Gibbs measures and quantum models is not fully established for non-summable interaction potentials.
en.method: Renormalize the zero mode by a centered number-fluctuation term, analyze high-frequency remainders in detail, and perform low-frequency localization to prove convergence of quantum relative free energy to the classical fractional-Bessel free energy.
en.result: Successfully derive the classical Gibbs measure and prove convergence of reduced density matrices to the limiting Gibbs measure.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general framework for constructing classical Gibbs measures from quantum models, applicable to non-standard interactions in statistical mechanics.

idea_spark.idea: View the fractional Bessel interaction as an intermediate case between short-range and long-range, potentially offering new insights into critical phenomena.
idea_spark.risk: The renormalization steps depend on the specific potential form; generalization to more general potentials may require additional assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar renormalization methods to non-equilibrium statistical mechanics or analogous problems in quantum field theory.

papers.title: CorridorVLA: Explicit Spatial Constraints for Generative Action Heads via Sparse Anchors
papers.summary: Vision--Language--Action (VLA) models often use intermediate representations to connect multimodal inputs with continuous control, yet spatial guidance is often injected implicitly through latent features. We propose $CorridorVLA$, which predicts sparse spatial anchors as incremental physical changes (e.g., $Δ$-positions) and uses them to impose an explicit tolerance region in the training objective for action generation. The anchors define a corridor that guides a flow-matching action head: trajectories whose implied spatial evolution falls outside it receive corrective gradients, while minor deviations from contacts and execution noise are permitted. On the more challenging LIBERO-Plus benchmark, CorridorVLA yields consistent gains across both SmolVLA and GR00T, improving success rate by $3.4\%$--$12.4\%$ over the corresponding baselines; notably, our GR00T-Corr variant reaches a success rate of $83.21\%$. These results indicate that action-aligned physical cues can provide direct and interpretable constraints for generative action policies, complementing spatial guidance encoded in visual or latent forms. Code is available at https://github.com/corridorVLA.

ai.tldr: 提出CorridorVLA，通过稀疏空间锚点定义显式容差走廊，约束生成式动作头的轨迹，在LIBERO-Plus上提升成功率3.4%-12.4%。
ai.motivation: 现有VLA模型的空间引导通常隐含在潜在特征中，缺乏显式可解释的物理约束。
ai.method: 预测稀疏空间锚点（如Δ位置），在训练目标中定义显式容差区域（走廊），对偏离走廊的轨迹施加校正梯度，同时允许微小偏差。
ai.result: 在LIBERO-Plus上，SmolVLA和GR00T变体成功率分别提升3.4%-12.4%，GR00T-Corr达到83.21%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种将显式空间约束融入VLA动作生成的可解释方法，提升机器人操作任务的成功率。

idea_spark.idea: 将稀疏锚点与物理模拟器结合，在线调整走廊宽度以适应动态环境。
idea_spark.risk: 稀疏锚点的选择可能依赖任务先验，泛化到新任务需重新设计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受机器人运动规划中“走廊”概念启发，将约束从规划层引入学习层。

zh.result: 在LIBERO-Plus上，SmolVLA和GR00T变体成功率分别提升3.4%-12.4%，GR00T-Corr达到83.21%。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种将显式空间约束融入VLA动作生成的可解释方法，提升机器人操作任务的成功率。

idea_spark.risk: 稀疏锚点的选择可能依赖任务先验，泛化到新任务需重新设计。

en.tldr: CorridorVLA uses sparse spatial anchors to define an explicit tolerance corridor, constraining generative action heads and improving success rate by 3.4%–12.4% on LIBERO-Plus.
en.motivation: Existing VLA models inject spatial guidance implicitly through latent features, lacking explicit and interpretable physical constraints.
en.method: Predicts sparse spatial anchors (e.g., Δ-positions) and imposes an explicit tolerance region (corridor) in the training objective; trajectories outside the corridor receive corrective gradients while minor deviations are allowed.
en.result: On LIBERO-Plus, SmolVLA and GR00T variants achieve consistent gains of 3.4%–12.4%, with GR00T-Corr reaching 83.21% success rate.
en.help_to_user: Provides an interpretable method to incorporate explicit spatial constraints into VLA action generation, improving success rates in robotic manipulation tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Combine sparse anchors with a physics simulator to adapt corridor width online for dynamic environments.
idea_spark.risk: Selection of sparse anchors may rely on task priors, requiring redesign for novel tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the 'corridor' concept in robot motion planning, bringing constraints from the planning layer into the learning layer.

papers.title: High-Fidelity 3D Gaussian Human Reconstruction via Region-Aware Initialization and Geometric Priors
papers.summary: Real-time, high-fidelity 3D human reconstruction from RGB images is essential for interactive applications such as virtual reality and gaming, yet remains challenging due to the complex non-rigid deformations of dynamic human bodies. Although 3D Gaussian Splatting enables efficient rendering, existing methods struggle to capture fine geometric details and often produce artifacts such as fused fingers and over-smoothed faces. Moreover, conventional spatial-field-based dynamic modeling faces a trade-off between reconstruction fidelity and GPU memory consumption. To address these issues, we propose a novel 3D Gaussian human reconstruction framework that combines region-aware initialization with rich geometric priors. Specifically, we leverage the expressive SMPL-X model to initialize both 3D Gaussians and skinning weights, providing a robust geometric foundation for precise reconstruction. We further introduce a region-aware density initialization strategy and a geometry-aware multi-scale hash encoding module to improve local detail recovery while maintaining computational efficiency.Experiments on PeopleSnapshot and GalaBasketball show that our method achieves superior reconstruction quality and finer detail preservation under complex motions, while maintaining real-time rendering speed.

ai.tldr: 提出一种结合区域感知初始化与几何先验的3D高斯人体重建框架，实现高保真、实时渲染的动态人体重建。
ai.motivation: 现有3D高斯方法难以捕捉精细几何细节，产生手指粘连、面部过平滑等伪影，且动态建模在保真度和GPU内存之间存在权衡。
ai.method: 利用SMPL-X模型初始化3D高斯和蒙皮权重，引入区域感知密度初始化策略和几何感知多尺度哈希编码模块。
ai.result: 在PeopleSnapshot和GalaBasketball数据集上，该方法在复杂运动下重建质量更优、细节保留更精细，同时保持实时渲染速度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过区域感知初始化和几何先验提升动态人体3D重建的精度和效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将几何感知多尺度哈希编码与SMPL-X先验结合，在保持计算效率的同时增强局部细节。
idea_spark.risk: 对SMPL-X模型拟合精度敏感，极端姿态或遮挡下可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受SMPL-X人体参数化模型启发，利用其提供鲁棒的几何初始化，减少对大量训练数据的依赖。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受SMPL-X人体参数化模型启发，利用其提供鲁棒的几何初始化，减少对大量训练数据的依赖。

en.tldr: Proposes a 3D Gaussian human reconstruction framework combining region-aware initialization and geometric priors for high-fidelity, real-time dynamic human reconstruction.
en.motivation: Existing 3D Gaussian methods struggle to capture fine geometric details, producing artifacts like fused fingers and over-smoothed faces, and face a trade-off between fidelity and GPU memory in dynamic modeling.
en.method: Leverages SMPL-X model to initialize 3D Gaussians and skinning weights, introduces region-aware density initialization and geometry-aware multi-scale hash encoding.
en.result: On PeopleSnapshot and GalaBasketball, the method achieves superior reconstruction quality and finer detail preservation under complex motions while maintaining real-time rendering speed.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how region-aware initialization and geometric priors improve the accuracy and efficiency of dynamic human 3D reconstruction.

idea_spark.idea: Combining geometry-aware multi-scale hash encoding with SMPL-X priors enhances local details while maintaining computational efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: Sensitive to SMPL-X fitting accuracy; may fail under extreme poses or occlusions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the SMPL-X parametric human model, using it to provide robust geometric initialization and reduce reliance on large training data.

papers.title: Design of MDP Convolutional Codes and Maximally Recoverable Codes Through the Lens of Matrix Completion
papers.summary: The matrix completion problem provides a unifying lens through which many fundamental problems in coding theory can be viewed. In this paper, we investigate Locally Recoverable Codes (LRCs) with Maximal Recoverability (MR) and Maximum Distance Profile (MDP) convolutional codes in the framework of matrix completion. In particular, we present techniques that are general enough to provide constructions for both types of codes. A common feature of our code constructions is the sparsity of their generator matrices and the property that a large number of the entries of the generator matrices are elements of a small subfield of a larger extension field.

ai.tldr: 本文通过矩阵补全的视角，统一研究了最大距离轮廓（MDP）卷积码和最大可恢复（MR）局部可恢复码（LRC）的构造问题。
ai.motivation: 矩阵补全问题为编码理论中的许多基本问题提供了统一框架，本文旨在利用该框架同时构造MDP卷积码和MR LRC码。
ai.method: 提出通用的构造技术，利用生成矩阵的稀疏性以及大量矩阵元素取自小扩域的特点。
ai.result: 成功构造了两种类型的码，并展示了生成矩阵的稀疏性和子域元素特性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过矩阵补全方法设计高性能纠错码，特别是具有最大距离轮廓和最大可恢复性的码。

idea_spark.idea: 利用稀疏生成矩阵和子域元素降低编码复杂度，同时保持码的纠错性能。
idea_spark.risk: 稀疏性可能限制码的最小距离或可恢复性，需平衡稀疏性与性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将矩阵补全中的低秩或稀疏约束应用于编码理论，启发新型码的设计。

zh.tldr: 本文通过矩阵补全的视角，统一研究了最大距离轮廓（MDP）卷积码和最大可恢复（MR）局部可恢复码（LRC）的构造问题。
zh.motivation: 矩阵补全问题为编码理论中的许多基本问题提供了统一框架，本文旨在利用该框架同时构造MDP卷积码和MR LRC码。
zh.method: 提出通用的构造技术，利用生成矩阵的稀疏性以及大量矩阵元素取自小扩域的特点。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将矩阵补全中的低秩或稀疏约束应用于编码理论，启发新型码的设计。

en.tldr: This paper unifies the study of MDP convolutional codes and maximally recoverable LRCs through the lens of matrix completion, presenting general construction techniques.
en.motivation: The matrix completion problem provides a unifying framework for many fundamental problems in coding theory; this work aims to construct both MDP convolutional codes and MR LRCs within this framework.
en.method: Proposes general construction techniques leveraging the sparsity of generator matrices and the property that many entries belong to a small subfield.
en.result: Successfully constructs both types of codes, demonstrating sparse generator matrices and subfield element properties.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to design high-performance error-correcting codes with maximum distance profile and maximal recoverability via matrix completion.

idea_spark.idea: Use sparse generator matrices and subfield elements to reduce encoding complexity while maintaining error-correction performance.
idea_spark.risk: Sparsity may limit the minimum distance or recoverability; a balance between sparsity and performance is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Applying low-rank or sparsity constraints from matrix completion to coding theory inspires novel code designs.

papers.title: Threat Detection and Resilience Techniques in PRS-Assisted OTDOA 5G Positioning Systems
papers.summary: Precise positioning is a key enabler for emerging 5G applications, from autonomous transport to industrial automation. Yet the open physical layer (PL) leaves standard positioning reference signals (PRSs) vulnerable to manipulation. This work addresses the security of downlink observed time difference of arrival positioning (DL-OTDOA) through three contributions. First, we introduce VeriLoc, an open-source system-level simulator designed for realistic channel modeling and PL threat injection. Second, we propose three novel security techniques to enhance resilience and threat detection: encrypted PRS to prevent adversarial waveform synthesis, angular-based source authentication (ABSA), and a cross-layer downlink-uplink handshaking protocol to detect attacks that cannot be mitigated by encryption. Third, utilizing VeriLoc, we evaluate the proposed techniques alongside position tracking and a PRS authentication scheme, which extends the original hash-based message authentication code (HMAC) scheme design to support digital signatures. Simulation results demonstrate that while encryption, authentication schemes, and tracking robustly counter selective PRS spoofing and jamming, the proposed spatial and cross-layer mechanisms are essential for detecting meaconing, collectively maintaining attack detection rates in excess of 90% while keeping false alarm rates minimal.

ai.tldr: 针对5G定位系统中下行链路观测到达时间差（DL-OTDOA）的安全威胁，提出加密PRS、角度信源认证和跨层握手协议三种技术，结合VeriLoc仿真器验证，攻击检测率超90%。
ai.motivation: 5G精确定位依赖开放物理层，标准定位参考信号易受操纵，现有方案难以检测重放攻击。
ai.method: 设计VeriLoc开源仿真器；提出加密PRS、角度信源认证（ABSA）和跨层下行-上行握手协议；扩展HMAC方案支持数字签名。
ai.result: 加密与认证有效对抗选择性欺骗和干扰，空间与跨层机制对重放检测不可或缺，检测率>90%，虚警率极低。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解5G定位系统面临的安全威胁及多层次防御策略。

idea_spark.idea: 利用跨层握手协议结合物理层指纹，实现轻量级实时攻击定位。
idea_spark.risk: 加密PRS可能增加信号开销和同步复杂度，需权衡安全与性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将角度信源认证与机器学习异常检测结合，提升对未知攻击的泛化能力。

zh.motivation: 5G精确定位依赖开放物理层，标准定位参考信号易受操纵，现有方案难以检测重放攻击。
zh.method: 设计VeriLoc开源仿真器；提出加密PRS、角度信源认证（ABSA）和跨层下行-上行握手协议；扩展HMAC方案支持数字签名。
zh.result: 加密与认证有效对抗选择性欺骗和干扰，空间与跨层机制对重放检测不可或缺，检测率>90%，虚警率极低。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解5G定位系统面临的安全威胁及多层次防御策略。

idea_spark.idea: 利用跨层握手协议结合物理层指纹，实现轻量级实时攻击定位。
idea_spark.risk: 加密PRS可能增加信号开销和同步复杂度，需权衡安全与性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将角度信源认证与机器学习异常检测结合，提升对未知攻击的泛化能力。

en.tldr: Addresses security of DL-OTDOA in 5G by proposing encrypted PRS, angular-based source authentication, and a cross-layer handshaking protocol, evaluated via VeriLoc simulator, achieving >90% attack detection.
en.motivation: Open physical layer leaves standard PRS vulnerable to manipulation; existing schemes fail to detect meaconing.
en.method: Develops VeriLoc open-source simulator; proposes encrypted PRS, ABSA, and cross-layer downlink-uplink handshaking; extends HMAC to support digital signatures.
en.result: Encryption and authentication robustly counter spoofing/jamming; spatial and cross-layer mechanisms are essential for meaconing detection, maintaining >90% detection with minimal false alarms.
en.help_to_user: Provides insights into security threats and multi-layer defense techniques for 5G positioning systems.

idea_spark.idea: Combine cross-layer handshaking with physical-layer fingerprints for lightweight real-time attack localization.
idea_spark.risk: Encrypted PRS may increase signal overhead and synchronization complexity, requiring security-performance trade-offs.
idea_spark.inspiration: Integrate angular-based authentication with machine learning anomaly detection to generalize against unknown attacks.

papers.title: Seeing Without Eyes: 4D Human-Scene Understanding from Wearable IMUs
papers.summary: Understanding human activities and their surrounding environments typically relies on visual perception, yet cameras pose persistent challenges in privacy, safety, energy efficiency, and scalability. We explore an alternative: 4D perception without vision. Its goal is to reconstruct human motion and 3D scene layouts purely from everyday wearable sensors. For this we introduce IMU-to-4D, a framework that repurposes large language models for non-visual spatiotemporal understanding of human-scene dynamics. IMU-to-4D uses data from a few inertial sensors from earbuds, watches, or smartphones and predicts detailed 4D human motion together with coarse scene structure. Experiments across diverse human-scene datasets show that IMU-to-4D yields more coherent and temporally stable results than SoTA cascaded pipelines, suggesting wearable motion sensors alone can support rich 4D understanding.

ai.tldr: 提出仅用可穿戴惯性传感器（如耳机、手表、手机中的IMU）实现4D人体运动与场景结构重建的框架IMU-to-4D，无需视觉输入。
ai.motivation: 视觉感知在隐私、安全、能耗和可扩展性方面存在固有挑战，探索无视觉的4D感知替代方案。
ai.method: 利用大语言模型处理非视觉时空数据，从少量IMU传感器预测4D人体运动与粗略场景布局。
ai.result: 在多种人体-场景数据集上，IMU-to-4D比现有级联方法生成更连贯、时间更稳定的结果。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何仅用日常穿戴设备中的运动传感器实现隐私友好的环境感知与人体建模。

idea_spark.idea: 结合IMU与稀疏视觉锚点（如单张参考图像）进一步提升场景结构精度。
idea_spark.risk: IMU数据噪声大、漂移明显，长期或复杂场景下重建可能退化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 大语言模型对序列数据的理解能力可被重新用于物理世界的时空建模，启发更多非传统感知范式。

idea_spark.inspiration: 大语言模型对序列数据的理解能力可被重新用于物理世界的时空建模，启发更多非传统感知范式。

en.tldr: Proposes IMU-to-4D, a framework that reconstructs 4D human motion and coarse scene structure using only wearable inertial sensors (e.g., from earbuds, watches, smartphones), without any visual input.
en.motivation: Visual perception faces persistent challenges in privacy, safety, energy efficiency, and scalability; explores a vision-free alternative for 4D perception.
en.method: Leverages large language models for non-visual spatiotemporal understanding, predicting 4D human motion and coarse scene layout from a few IMU sensors.
en.result: On diverse human-scene datasets, IMU-to-4D produces more coherent and temporally stable results than state-of-the-art cascaded pipelines.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to achieve privacy-friendly environment perception and human modeling using only motion sensors from everyday wearable devices.

idea_spark.risk: IMU data is noisy and drifts significantly; reconstruction may degrade in long-term or complex scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: LLMs' ability to understand sequential data can be repurposed for physical world spatiotemporal modeling, inspiring novel non-traditional perception paradigms.

keywords_raw: large language models for non-visual perception

papers.title: Component-Based Out-of-Distribution Detection
papers.summary: Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection requires sensitivity to subtle shifts without overreacting to natural In-Distribution (ID) diversity. However, from the viewpoint of detection granularity, global representation inevitably suppress local OOD cues, while patch-based methods are unstable due to entangled spurious-correlation and noise. And neither them is effective in detecting compositional OODs composed of valid ID components. Inspired by recognition-by-components theory, we present a training-free Component-Based OOD Detection (CoOD) framework that addresses the existing limitations by decomposing inputs into functional components. To instantiate CoOD, we derive Component Shift Score (CSS) to detect local appearance shifts, and Compositional Consistency Score (CCS) to identify cross-component compositional inconsistencies. Empirically, CoOD achieves consistent improvements on both coarse- and fine-grained OOD detection.

ai.tldr: 提出基于组件的无训练OOD检测框架CoOD，通过分解输入为功能组件并计算组件偏移分数与组合一致性分数，有效检测局部外观偏移和组合异常。
ai.motivation: 全局表示会抑制局部OOD线索，而基于块的方法易受伪相关和噪声干扰，且两者均难以检测由有效ID组件组成的组合OOD。
ai.method: 受识别-组件理论启发，设计无训练框架CoOD，将输入分解为功能组件，并定义组件偏移分数（CSS）检测局部外观变化，组合一致性分数（CCS）识别跨组件组合不一致性。
ai.result: 在粗粒度和细粒度OOD检测任务上均取得一致改进。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需额外训练即可检测分布外样本的方法，尤其适用于需要识别局部异常或组合异常的视觉任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将组件分解与自监督学习结合，自动学习组件定义，减少人工设计依赖。
idea_spark.risk: 组件定义可能依赖特定先验知识，在复杂场景下组件划分的鲁棒性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 认知科学中的组件理论为视觉异常检测提供了新视角，可进一步探索组件间关系建模。

zh.tldr: 提出基于组件的无训练OOD检测框架CoOD，通过分解输入为功能组件并计算组件偏移分数与组合一致性分数，有效检测局部外观偏移和组合异常。
zh.motivation: 全局表示会抑制局部OOD线索，而基于块的方法易受伪相关和噪声干扰，且两者均难以检测由有效ID组件组成的组合OOD。
zh.method: 受识别-组件理论启发，设计无训练框架CoOD，将输入分解为功能组件，并定义组件偏移分数（CSS）检测局部外观变化，组合一致性分数（CCS）识别跨组件组合不一致性。
zh.result: 在粗粒度和细粒度OOD检测任务上均取得一致改进。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种无需额外训练即可检测分布外样本的方法，尤其适用于需要识别局部异常或组合异常的视觉任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将组件分解与自监督学习结合，自动学习组件定义，减少人工设计依赖。
idea_spark.risk: 组件定义可能依赖特定先验知识，在复杂场景下组件划分的鲁棒性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 认知科学中的组件理论为视觉异常检测提供了新视角，可进一步探索组件间关系建模。

en.tldr: Proposes a training-free Component-Based OOD Detection (CoOD) framework that decomposes inputs into functional components and uses Component Shift Score (CSS) and Compositional Consistency Score (CCS) to detect local appearance shifts and compositional anomalies.
en.motivation: Global representations suppress local OOD cues, patch-based methods suffer from spurious correlations and noise, and both fail to detect compositional OODs composed of valid ID components.
en.method: Inspired by recognition-by-components theory, CoOD decomposes inputs into functional components without training, computes CSS for local appearance shifts and CCS for cross-component compositional inconsistencies.
en.result: Achieves consistent improvements on both coarse- and fine-grained OOD detection tasks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a training-free method for detecting out-of-distribution samples, especially useful for tasks requiring identification of local anomalies or compositional anomalies in vision.

idea_spark.idea: Combine component decomposition with self-supervised learning to automatically learn component definitions, reducing manual design dependency.
idea_spark.risk: Component definitions may rely on specific prior knowledge; robustness of component partitioning in complex scenarios needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Component theory from cognitive science offers a new perspective for visual anomaly detection; further exploration of inter-component relationship modeling is promising.

papers.title: Trustworthy Clinical Decision Support Using Meta-Predicates and Domain-Specific Languages
papers.summary: \textbf{Background:} Regulatory frameworks for AI in healthcare, including the EU AI Act and FDA guidance on AI/ML-based medical devices, require clinical decision support to demonstrate not only accuracy but auditability. Existing formal languages for clinical logic validate syntactic and structural correctness but not whether decision rules use epistemologically appropriate evidence.   \textbf{Methods:} Drawing on design-by-contract principles, we introduce meta-predicates -- predicates about predicates -- for asserting epistemological constraints on clinical decision rules expressed in a DSL. An epistemological type system classifies annotations along four dimensions: purpose, knowledge domain, scale, and method of acquisition. Meta-predicates assert which evidence types are permissible in any given rule. The framework is instantiated in AnFiSA, an open-source platform for genetic variant curation, and demonstrated using the Brigham Genomics Medicine protocol on 5.6 million variants from the Genome in a Bottle benchmark.   \textbf{Results:} Decision trees used in variant interpretation can be reformulated as unate cascades, enabling per-variant audit trails that identify which rule classified each variant and why. Meta-predicate validation catches epistemological errors before deployment, whether rules are human-written or AI-generated. The approach complements post-hoc methods such as LIME and SHAP: where explanation reveals what evidence was used after the fact, meta-predicates constrain what evidence may be used before deployment, while preserving human readability.   \textbf{Conclusions:} Meta-predicate validation is a step toward demonstrating not only that decisions are accurate but that they rest on appropriate evidence in ways that can be independently audited. While demonstrated in genomics, the approach generalises to any domain requiring auditable decision logic.

ai.tldr: 提出元谓词和领域特定语言，在临床决策规则部署前施加认识论约束，确保可审计性。
ai.motivation: 现有监管框架要求临床决策支持不仅准确，还需可审计，但现有形式语言仅验证语法和结构正确性，未检查证据的认识论适当性。
ai.method: 基于设计契约原则，引入元谓词（关于谓词的谓词）对DSL中的临床决策规则施加认识论约束；构建四维认识论类型系统（目的、知识领域、尺度、获取方法），并在AnFiSA平台中实例化。
ai.result: 决策树可重构为单链级联，实现逐变体审计追踪；元谓词验证在部署前捕获认识论错误，补充LIME/SHAP等事后解释方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助临床AI开发者确保决策规则使用适当证据，满足监管可审计性要求。

idea_spark.idea: 将认识论类型系统与自动化规则生成结合，实现AI生成规则的自验证。
idea_spark.risk: 元谓词定义可能过于严格，限制临床灵活性；需领域专家参与维护类型系统。
idea_spark.inspiration: 设计契约思想在软件工程中已成熟，将其引入临床AI监管合规是自然延伸。
