en.tldr: Proposes meta-predicates and domain-specific languages to enforce epistemological constraints on clinical decision rules before deployment, ensuring auditability.
en.motivation: Regulatory frameworks require clinical decision support to be not only accurate but also auditable, yet existing formal languages only validate syntactic and structural correctness, not the epistemological appropriateness of evidence.
en.method: Drawing on design-by-contract principles, introduces meta-predicates (predicates about predicates) to assert epistemological constraints on DSL-expressed clinical rules; defines a four-dimensional epistemological type system (purpose, knowledge domain, scale, acquisition method), instantiated in the AnFiSA platform.
en.result: Decision trees are reformulated as unate cascades, enabling per-variant audit trails; meta-predicate validation catches epistemological errors before deployment, complementing post-hoc methods like LIME and SHAP.
en.help_to_user: Helps clinical AI developers ensure decision rules use appropriate evidence, meeting regulatory auditability requirements.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the epistemological type system with automated rule generation for self-validating AI-generated rules.
idea_spark.risk: Meta-predicate definitions may be too restrictive, limiting clinical flexibility; domain expert involvement is needed to maintain the type system.
idea_spark.inspiration: Design-by-contract is mature in software engineering; extending it to clinical AI regulatory compliance is a natural step.

papers.title: EngramaBench: Evaluating Long-Term Conversational Memory with Structured Graph Retrieval
papers.summary: Large language model assistants are increasingly expected to retain and reason over information accumulated across many sessions. We introduce EngramaBench, a benchmark for long-term conversational memory built around five personas, one hundred multi-session conversations, and one hundred fifty queries spanning factual recall, cross-space integration, temporal reasoning, adversarial abstention, and emergent synthesis. We evaluate Engrama, a graph-structured memory system, against GPT-4o full-context prompting and Mem0, an open-source vector-retrieval memory system. All three use the same answering model (GPT-4o), isolating the effect of memory architecture. GPT-4o full-context achieves the highest composite score (0.6186), while Engrama scores 0.5367 globally but is the only system to score higher than full-context prompting on cross-space reasoning (0.6532 vs. 0.6291, n=30). Mem0 is cheapest but substantially weaker (0.4809). Ablations reveal that the components driving Engrama's cross-space advantage trade off against global composite score, exposing a systems-level tension between structured memory specialization and aggregate optimization.

ai.tldr: 提出了EngramaBench基准，用于评估长期对话记忆，并对比了图结构记忆系统Engrama、全上下文提示和向量检索系统Mem0。
ai.motivation: 现有大语言模型助手在多会话长期记忆中表现不足，缺乏专门评估基准。
ai.method: 构建包含5个角色、100个多会话对话和150个查询的基准，测试事实回忆、跨空间整合、时间推理、对抗性回避和新兴综合能力。
ai.result: GPT-4o全上下文综合得分最高（0.6186），Engrama在跨空间推理上超越全上下文（0.6532 vs 0.6291），但全局得分较低（0.5367），Mem0最弱（0.4809）。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解不同记忆架构对长期对话性能的影响，指导选择适合场景的记忆系统。

idea_spark.idea: 结合图记忆与向量检索的混合架构，在保持全局性能的同时强化特定推理能力。
idea_spark.risk: 组件间可能存在权衡，导致全局优化困难，需谨慎设计融合策略。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Engrama在跨空间推理上的表现启发，可探索动态记忆图构建以自适应不同查询类型。

zh.tldr: 提出了EngramaBench基准，用于评估长期对话记忆，并对比了图结构记忆系统Engrama、全上下文提示和向量检索系统Mem0。
zh.motivation: 现有大语言模型助手在多会话长期记忆中表现不足，缺乏专门评估基准。
zh.method: 构建包含5个角色、100个多会话对话和150个查询的基准，测试事实回忆、跨空间整合、时间推理、对抗性回避和新兴综合能力。

idea_spark.idea: 结合图记忆与向量检索的混合架构，在保持全局性能的同时强化特定推理能力。
idea_spark.risk: 组件间可能存在权衡，导致全局优化困难，需谨慎设计融合策略。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Engrama在跨空间推理上的表现启发，可探索动态记忆图构建以自适应不同查询类型。

en.tldr: Introduces EngramaBench, a benchmark for long-term conversational memory, comparing graph-structured memory (Engrama), full-context prompting, and vector retrieval (Mem0).
en.motivation: LLM assistants lack adequate evaluation for multi-session long-term memory. Existing benchmarks are insufficient.
en.method: Constructed a benchmark with 5 personas, 100 multi-session conversations, and 150 queries covering factual recall, cross-space integration, temporal reasoning, adversarial abstention, and emergent synthesis.
en.result: GPT-4o full-context achieved highest composite score (0.6186). Engrama outperformed full-context on cross-space reasoning (0.6532 vs 0.6291) but scored lower globally (0.5367). Mem0 was weakest (0.4809).
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the impact of memory architecture on long-term conversation performance, guiding selection for specific use cases.

idea_spark.idea: Hybrid architecture combining graph memory and vector retrieval to maintain global performance while enhancing specific reasoning capabilities.
idea_spark.risk: Component trade-offs may hinder global optimization; careful fusion design is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Engrama's cross-space performance, explore dynamic memory graph construction to adapt to different query types.

papers.title: Biomedical systems biology workflow orchestration and execution with PoSyMed
papers.summary: The rapid growth of scientific software has created practical barriers for bioinformatics research. Although powerful statistical, artificial intelligence (AI)-based methods are now widely available, their effective use is often hindered by fragmented distribution, inconsistent documentation, complex dependencies, and difficult-to-reproduce execution environments. As a result, reusing published tools and workflow adaptation to own date remains technically demanding and time-intensive, even for experienced users. Here, we present PoSyMed, an open and modular platform for the controlled integration, composition, and execution of bioinformatics tools and workflows. PoSyMed combines a backend-centered platform architecture with formal tool descriptions, controlled container-based build and execution processes, persistent workflow state, and a dialogue-based user interface. Large language models (LLM) are integrated not as autonomous decision-makers, but as human-computer interface with bounded semantic assistants that help identify tools, propose workflow steps, and support parameterization within a typed, validated, and human-supervised execution environment. PoSyMed is designed to improve reproducibility, traceability, and transparency in practical biomedical analysis within one platform. We describe the system architecture and evaluate its behavior across representative biological software scenarios with respect to workflow support, interaction design, and platform extensibility. PoSyMed is publicly available at https://apps.cosy.bio/posymed.

ai.tldr: PoSyMed是一个开源模块化平台，用于生物信息学工具和流程的受控集成、组合与执行，结合后端架构、形式化工具描述、容器化执行、持久化工作流状态和对话式用户界面，并集成大语言模型作为有界语义助手，旨在提高生物医学分析的可重复性、可追溯性和透明度。
ai.motivation: 科学软件的快速增长带来了实际障碍：分布碎片化、文档不一致、依赖复杂、执行环境难以复现，导致已发布工具的重用和工作流适配耗时费力。
ai.method: 采用后端中心平台架构，结合形式化工具描述、基于容器的构建与执行流程、持久化工作流状态，以及对话式用户界面；大语言模型作为有界语义助手辅助工具识别、工作流步骤建议和参数化，而非自主决策。
ai.result: 描述了系统架构，并在代表性生物软件场景中评估了其工作流支持、交互设计和平台可扩展性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在一个统一平台中集成、组合和执行生物信息学工具与工作流，提升可重复性和易用性。

idea_spark.idea: 结合形式化工具描述和LLM辅助，实现半自动化工作流构建与参数化，同时保持人类监督。
idea_spark.risk: LLM可能产生不准确或误导性的建议，需要严格的验证和人类审核机制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受限于LLM当前的不确定性，将其定位为辅助接口而非决策者，是一种务实且安全的集成策略。

zh.tldr: PoSyMed是一个开源模块化平台，用于生物信息学工具和流程的受控集成、组合与执行，结合后端架构、形式化工具描述、容器化执行、持久化工作流状态和对话式用户界面，并集成大语言模型作为有界语义助手，旨在提高生物医学分析的可重复性、可追溯性和透明度。
zh.motivation: 科学软件的快速增长带来了实际障碍：分布碎片化、文档不一致、依赖复杂、执行环境难以复现，导致已发布工具的重用和工作流适配耗时费力。
zh.method: 采用后端中心平台架构，结合形式化工具描述、基于容器的构建与执行流程、持久化工作流状态，以及对话式用户界面；大语言模型作为有界语义助手辅助工具识别、工作流步骤建议和参数化，而非自主决策。
zh.result: 描述了系统架构，并在代表性生物软件场景中评估了其工作流支持、交互设计和平台可扩展性。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户在一个统一平台中集成、组合和执行生物信息学工具与工作流，提升可重复性和易用性。

idea_spark.idea: 结合形式化工具描述和LLM辅助，实现半自动化工作流构建与参数化，同时保持人类监督。
idea_spark.risk: LLM可能产生不准确或误导性的建议，需要严格的验证和人类审核机制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受限于LLM当前的不确定性，将其定位为辅助接口而非决策者，是一种务实且安全的集成策略。

en.tldr: PoSyMed is an open modular platform for controlled integration, composition, and execution of bioinformatics tools and workflows, combining a backend-centered architecture, formal tool descriptions, container-based execution, persistent workflow state, and a dialogue-based UI, with LLMs integrated as bounded semantic assistants to improve reproducibility, traceability, and transparency in biomedical analysis.
en.motivation: The rapid growth of scientific software has created practical barriers: fragmented distribution, inconsistent documentation, complex dependencies, and difficult-to-reproduce execution environments, making reuse and workflow adaptation time-intensive even for experienced users.
en.method: A backend-centered platform architecture with formal tool descriptions, container-based build and execution, persistent workflow state, and a dialogue-based user interface; LLMs are integrated as bounded semantic assistants for tool identification, workflow step suggestion, and parameterization, not as autonomous decision-makers.
en.result: The system architecture is described and evaluated across representative biological software scenarios regarding workflow support, interaction design, and platform extensibility.
en.help_to_user: Helps users integrate, compose, and execute bioinformatics tools and workflows in a unified platform, improving reproducibility and ease of use.

idea_spark.idea: Combine formal tool descriptions with LLM assistance for semi-automated workflow construction and parameterization while maintaining human oversight.
idea_spark.risk: LLMs may produce inaccurate or misleading suggestions, requiring rigorous validation and human review mechanisms.
idea_spark.inspiration: Given the current uncertainty of LLMs, positioning them as assistive interfaces rather than decision-makers is a pragmatic and safe integration strategy.

papers.title: Unlocking the Power of Critical Factors for 3D Visual Geometry Estimation
papers.summary: Feed-forward visual geometry estimation has recently made rapid progress. However, an important gap remains: multi-frame models usually produce better cross-frame consistency, yet they often underperform strong per-frame methods on single-frame accuracy. This observation motivates our systematic investigation into the critical factors driving model performance through rigorous ablation studies, which reveals several key insights: 1) Scaling up data diversity and quality unlocks further performance gains even in state-of-the-art visual geometry estimation methods; 2) Commonly adopted confidence-aware loss and gradient-based loss mechanisms may unintentionally hinder performance; 3) Joint supervision through both per-sequence and per-frame alignment improves results, while local region alignment surprisingly degrades performance. Furthermore, we introduce two enhancements to integrate the advantages of optimization-based methods and high-resolution inputs: a consistency loss function that enforces alignment between depth maps, camera parameters, and point maps, and an efficient architectural design that leverages high-resolution information. We integrate these designs into CARVE, a resolution-enhanced model for feed-forward visual geometry estimation. Experiments on point cloud reconstruction, video depth estimation, and camera pose/intrinsic estimation show that CARVE achieves strong and robust performance across diverse benchmarks.

ai.tldr: 本文系统研究了影响前馈式3D视觉几何估计的关键因素，发现数据多样性与质量、损失函数设计以及联合监督策略的重要性，并提出了CARVE模型，在多个基准上取得强鲁棒性能。
ai.motivation: 多帧模型在跨帧一致性上表现更好，但单帧精度常弱于逐帧方法，这一差距促使作者系统探究影响模型性能的关键因素。
ai.method: 通过严格消融实验揭示关键因素，并引入一致性损失函数（对齐深度图、相机参数和点图）以及高效利用高分辨率信息的架构设计，集成到CARVE模型中。
ai.result: 在点云重建、视频深度估计和相机位姿/内参估计等任务上，CARVE在多个基准上实现了强且鲁棒的性能。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解3D视觉几何估计中哪些因素真正重要，以及如何设计更有效的模型。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将局部区域对齐的负面效果转化为正则化项，或设计自适应损失权重以平衡单帧精度与跨帧一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 高分辨率输入可能增加计算开销，需权衡效率与性能；一致性损失可能过度约束导致自由度降低。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从消融实验中发现常用损失机制的意外缺陷，启发重新审视现有设计假设。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将局部区域对齐的负面效果转化为正则化项，或设计自适应损失权重以平衡单帧精度与跨帧一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 高分辨率输入可能增加计算开销，需权衡效率与性能；一致性损失可能过度约束导致自由度降低。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从消融实验中发现常用损失机制的意外缺陷，启发重新审视现有设计假设。

en.tldr: This paper systematically investigates critical factors for feed-forward 3D visual geometry estimation, revealing the importance of data diversity, loss design, and joint supervision, and proposes CARVE which achieves strong and robust performance across multiple benchmarks.
en.motivation: Multi-frame models often yield better cross-frame consistency but underperform per-frame methods on single-frame accuracy, motivating a systematic investigation of key factors.
en.method: Rigorous ablation studies uncover key insights; a consistency loss aligning depth maps, camera parameters, and point maps, along with an efficient high-resolution architecture, are integrated into CARVE.
en.result: CARVE achieves strong and robust performance on point cloud reconstruction, video depth estimation, and camera pose/intrinsic estimation across diverse benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand which factors truly matter in 3D visual geometry estimation and how to design more effective models.

idea_spark.idea: Explore converting the negative effect of local region alignment into a regularization term, or design adaptive loss weights to balance single-frame accuracy and cross-frame consistency.
idea_spark.risk: High-resolution inputs may increase computational cost, requiring efficiency trade-offs; consistency loss may over-constrain and reduce degrees of freedom.
idea_spark.inspiration: Discovering unexpected flaws in commonly used loss mechanisms from ablation studies inspires rethinking existing design assumptions.

papers.title: Foveated Reasoning: Stateful, Action-based Visual Focusing for Vision-Language Models
papers.summary: Vision-language models benefit from high-resolution images, but the increase in visual-token count incurs high compute overhead. Humans resolve this tension via foveation: a coarse view guides "where to look", while selectively acquired high-acuity evidence refines "what to think". We introduce Foveated Reasoner, an autoregressive vision-language framework that unifies foveation and reasoning within a single decoding trajectory. Starting from a low-resolution view, the model triggers foveation only when needed, retrieves high-resolution evidence from selected regions, and injects it back into the same decoding trajectory. We train the method with a two-stage pipeline: coldstart supervision to bootstrap foveation behavior, followed by reinforcement learning to jointly improve evidence acquisition and task accuracy while discouraging trivial "see-everything" solutions. Experiments show that the method learns effective foveation policies and achieves stronger accuracy under tight visual-token budgets across multiple vision-language benchmarks.

ai.tldr: 提出Foveated Reasoner，一种自回归视觉语言框架，通过粗视图引导注意力、按需获取高分辨率证据，在相同视觉令牌预算下提升准确率。
ai.motivation: 高分辨率图像带来大量视觉令牌，计算开销大；人类通过中央凹视觉机制解决此矛盾。
ai.method: 采用自回归解码，从低分辨率视图开始，仅在需要时触发中央凹，获取选定区域的高分辨率证据并注入同一解码轨迹；两阶段训练：冷启动监督学习引导中央凹行为，强化学习联合优化证据获取与任务准确率。
ai.result: 在多个视觉语言基准上，方法在严格视觉令牌预算下学习到有效的中央凹策略，准确率优于基线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不增加计算负担的情况下，通过智能聚焦提升视觉语言模型对高分辨率图像的推理能力。

idea_spark.idea: 将中央凹机制与强化学习结合，使模型自主决定何时及何处获取高分辨率信息，避免无差别处理所有区域。
idea_spark.risk: 训练两阶段流程复杂，冷启动监督可能限制探索；强化学习可能收敛到次优策略。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类视觉系统启发，将注意力分配与推理过程深度融合，实现计算效率与精度的平衡。

idea_spark.idea: 将中央凹机制与强化学习结合，使模型自主决定何时及何处获取高分辨率信息，避免无差别处理所有区域。
idea_spark.risk: 训练两阶段流程复杂，冷启动监督可能限制探索；强化学习可能收敛到次优策略。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类视觉系统启发，将注意力分配与推理过程深度融合，实现计算效率与精度的平衡。

en.tldr: Proposes Foveated Reasoner, an autoregressive vision-language framework that uses a coarse view to guide attention and selectively acquires high-resolution evidence only when needed, improving accuracy under tight visual-token budgets.
en.motivation: High-resolution images increase visual-token count and compute overhead; humans resolve this via foveation.
en.method: Autoregressive decoding starts from a low-resolution view; foveation is triggered on demand to retrieve high-resolution evidence from selected regions and inject it back into the same trajectory. Two-stage training: coldstart supervision bootstraps foveation, then reinforcement learning jointly optimizes evidence acquisition and task accuracy.
en.result: On multiple vision-language benchmarks, the method learns effective foveation policies and achieves stronger accuracy under strict visual-token budgets.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to improve vision-language model reasoning on high-resolution images without increasing compute cost, via intelligent visual focusing.

idea_spark.idea: Combine foveation with reinforcement learning so the model autonomously decides when and where to acquire high-resolution information, avoiding indiscriminate processing.
idea_spark.risk: Two-stage training is complex; coldstart supervision may limit exploration; reinforcement learning might converge to suboptimal policies.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the human visual system, deeply integrating attention allocation with reasoning to balance computational efficiency and accuracy.

papers.title: SyMTRS: Benchmark Multi-Task Synthetic Dataset for Depth, Domain Adaptation and Super-Resolution in Aerial Imagery
papers.summary: Recent advances in deep learning for remote sensing rely heavily on large annotated datasets, yet acquiring high-quality ground truth for geometric, radiometric, and multi-domain tasks remains costly and often infeasible. In particular, the lack of accurate depth annotations, controlled illumination variations, and multi-scale paired imagery limits progress in monocular depth estimation, domain adaptation, and super-resolution for aerial scenes. We present SyMTRS, a large-scale synthetic dataset generated using a high-fidelity urban simulation pipeline. The dataset provides high-resolution RGB aerial imagery (2048 x 2048), pixel-perfect depth maps, night-time counterparts for domain adaptation, and aligned low-resolution variants for super-resolution at x2, x4, and x8 scales. Unlike existing remote sensing datasets that focus on a single task or modality, SyMTRS is designed as a unified multi-task benchmark enabling joint research in geometric understanding, cross-domain robustness, and resolution enhancement. We describe the dataset generation process, its statistical properties, and its positioning relative to existing benchmarks. SyMTRS aims to bridge critical gaps in remote sensing research by enabling controlled experiments with perfect geometric ground truth and consistent multi-domain supervision. The results obtained in this work can be reproduced from this Github repository: https://github.com/safouaneelg/SyMTRS.

ai.tldr: 提出了一个大规模合成多任务遥感数据集SyMTRS，包含高分辨率RGB图像、精确深度图、夜间图像和低分辨率变体，用于深度估计、域自适应和超分辨率研究。
ai.motivation: 现有遥感数据集缺乏精确深度标注、可控光照变化和多尺度配对图像，限制了单目深度估计、域自适应和超分辨率等任务的研究。
ai.method: 使用高保真城市仿真管线生成2048x2048的RGB图像、像素级深度图、夜间图像以及x2/x4/x8的低分辨率版本，构建统一多任务基准。
ai.result: 提供了数据集生成过程、统计特性及其与现有基准的对比，并开源了代码。
ai.help_to_user: 该数据集为遥感领域研究者提供了一个包含完美几何真值和多域监督的标准化测试平台，便于开展深度估计、域自适应和超分辨率的联合实验。

idea_spark.idea: 利用该数据集训练一个统一的多任务模型，同时输出深度图、域不变特征和超分辨率结果，并探索任务间的协同学习。
idea_spark.risk: 合成数据与真实数据之间存在域差异，模型在真实场景中的泛化能力可能受限，需要额外的域适应策略。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受多任务学习启发，可进一步扩展数据集以包含语义分割、目标检测等任务，构建更全面的遥感基础模型评估基准。

zh.tldr: 提出了一个大规模合成多任务遥感数据集SyMTRS，包含高分辨率RGB图像、精确深度图、夜间图像和低分辨率变体，用于深度估计、域自适应和超分辨率研究。

en.tldr: Proposes SyMTRS, a large-scale synthetic multi-task remote sensing dataset with high-resolution RGB, pixel-perfect depth, night-time images, and low-resolution variants for depth estimation, domain adaptation, and super-resolution.
en.motivation: Existing remote sensing datasets lack accurate depth annotations, controlled illumination variations, and multi-scale paired imagery, hindering progress in monocular depth estimation, domain adaptation, and super-resolution.
en.method: Generates 2048x2048 RGB imagery, pixel-perfect depth maps, night-time counterparts, and x2/x4/x8 low-resolution variants using a high-fidelity urban simulation pipeline, forming a unified multi-task benchmark.
en.result: Describes dataset generation, statistical properties, and comparison with existing benchmarks; code is open-sourced.
en.help_to_user: Provides a standardized testbed with perfect geometric ground truth and multi-domain supervision for joint research in depth estimation, domain adaptation, and super-resolution in aerial scenes.

idea_spark.idea: Train a unified multi-task model on this dataset to simultaneously output depth maps, domain-invariant features, and super-resolved images, exploring synergistic learning among tasks.
idea_spark.risk: Domain gap between synthetic and real data may limit generalization; additional domain adaptation techniques are needed for real-world deployment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by multi-task learning, the dataset could be extended to include semantic segmentation and object detection, creating a comprehensive benchmark for remote sensing foundation models.

papers.title: From Tokens to Concepts: Leveraging SAE for SPLADE
papers.summary: Learned Sparse IR models, such as SPLADE, offer an excellent efficiency-effectiveness tradeoff. However, they rely on the underlying backbone vocabulary, which might hinder performance (polysemicity and synonymy) and pose a challenge for multi-lingual and multi-modal usages. To solve this limitation, we propose to replace the backbone vocabulary with a latent space of semantic concepts learned using Sparse Auto-Encoders (SAE). Throughout this paper, we study the compatibility of these 2 concepts, explore training approaches, and analyze the differences between our SAE-SPLADE model and traditional SPLADE models. Our experiments demonstrate that SAE-SPLADE achieves retrieval performance comparable to SPLADE on both in-domain and out-of-domain tasks while offering improved efficiency.

ai.tldr: 提出用稀疏自编码器学习语义概念空间替代SPLADE的骨干词汇，实现可比性能并提升效率。
ai.motivation: SPLADE依赖骨干词汇，存在多义性和同义词问题，且难以扩展到多语言和多模态场景。
ai.method: 用稀疏自编码器（SAE）从文档中学习潜在语义概念空间，替换SPLADE的原始词汇表。
ai.result: SAE-SPLADE在域内和域外任务上检索性能与SPLADE相当，同时效率更高。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何用SAE改进稀疏检索模型，提升跨语言/模态的泛化能力。

idea_spark.idea: 将SAE与对比学习结合，进一步对齐多语言语义概念。
idea_spark.risk: 概念空间可能丢失细粒度词汇信息，影响精确匹配任务。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受SAE在语言模型可解释性中的应用启发，将其引入信息检索领域。

zh.tldr: 提出用稀疏自编码器学习语义概念空间替代SPLADE的骨干词汇，实现可比性能并提升效率。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受SAE在语言模型可解释性中的应用启发，将其引入信息检索领域。

en.tldr: Proposes replacing SPLADE's backbone vocabulary with a latent semantic concept space learned via Sparse Auto-Encoders, achieving comparable performance and improved efficiency.
en.motivation: SPLADE relies on a backbone vocabulary, suffering from polysemy and synonymy issues, and faces challenges in multi-lingual and multi-modal settings.
en.method: Uses Sparse Auto-Encoders (SAE) to learn a latent space of semantic concepts from documents, replacing the original vocabulary in SPLADE.
en.result: SAE-SPLADE achieves retrieval performance comparable to SPLADE on both in-domain and out-of-domain tasks, with better efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how SAE can improve sparse retrieval models for better cross-lingual/modal generalization.

idea_spark.idea: Combine SAE with contrastive learning to further align multi-lingual semantic concepts.
idea_spark.risk: The concept space may lose fine-grained lexical information, affecting exact-match tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by SAE's use in language model interpretability, applied here to information retrieval.

papers.title: GRISP: Guided Recurrent IRI Selection over SPARQL Skeletons
papers.summary: We present GRISP (Guided Recurrent IRI Selection over SPARQL Skeletons), a novel SPARQL-based question-answering method over knowledge graphs based on fine-tuning a small language model (SLM). Given a natural-language question, the method first uses the SLM to generate a natural-language SPARQL query skeleton, and then to re-rank and select knowledge graph items to iteratively replace the natural-language placeholders using knowledge graph constraints. The SLM is jointly trained on skeleton generation and list-wise re-ranking data generated from standard question-query pairs. We evaluate the method on common Wikidata and Freebase benchmarks, and achieve better results than other state-of-the-art methods in a comparable setting.

ai.tldr: 提出GRISP方法，通过微调小语言模型生成SPARQL骨架并迭代选择知识图谱项，在Wikidata和Freebase基准上取得优于现有方法的结果。
ai.motivation: 现有基于SPARQL的知识图谱问答方法依赖大型语言模型或复杂管道，效率与可扩展性受限。
ai.method: 先使用小语言模型生成自然语言SPARQL查询骨架，再通过列表级重排序和知识图谱约束迭代替换占位符。
ai.result: 在Wikidata和Freebase基准上，GRISP在可比设置下优于其他最先进方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效、轻量的知识图谱问答方案，适合资源受限场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将小语言模型与知识图谱约束结合，实现无需大型模型的精准查询生成。
idea_spark.risk: 小语言模型可能对复杂或模糊问题理解不足，导致骨架生成错误。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用知识图谱的结构化反馈迭代优化自然语言到查询的映射，可启发更通用的语义解析方法。

zh.tldr: 提出GRISP方法，通过微调小语言模型生成SPARQL骨架并迭代选择知识图谱项，在Wikidata和Freebase基准上取得优于现有方法的结果。
zh.motivation: 现有基于SPARQL的知识图谱问答方法依赖大型语言模型或复杂管道，效率与可扩展性受限。
zh.method: 先使用小语言模型生成自然语言SPARQL查询骨架，再通过列表级重排序和知识图谱约束迭代替换占位符。
zh.result: 在Wikidata和Freebase基准上，GRISP在可比设置下优于其他最先进方法。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效、轻量的知识图谱问答方案，适合资源受限场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将小语言模型与知识图谱约束结合，实现无需大型模型的精准查询生成。
idea_spark.risk: 小语言模型可能对复杂或模糊问题理解不足，导致骨架生成错误。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用知识图谱的结构化反馈迭代优化自然语言到查询的映射，可启发更通用的语义解析方法。

en.tldr: GRISP uses a fine-tuned small language model to generate SPARQL skeletons and iteratively select knowledge graph items, achieving state-of-the-art results on Wikidata and Freebase benchmarks.
en.motivation: Existing SPARQL-based QA methods rely on large language models or complex pipelines, limiting efficiency and scalability.
en.method: First generate a natural-language SPARQL query skeleton with a small LM, then iteratively replace placeholders via list-wise re-ranking and KG constraints.
en.result: GRISP outperforms comparable state-of-the-art methods on Wikidata and Freebase benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Offers an efficient, lightweight approach for KG question answering, suitable for resource-constrained settings.

idea_spark.idea: Combine small LMs with KG constraints for precise query generation without large models.
idea_spark.risk: Small LMs may misinterpret complex or ambiguous questions, leading to incorrect skeletons.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using structured KG feedback to iteratively refine natural-language-to-query mappings can inspire more general semantic parsing methods.

papers.title: A Brief History of Fréchet Distances: From Curves and Probability Laws to FID
papers.summary: This note provides a chronological account of Fréchet distances, starting with Maurice Fréchet's 1906 doctoral thesis on distances in abstract sets and tracing the Fréchet distance between polygonal curves and its algorithmic computation in the 1990s. It then continues with his 1957 paper on a coupling-based distance between probability laws with a brief glimpse of Wasserstein distance and optimal transport. We further attempt to draw connections between the distributional, coupling-based facet of Fréchet distances on probability laws and the geometric facet on curves. The note ends with a modern use case, the Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) in the era of deep generative model evaluation, interpretable as the Wasserstein-2 distance between multivariate Gaussians in a learned feature space. An appendix includes \TeX{}ified faithful English translations of Fréchet's 1906 thesis and 1957 paper, and Lévy's 1950 note for reader convenience.

ai.tldr: 本文按时间顺序梳理了Fréchet距离的发展历程，从1906年Maurice Fréchet的博士论文到1990年代折线间的Fréchet距离算法，再到1957年基于耦合的概率分布距离，最后以深度学习生成模型评估中的FID作为现代应用案例。
ai.motivation: 系统回顾Fréchet距离在曲线几何与概率分布两个分支中的历史演变，并揭示其内在联系。
ai.method: 通过文献综述和概念追踪，对比几何Fréchet距离与分布耦合Fréchet距离，并解释FID作为Wasserstein-2距离的实例。
ai.result: 建立了Fréchet距离从抽象集合到折线算法、再到概率分布和生成模型评估的完整时间线，并附有原始文献的英文翻译。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助读者理解Fréchet距离的数学根源及其在机器学习中的现代应用。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将Fréchet距离的思想用于非欧几里得空间中的生成模型评估。
idea_spark.risk: 不同分支的数学框架差异可能导致统一表述的复杂性。
idea_spark.inspiration: FID的成功表明，将经典数学概念与深度学习特征空间结合能产生实用评估指标。

zh.tldr: 本文按时间顺序梳理了Fréchet距离的发展历程，从1906年Maurice Fréchet的博士论文到1990年代折线间的Fréchet距离算法，再到1957年基于耦合的概率分布距离，最后以深度学习生成模型评估中的FID作为现代应用案例。

idea_spark.risk: 不同分支的数学框架差异可能导致统一表述的复杂性。
idea_spark.inspiration: FID的成功表明，将经典数学概念与深度学习特征空间结合能产生实用评估指标。

en.tldr: This note chronologically traces Fréchet distances from Maurice Fréchet's 1906 doctoral thesis on abstract sets, through the 1990s algorithm for polygonal curves, to his 1957 coupling-based distance for probability laws, and finally to the modern Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) for deep generative model evaluation.
en.motivation: To systematically review the historical evolution of Fréchet distances in both curve geometry and probability distribution branches, and to reveal their intrinsic connections.
en.method: Through literature review and conceptual tracing, comparing geometric Fréchet distance with distributional coupling-based Fréchet distance, and interpreting FID as an instance of Wasserstein-2 distance.
en.result: Establishes a complete timeline of Fréchet distance from abstract sets to polygonal curve algorithms, then to probability distributions and generative model evaluation, with appended English translations of original works.
en.help_to_user: Helps readers understand the mathematical roots of Fréchet distance and its modern applications in machine learning.

idea_spark.idea: Explore applying Fréchet distance ideas to generative model evaluation in non-Euclidean spaces.
idea_spark.risk: Mathematical framework differences between branches may complicate unified exposition.
idea_spark.inspiration: FID's success shows that combining classical mathematical concepts with deep learning feature spaces yields practical evaluation metrics.

papers.title: From Noise to Intent: Anchoring Generative VLA Policies with Residual Bridges
papers.summary: Bridging high-level semantic understanding with low-level physical control remains a persistent challenge in embodied intelligence, stemming from the fundamental spatiotemporal scale mismatch between cognition and action. Existing generative VLA policies typically adopt a "Generation-from-Noise" paradigm, which disregards this disparity, leading to representation inefficiency and weak condition alignment during optimization. In this work, we propose ResVLA, an architecture that shifts the paradigm to "Refinement-from-Intent." Recognizing that robotic motion naturally decomposes into global intent and local dynamics, ResVLA utilizes spectral analysis to decouple control into a deterministic low-frequency anchor and a stochastic high-frequency residual. By anchoring the generative process on the predicted intent, our model focuses strictly on refining local dynamics via a residual diffusion bridge. Extensive simulation experiments show that ResVLA achieves competitive performance, strong robustness to language and robot embodiment perturbations, and faster convergence than standard generative baselines. It also demonstrates strong performance in real-world robot experiments.

papers.title: Recursive Structure of Hulls of PRM Codes
papers.summary: For a nonnegative integer $r$ and a positive integer $v$ satisfying   \[   \frac{r(q-1)}{2}<v<\frac{(r+1)(q-1)}{2},   \]   we define the combinatorial numbers   \[   A_r(v)=   \begin{cases}   \displaystyle   \sum_{t=r(q-1)-v}^{v}\ \sum_{j=0}^{r}(-1)^j\binom{r}{j}\binom{t-jq+r-1}{r-1}, & r>0,\\[1.2ex]   1, & r=0.   \end{cases}   \]   For the projective Reed-Muller code $\PRM(q,m,v)$, we determine its hull dimension:   \[   \dim \Hull\bigl(\PRM(q,m,v)\bigr)   =   \dim \PRM(q,m,v)   -   \sum_{i=0}^{\ell}A_{2i+ε}\bigl(v-(\ell-i)(q-1)\bigr),   \]   where   \[   \ell=\Bigl\lfloor\frac r2\Bigr\rfloor,\qquad   ε=   \begin{cases}   0, & r\ \text{is even},   1, & r\ \text{is odd}.   \end{cases}   \]   This formula applies in the open lower-half range   $   0<v<\frac{m\Qm}{2},   $   equivalently for $v\in I_r$ with $m\ge r+1$; the range   $   \frac{m\Qm}{2}<v<m\Qm   $   is then obtained by Sørensen's duality theorem \cite{Sorensen}.

ai.tldr: 给出了射影Reed-Muller码在特定参数范围内的壳维数精确公式，并揭示了其递归结构。
ai.motivation: 射影Reed-Muller码的壳维数在编码理论中具有重要应用，但此前缺乏一般公式。
ai.method: 通过定义组合数A_r(v)并利用Sørensen对偶定理，推导出壳维数的闭式表达式。
ai.result: 得到了壳维数等于PRM码维数减去若干组合数之和的公式，适用于下半个开区间。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解射影Reed-Muller码的壳结构，可用于构造自对偶码或分析码的纠错能力。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将类似递归结构应用于广义Reed-Muller码或仿射Reed-Muller码的壳分析。
idea_spark.risk: 组合数求和可能在高维或大参数下计算复杂，需注意数值稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用对偶性简化壳维数计算，启发其他码类中对称性结构的挖掘。

zh.tldr: 给出了射影Reed-Muller码在特定参数范围内的壳维数精确公式，并揭示了其递归结构。
zh.motivation: 射影Reed-Muller码的壳维数在编码理论中具有重要应用，但此前缺乏一般公式。
zh.method: 通过定义组合数A_r(v)并利用Sørensen对偶定理，推导出壳维数的闭式表达式。
zh.result: 得到了壳维数等于PRM码维数减去若干组合数之和的公式，适用于下半个开区间。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解射影Reed-Muller码的壳结构，可用于构造自对偶码或分析码的纠错能力。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将类似递归结构应用于广义Reed-Muller码或仿射Reed-Muller码的壳分析。
idea_spark.risk: 组合数求和可能在高维或大参数下计算复杂，需注意数值稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用对偶性简化壳维数计算，启发其他码类中对称性结构的挖掘。

en.tldr: We derive an exact formula for the hull dimension of projective Reed-Muller codes in a specific parameter range and reveal its recursive structure.
en.motivation: The hull dimension of projective Reed-Muller codes has important applications in coding theory, but a general formula was lacking.
en.method: By defining combinatorial numbers A_r(v) and applying Sørensen's duality theorem, we obtain a closed-form expression for the hull dimension.
en.result: The hull dimension equals the dimension of the PRM code minus a sum of combinatorial numbers, valid in the lower half of the open interval.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the hull structure of projective Reed-Muller codes, useful for constructing self-dual codes or analyzing error-correction capability.

idea_spark.idea: Try applying a similar recursive structure to analyze hulls of generalized Reed-Muller codes or affine Reed-Muller codes.
idea_spark.risk: Summation of combinatorial numbers may become computationally heavy for high dimensions or large parameters; numerical stability must be considered.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using duality to simplify hull dimension calculations inspires exploring symmetry structures in other code families.

papers.title: Attention-based multiple instance learning for predominant growth pattern prediction in lung adenocarcinoma wsi using foundation models
papers.summary: Lung adenocarcinoma (LUAD) grading depends on accurately identifying growth patterns, which are indicators of prognosis and can influence treatment decisions. Common deep learning approaches to determine the predominant pattern rely on patch-level classification or segmentation, requiring extensive annotations. This study proposes an attention-based multiple instance learning (ABMIL) framework to predict the predominant LUAD growth pattern at the whole slide level to reduce annotation burden. Our approach integrates pretrained pathology foundation models as patch encoders, used either frozen or fine-tuned on annotated patches, to extract discriminative features that are aggregated through attention mechanisms. Experiments show that fine-tuned encoders improve performance, with Prov-GigaPath achieving the highest agreement (\k{appa} = 0.699) under ABMIL. Compared to simple patch-aggregation baselines, ABMIL yields more robust predictions by leveraging slide-level supervision and spatial attention. Future work will extend this framework to estimate the full distribution of growth patterns and validate performance on external cohorts.

ai.tldr: 提出基于注意力的多实例学习框架，利用病理基础模型预测肺腺癌WSI中的主要生长模式，减少标注负担。
ai.motivation: 肺腺癌分级依赖生长模式识别，传统深度学习方法需要大量精细标注，成本高。
ai.method: 采用注意力多实例学习（ABMIL）框架，以预训练病理基础模型（如Prov-GigaPath）作为切片编码器，可冻结或微调，通过注意力机制聚合特征。
ai.result: 微调编码器提升性能，Prov-GigaPath在ABMIL下达到最高一致性（κ=0.699），优于简单聚合基线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助病理学家自动识别主要生长模式，减少人工标注工作量，提高诊断效率。

idea_spark.idea: 结合多实例学习与基础模型，实现弱监督下的精细病理特征提取。
idea_spark.risk: 外部数据集泛化性未验证，且仅预测主要模式而非完整分布。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用注意力机制定位关键区域，可启发可解释病理AI设计。

en.tldr: Proposes an attention-based multiple instance learning framework using pathology foundation models to predict predominant growth patterns in lung adenocarcinoma WSIs, reducing annotation burden.
en.motivation: LUAD grading requires identifying growth patterns; traditional deep learning methods need extensive fine-grained annotations.
en.method: Uses ABMIL with pretrained pathology foundation models (e.g., Prov-GigaPath) as patch encoders, either frozen or fine-tuned, aggregating features via attention.
en.result: Fine-tuned encoders improve performance; Prov-GigaPath achieves highest agreement (κ=0.699) under ABMIL, outperforming simple aggregation baselines.
en.help_to_user: Assists pathologists in automatically identifying predominant growth patterns, reducing manual annotation effort and improving diagnostic efficiency.

idea_spark.idea: Combines multiple instance learning with foundation models for weakly supervised fine-grained pathological feature extraction.
idea_spark.risk: Generalization on external datasets is unvalidated; only predicts predominant pattern, not full distribution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Attention mechanisms localize key regions, inspiring interpretable pathology AI design.

papers.title: A Ground-Truth-Based Evaluation of Vulnerability Detection Across Multiple Ecosystems
papers.summary: Automated vulnerability detection tools are widely used to identify security vulnerabilities in software dependencies. However, the evaluation of such tools remains challenging due to the heterogeneous structure of vulnerability data sources, inconsistent identifier schemes, and ambiguities in version range specifications. In this paper, we present an empirical evaluation of vulnerability detection across multiple software ecosystems using a curated ground-truth dataset derived from the Open Source Vulnerabilities (OSV) database. The dataset explicitly maps vulnerabilities to concrete package versions and enables a systematic comparison of detection results across different tools and services. Since vulnerability databases such as OSV are continuously updated, the dataset used in this study represents a snapshot of the vulnerability landscape at the time of the evaluation. To support reproducibility and future studies, we provide an open-source tool that automatically reconstructs the dataset from the current OSV database using the methodology described in this paper. Our evaluation highlights systematic differences between vulnerability detection systems and demonstrates the importance of transparent dataset construction for reproducible empirical security research.

ai.tldr: 基于OSV数据库构建的真实数据集，对多个软件生态系统的漏洞检测工具进行了实证评估。
ai.motivation: 现有漏洞检测工具评估因数据源异构、标识符不一致和版本范围模糊而困难。
ai.method: 从OSV数据库提取并构建了将漏洞映射到具体包版本的真实数据集，并开放了可复现的工具。
ai.result: 揭示了不同检测系统之间的系统性差异，强调了透明数据集构建对可重复安全研究的重要性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解不同漏洞检测工具的差异，并提供了可复现的评估方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用OSV等持续更新的数据库，自动构建动态基准测试集，用于持续评估工具性能。
idea_spark.risk: 数据库快照可能随时间过时，需定期更新以保持评估时效性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴了软件工程中可复现实验的设计思想，推动安全研究的标准化评估。

en.tldr: An empirical evaluation of vulnerability detection across multiple ecosystems using a ground-truth dataset from the OSV database.
en.motivation: Evaluating vulnerability detection tools is challenging due to heterogeneous data sources, inconsistent identifiers, and ambiguous version ranges.
en.method: Constructed a ground-truth dataset mapping vulnerabilities to concrete package versions from OSV, and released an open-source tool for reproducibility.
en.result: Revealed systematic differences among detection systems and highlighted the importance of transparent dataset construction for reproducible security research.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand differences among vulnerability detection tools and provides a reproducible evaluation methodology.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage continuously updated databases like OSV to build dynamic benchmarks for ongoing tool evaluation.
idea_spark.risk: Database snapshots may become outdated; periodic updates are needed to maintain evaluation timeliness.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by reproducible experiment design in software engineering, promoting standardized evaluation in security research.

papers.title: Directional Confusions Reveal Divergent Inductive Biases Through Rate-Distortion Geometry in Human and Machine Vision
papers.summary: Humans and modern vision models can reach similar classification accuracy while making systematically different kinds of mistakes - differing not in how often they err, but in who gets mistaken for whom, and in which direction. We show that these directional confusions reveal distinct inductive biases that are invisible to accuracy alone. Using matched human and deep vision model responses on a natural-image categorization task under 12 perturbation types, we quantify asymmetry in confusion matrices and link it to generalization geometry through a Rate-Distortion (RD) framework, summarized by three geometric signatures (slope (beta), curvature (kappa)) and efficiency (AUC). We find that humans exhibit broad but weak asymmetries, whereas deep vision models show sparser, stronger directional collapses. Robustness training reduces global asymmetry but fails to recover the human-like breadth-strength profile of graded similarity. Mechanistic simulations further show that different asymmetry organizations shift the RD frontier in opposite directions, even when matched for performance. Together, these results position directional confusions and RD geometry as compact, interpretable signatures of inductive bias under distribution shift.

ai.tldr: 人类与深度视觉模型在分类错误的方向性上存在系统性差异，这种差异揭示了不同的归纳偏好，而仅靠准确率无法察觉。
ai.motivation: 传统上仅用准确率比较人类与机器视觉，忽略了错误方向性所蕴含的归纳偏好信息。
ai.method: 在12种扰动下的自然图像分类任务中，收集人类与深度模型响应，量化混淆矩阵不对称性，并通过率失真框架提取三个几何特征（斜率、曲率、效率）。
ai.result: 人类表现出广泛但微弱的不对称性，深度模型则呈现稀疏而强烈的方向性坍塌；鲁棒性训练降低全局不对称性，但无法恢复人类式的广度-强度梯度相似性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解人类与机器视觉在分布偏移下的归纳偏好差异，为设计更类人的视觉模型提供几何度量工具。

idea_spark.idea: 利用方向性混淆的几何特征指导模型训练，使其在保持性能的同时更接近人类的错误模式。
idea_spark.risk: 过度拟合人类错误模式可能牺牲模型在特定任务上的鲁棒性或效率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从信息论角度量化认知偏差，启发将率失真框架应用于其他感知或决策系统的比较研究。

en.tldr: Humans and deep vision models differ systematically in the direction of their classification errors, revealing distinct inductive biases invisible to accuracy alone.
en.motivation: Accuracy-based comparisons overlook the inductive biases encoded in the directional structure of errors.
en.method: On a natural-image categorization task with 12 perturbation types, we quantified confusion matrix asymmetry and extracted three geometric signatures (slope, curvature, efficiency) via a Rate-Distortion framework.
en.result: Humans show broad but weak asymmetries; deep models exhibit sparse, strong directional collapses. Robustness training reduces global asymmetry but fails to recover the human-like breadth-strength profile.
en.help_to_user: Provides compact geometric signatures to compare inductive biases between humans and machines under distribution shift.

idea_spark.idea: Use directional confusion geometry to guide training toward human-like error patterns while maintaining performance.
idea_spark.risk: Overfitting human error patterns may reduce model robustness or efficiency on specific tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Quantifying cognitive biases through information theory inspires applying the rate-distortion framework to compare other perceptual or decision systems.

papers.title: A Bochner-type integration theory for random normed modules
papers.summary: We develop a measure and integration theory for random normed modules. Given a probability space $({\rm X},Σ,\mathfrak m)$, we introduce and study measures taking values into the space $L^0(\mathfrak m)$ of $\mathfrak m$-measurable functions quotiented up to $\mathfrak m$-a.e. equality. Moreover, we develop a Bochner-type integration theory with respect to an $L^0(\mathfrak m)$-valued measure $μ$, for maps whose target ${\rm M}$ is a complete random normed module with base $({\rm X},Σ,\mathfrak m)$, or equivalently an $L^0(\mathfrak m)$-Banach $L^0(\mathfrak m)$-module. Inter alia, we prove versions of the Radon-Nikodým theorem and of the Riesz-Markov-Kakutani representation theorem for $L^0(\mathfrak m)$-valued measures. We also outline several applications of our integration theory: we introduce a notion of martingale with values in a complete random normed module, we propose a definition of random Radon-Nikodým property and we discuss random sets of finite perimeter.

ai.tldr: 为随机赋范模建立了一种Bochner型积分理论，包括L^0值测度、Radon-Nikodým定理和Riesz-Markov-Kakutani表示定理，并讨论了在鞅、随机Radon-Nikodým性质和有限周长随机集方面的应用。
ai.motivation: 随机赋范模是概率分析中的重要结构，但缺乏系统的测度与积分理论，限制了其在随机分析和几何测度论中的应用。
ai.method: 在概率空间上引入L^0值测度，并基于完备随机赋范模（即L^0-Banach L^0-模）发展Bochner型积分，同时证明Radon-Nikodým定理和Riesz-Markov-Kakutani表示定理。
ai.result: 建立了完整的积分理论，包括L^0值测度的基本性质、积分算子的表示，以及若干应用：随机赋范模中的鞅、随机Radon-Nikodým性质和有限周长随机集。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究随机赋范模上的分析问题提供了严格的积分框架，可用于随机微分方程、随机几何测度论等领域。

idea_spark.idea: 利用L^0值测度定义随机版本的Sobolev空间或BV空间，研究随机变分问题。
idea_spark.risk: L^0值测度的构造可能依赖于概率空间的选取，推广到一般随机基底时需注意可测性条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将经典测度论与随机模结构结合，启发在随机分析中发展更一般的积分表示定理。

en.tldr: Develops a Bochner-type integration theory for random normed modules, including L^0-valued measures, Radon-Nikodým theorem, and Riesz-Markov-Kakutani representation theorem, with applications to martingales, random Radon-Nikodým property, and random sets of finite perimeter.
en.motivation: Random normed modules are important in probabilistic analysis but lack a systematic measure and integration theory, limiting their applications in stochastic analysis and geometric measure theory.
en.method: Introduces L^0-valued measures on a probability space and develops Bochner-type integration for maps into a complete random normed module (i.e., an L^0-Banach L^0-module), proving Radon-Nikodým and Riesz-Markov-Kakutani theorems.
en.result: Establishes a full integration theory, including basic properties of L^0-valued measures, representation of integrals, and applications: martingales in random normed modules, random Radon-Nikodým property, and random sets of finite perimeter.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous integration framework for analysis on random normed modules, useful for stochastic differential equations and stochastic geometric measure theory.

idea_spark.idea: Use L^0-valued measures to define random versions of Sobolev or BV spaces for studying random variational problems.
idea_spark.risk: The construction of L^0-valued measures may depend on the choice of probability space; generalization to arbitrary random bases requires careful measurability conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining classical measure theory with random module structures inspires the development of more general integral representation theorems in stochastic analysis.

papers.title: Sculpt4D: Generating 4D Shapes via Sparse-Attention Diffusion Transformers
papers.summary: Recent breakthroughs in 3D generative modeling have yielded remarkable progress in static shape synthesis, yet high-fidelity dynamic 4D generation remains elusive, hindered by temporal artifacts and prohibitive computational demand. We present Sculpt4D, a native 4D generative framework that seamlessly integrates efficient temporal modeling into a pretrained 3D Diffusion Transformer (Hunyuan3D 2.1), thereby mitigating the scarcity of 4D training data. At its core lies a Block Sparse Attention mechanism that preserves object identity by anchoring to the initial frame while capturing rich motion dynamics via a time-decaying sparse mask. This design faithfully models complex spatiotemporal dependencies with high fidelity, while sidestepping the quadratic overhead of full attention and reducing network total computation by 56%. Consequently, Sculpt4D establishes a new state-of-the-art in temporally coherent 4D synthesis and charts a path toward efficient and scalable 4D generation.

ai.tldr: 提出Sculpt4D，一种原生4D生成框架，通过稀疏注意力扩散变压器实现高保真动态4D形状合成，减少56%计算量并达到新最优。
ai.motivation: 现有3D生成模型在静态形状合成上进展显著，但高保真动态4D生成仍受时间伪影和巨大计算需求困扰。
ai.method: 将高效时间建模集成到预训练3D扩散变压器Hunyuan3D 2.1中，核心是块稀疏注意力机制，通过锚定初始帧和时变稀疏掩码保持物体身份并捕捉丰富运动动态。
ai.result: 在时间连贯的4D合成上达到新最优，网络总计算量减少56%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户高效生成时间连贯的4D形状，适用于动画、虚拟现实等动态场景。

idea_spark.idea: 利用预训练3D模型的知识，通过稀疏注意力高效扩展至4D，避免从零训练。
idea_spark.risk: 稀疏掩码设计可能丢失部分细节运动信息，需在效率和保真度间平衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从3D扩散变压器出发，通过注意力稀疏化实现4D生成，启发其他维度扩展（如5D）的类似思路。

zh.tldr: 提出Sculpt4D，一种原生4D生成框架，通过稀疏注意力扩散变压器实现高保真动态4D形状合成，减少56%计算量并达到新最优。
zh.motivation: 现有3D生成模型在静态形状合成上进展显著，但高保真动态4D生成仍受时间伪影和巨大计算需求困扰。
zh.method: 将高效时间建模集成到预训练3D扩散变压器Hunyuan3D 2.1中，核心是块稀疏注意力机制，通过锚定初始帧和时变稀疏掩码保持物体身份并捕捉丰富运动动态。
zh.result: 在时间连贯的4D合成上达到新最优，网络总计算量减少56%。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户高效生成时间连贯的4D形状，适用于动画、虚拟现实等动态场景。

idea_spark.idea: 利用预训练3D模型的知识，通过稀疏注意力高效扩展至4D，避免从零训练。
idea_spark.risk: 稀疏掩码设计可能丢失部分细节运动信息，需在效率和保真度间平衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从3D扩散变压器出发，通过注意力稀疏化实现4D生成，启发其他维度扩展（如5D）的类似思路。

en.tldr: Proposes Sculpt4D, a native 4D generative framework that achieves high-fidelity dynamic 4D shape synthesis via sparse-attention diffusion transformers, reducing computation by 56% and setting a new state-of-the-art.
en.motivation: Recent 3D generative models excel at static shapes, but high-fidelity dynamic 4D generation is hindered by temporal artifacts and prohibitive computational demands.
en.method: Integrates efficient temporal modeling into a pretrained 3D Diffusion Transformer (Hunyuan3D 2.1) using a Block Sparse Attention mechanism that anchors to the initial frame and captures motion dynamics via a time-decaying sparse mask.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art temporally coherent 4D synthesis with a 56% reduction in total network computation.
en.help_to_user: Helps users efficiently generate temporally coherent 4D shapes for applications like animation and virtual reality.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage knowledge from pretrained 3D models and extend to 4D via sparse attention, avoiding training from scratch.
idea_spark.risk: The sparse mask design may miss some fine motion details, requiring a balance between efficiency and fidelity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from a 3D diffusion transformer and achieving 4D generation via attention sparsification inspires similar approaches for higher-dimensional extensions (e.g., 5D).

papers.title: Encoder-Free Human Motion Understanding via Structured Motion Descriptions
papers.summary: The world knowledge and reasoning capabilities of text-based large language models (LLMs) are advancing rapidly, yet current approaches to human motion understanding, including motion question answering and captioning, have not fully exploited these capabilities. Existing LLM-based methods typically learn motion-language alignment through dedicated encoders that project motion features into the LLM's embedding space, remaining constrained by cross-modal representation and alignment. Inspired by biomechanical analysis, where joint angles and body-part kinematics have long served as a precise descriptive language for human movement, we propose \textbf{Structured Motion Description (SMD)}, a rule-based, deterministic approach that converts joint position sequences into structured natural language descriptions of joint angles, body part movements, and global trajectory. By representing motion as text, SMD enables LLMs to apply their pretrained knowledge of body parts, spatial directions, and movement semantics directly to motion reasoning, without requiring learned encoders or alignment modules. We show that this approach goes beyond state-of-the-art results on both motion question answering (66.7\% on BABEL-QA, 90.1\% on HuMMan-QA) and motion captioning (R@1 of 0.584, CIDEr of 53.16 on HumanML3D), surpassing all prior methods. SMD additionally offers practical benefits: the same text input works across different LLMs with only lightweight LoRA adaptation (validated on 8 LLMs from 6 model families), and its human-readable representation enables interpretable attention analysis over motion descriptions. Code, data, and pretrained LoRA adapters are available at https://yaozhang182.github.io/motion-smd/.

ai.tldr: 提出结构化运动描述（SMD），将关节位置序列转换为结构化自然语言描述，无需编码器即可让大语言模型直接进行运动推理，在运动问答和运动描述任务上超越现有方法。
ai.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的运动理解方法依赖专用编码器进行跨模态对齐，未能充分利用大语言模型的世界知识和推理能力。
ai.method: 受生物力学分析启发，设计基于规则的确定性方法，将关节角度、身体部位运动和全局轨迹转换为结构化自然语言描述（SMD），使大语言模型直接应用预训练知识进行运动推理。
ai.result: 在BABEL-QA和HuMMan-QA上分别达到66.7%和90.1%准确率，在HumanML3D上R@1为0.584、CIDEr为53.16，超越所有先前方法；支持8种大语言模型仅需轻量LoRA适配。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需编码器、可解释性强的运动理解方案，便于用户直接使用大语言模型处理运动相关任务。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将SMD与多模态大语言模型结合，实现更丰富的运动交互应用。
idea_spark.risk: 规则化描述可能丢失细微运动细节，对复杂或非标准动作的泛化能力需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 生物力学中的关节角度描述语言启发我们重新思考运动表示方式，避免跨模态对齐瓶颈。

en.tldr: Proposes Structured Motion Description (SMD), a rule-based method converting joint sequences into structured natural language, enabling LLMs to perform motion reasoning without encoders, achieving state-of-the-art results on motion QA and captioning.
en.motivation: Existing LLM-based motion understanding methods rely on dedicated encoders for cross-modal alignment, failing to fully leverage LLMs' world knowledge and reasoning capabilities.
en.method: Inspired by biomechanical analysis, SMD deterministically converts joint angles, body part movements, and global trajectory into structured natural language descriptions, allowing LLMs to directly apply pretrained knowledge.
en.result: Achieves 66.7% on BABEL-QA, 90.1% on HuMMan-QA, and R@1 of 0.584, CIDEr of 53.16 on HumanML3D, surpassing all prior methods; validated across 8 LLMs with lightweight LoRA adaptation.
en.help_to_user: Provides an encoder-free, interpretable motion understanding approach that enables direct use of LLMs for motion-related tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining SMD with multimodal LLMs for richer motion interaction applications.
idea_spark.risk: Rule-based descriptions may miss subtle motion details; generalization to complex or non-standard actions needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Biomechanical joint angle descriptions inspire rethinking motion representation to avoid cross-modal alignment bottlenecks.

papers.title: Modeling dependency between operational risk losses and macroeconomic variables using Hidden Markov Models
papers.summary: Predicting future operational risk losses gives rise to a significant challenge due to the heterogeneous and time-dependent structures present in real-world data. Furthermore, stress test exercises require examining the relationship with operational losses. To capture such relationship, we propose to use an extension of Hidden Markov Models to multivariate observations. This model introduces a third auxiliary variable designed to accommodate the economic covariates in the time-series data. We detail the unique aspects of operational risk data and describe how model calibration is achieved via the Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm. Additionally, we provide the calibration results for the various risk-event types and analyze the relevance of the inclusion of the macroeconomic covariates.

ai.tldr: 提出一种扩展的隐马尔可夫模型，用于捕捉操作风险损失与宏观经济变量之间的依赖关系，并通过EM算法进行校准。
ai.motivation: 操作风险损失数据具有异质性和时间依赖性，且压力测试需要考察其与宏观经济变量的关系，现有模型难以有效处理。
ai.method: 采用多元观测的隐马尔可夫模型扩展，引入辅助变量容纳经济协变量，通过期望最大化算法进行模型校准。
ai.result: 给出了不同风险事件类型的校准结果，分析了宏观经济协变量纳入的相关性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用隐马尔可夫模型建模操作风险损失与宏观经济变量的关系，以及EM算法的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将模型扩展为动态贝叶斯网络，以捕捉更复杂的变量间交互。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设隐状态数量固定，可能无法适应突发性结构变化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从操作风险与宏观变量的依赖关系出发，启发将隐马尔可夫模型用于其他领域的时间序列因果分析。

zh.tldr: 提出一种扩展的隐马尔可夫模型，用于捕捉操作风险损失与宏观经济变量之间的依赖关系，并通过EM算法进行校准。
zh.motivation: 操作风险损失数据具有异质性和时间依赖性，且压力测试需要考察其与宏观经济变量的关系，现有模型难以有效处理。

en.tldr: Proposes an extension of Hidden Markov Models to capture the dependency between operational risk losses and macroeconomic variables, calibrated via the EM algorithm.
en.motivation: Operational risk loss data exhibit heterogeneity and time dependence, and stress testing requires examining relationships with macroeconomic variables, which existing models handle poorly.
en.method: Uses a multivariate Hidden Markov Model extension with an auxiliary variable to accommodate economic covariates, calibrated via the Expectation-Maximization algorithm.
en.result: Provides calibration results for various risk-event types and analyzes the relevance of including macroeconomic covariates.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to model dependencies between operational risk losses and macroeconomic variables using Hidden Markov Models and the EM algorithm.

idea_spark.idea: Consider extending the model to a dynamic Bayesian network to capture more complex variable interactions.
idea_spark.risk: The model assumes a fixed number of hidden states, which may not adapt to sudden structural changes.
idea_spark.inspiration: From the dependency between operational risk and macro variables, inspires the use of Hidden Markov Models for causal analysis in other time series domains.

papers.title: Teacher-Guided Routing for Sparse Vision Mixture-of-Experts
papers.summary: Recent progress in deep learning has been driven by increasingly large-scale models, but the resulting computational cost has become a critical bottleneck. Sparse Mixture of Experts (MoE) offers an effective solution by activating only a small subset of experts for each input, achieving high scalability without sacrificing inference speed. Although effective, sparse MoE training exhibits characteristic optimization difficulties. Because the router receives informative gradients only through the experts selected in the forward pass, it suffers from gradient blocking and obtains little information from unselected routes. This limited, highly localized feedback makes it difficult for the router to learn appropriate expert-selection scores and often leads to unstable routing dynamics, such as fluctuating expert assignments during training. To address this issue, we propose TGR-MoE: Teacher-Guided Routing for Sparse Vision Mixture-of-Experts, a simple yet effective method that stabilizes router learning using supervision derived from a pretrained dense teacher model. TGR-MoE constructs a teacher router from the teacher's intermediate representations and uses its routing outputs as pseudo-supervision for the student router, suppressing frequent routing fluctuations during training and enabling knowledge-guided expert selection from the early stages of training. Extensive experiments on ImageNet-1K and CIFAR-100 demonstrate that TGR consistently improves both accuracy and routing consistency, while maintaining stable training even under highly sparse configurations.

ai.tldr: 提出教师引导路由方法TGR-MoE，利用预训练密集教师模型的中间表示生成伪标签来稳定稀疏MoE的路由器学习，缓解梯度阻塞和路由波动问题。
ai.motivation: 稀疏MoE训练中路由器仅从被选专家获得梯度，导致梯度阻塞和路由波动，影响训练稳定性和性能。
ai.method: 从预训练密集教师模型的中间表示构建教师路由器，将其路由输出作为伪监督信号指导学生路由器，抑制训练早期频繁的路由波动。
ai.result: 在ImageNet-1K和CIFAR-100上，TGR-MoE显著提升了准确率和路由一致性，在高稀疏配置下仍保持稳定训练。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用教师模型的知识来稳定稀疏MoE训练，适用于大规模视觉模型的高效训练场景。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将教师路由知识以对比学习或互信息方式融入学生路由器，而非直接伪标签。
idea_spark.risk: 教师模型的选择和中间表示提取可能引入额外计算开销，且对教师质量敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从知识蒸馏中获取灵感，将路由决策视为可蒸馏的知识，启发更通用的稀疏模型训练范式。

en.tldr: Proposes TGR-MoE, a teacher-guided routing method that uses intermediate representations from a pretrained dense teacher model to generate pseudo-labels, stabilizing router learning in sparse MoE and mitigating gradient blocking and routing fluctuations.
en.motivation: In sparse MoE training, the router only receives gradients from selected experts, causing gradient blocking and routing fluctuations that harm training stability and performance.
en.method: Constructs a teacher router from the teacher's intermediate representations and uses its routing outputs as pseudo-supervision for the student router, suppressing frequent routing fluctuations early in training.
en.result: On ImageNet-1K and CIFAR-100, TGR-MoE significantly improves accuracy and routing consistency, maintaining stable training even under highly sparse configurations.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to leverage teacher knowledge to stabilize sparse MoE training, applicable to efficient training of large-scale vision models.

idea_spark.idea: Explore incorporating teacher routing knowledge via contrastive learning or mutual information into the student router, rather than direct pseudo-labels.
idea_spark.risk: Selection of teacher model and extraction of intermediate representations may introduce extra computational cost and are sensitive to teacher quality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from knowledge distillation, treating routing decisions as distillable knowledge, inspiring more general training paradigms for sparse models.

papers.title: The First Challenge on Remote Sensing Infrared Image Super-Resolution at NTIRE 2026: Benchmark Results and Method Overview
papers.summary: This paper presents the NTIRE 2026 Remote Sensing Infrared Image Super-Resolution (x4) Challenge, one of the associated challenges of NTIRE 2026. The challenge aims to recover high-resolution (HR) infrared images from low-resolution (LR) inputs generated through bicubic downsampling with a x4 scaling factor. The objective is to develop effective models or solutions that achieve state-of-the-art performance for infrared image SR in remote sensing scenarios. To reflect the characteristics of infrared data and practical application needs, the challenge adopts a single-track setting. A total of 115 participants registered for the competition, with 13 teams submitting valid entries. This report summarizes the challenge design, dataset, evaluation protocol, main results, and the representative methods of each team. The challenge serves as a benchmark to advance research in infrared image super-resolution and promote the development of effective solutions for real-world remote sensing applications.

ai.tldr: 本文介绍了NTIRE 2026遥感红外图像超分辨率挑战赛，总结了数据集、评估协议、主要结果和各团队的代表性方法。
ai.motivation: 遥感红外图像超分辨率在现实应用中具有重要意义，但缺乏统一的基准和挑战赛来推动研究。
ai.method: 挑战赛采用单赛道设置，使用双三次下采样生成低分辨率输入，要求参赛模型实现4倍超分辨率。
ai.result: 共有115人注册，13支队伍提交有效结果，本文汇总了各团队的方法和性能。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户了解当前遥感红外图像超分辨率领域的最先进方法和基准性能。

idea_spark.idea: 可尝试将红外图像超分辨率与多模态融合（如可见光图像）结合，提升复原效果。
idea_spark.risk: 红外图像噪声和低对比度可能限制超分辨率方法的泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴其他领域（如医学图像）的超分辨率方法，探索针对红外特性的专用网络结构。

en.tldr: This paper presents the NTIRE 2026 Remote Sensing Infrared Image Super-Resolution Challenge, summarizing the dataset, evaluation protocol, main results, and representative methods of each team.
en.motivation: Infrared image super-resolution in remote sensing is important for real-world applications but lacks unified benchmarks and challenges to drive progress.
en.method: The challenge adopts a single-track setting, using bicubic downsampling to generate low-resolution inputs, requiring models to achieve 4× super-resolution.
en.result: 115 participants registered, 13 teams submitted valid entries, and the paper summarizes their methods and performance.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand state-of-the-art methods and benchmark performance in remote sensing infrared image super-resolution.

idea_spark.idea: Consider combining infrared super-resolution with multi-modal fusion (e.g., visible images) to improve restoration quality.
idea_spark.risk: Noise and low contrast in infrared images may limit the generalization of super-resolution methods.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw inspiration from super-resolution methods in other domains (e.g., medical imaging) to design specialized network architectures for infrared characteristics.

papers.title: Quantum Mixing for Schrödinger eigenfunctions in Benjamini-Schramm limit
papers.summary: Let $-Δ_{\mathbb{H}}+V$ be the Schrödinger operator on $\mathbb{H}$ where $V \in L^p(\mathbb{H}) \cap L^\infty(\mathbb{H})$ for some $p > 0$. If $(X_n)$ is a uniformly discrete sequence of compact hyperbolic surfaces with a uniform spectral gap that Benjamini-Schramm converges to $\mathbb{H}$, we prove quantum mixing for the eigenfunctions of $-Δ_{X_n}+V_n$ in any sufficiently large spectral window $I$, where $V_n$ is the potential on $X_n$ induced by $V$. These apply to large degree lifts of a potential on a base surface such as congruence covers of arithmetic surfaces, with high probability to random hyperbolic surfaces in the Weil-Petersson model of large genus, and to Hartree one-particle operators arising in thermodynamic limit of many-body Bose gas on hyperbolic surfaces. The proof uses the Duhamel formula for the hyperbolic wave equation together with exponential mixing of the geodesic flow on $T^1 X_n$.

ai.tldr: 证明了在Benjamini-Schramm极限下，具有均匀谱间隙的紧致双曲曲面上薛定谔算子的本征函数满足量子混合性质。
ai.motivation: 研究双曲曲面上薛定谔算子的本征函数在极限下的量子混合行为，特别是对于大度数提升和随机双曲曲面。
ai.method: 利用双曲波动方程的Duhamel公式以及测地流在单位切丛上的指数混合性质。
ai.result: 在足够大的谱窗口内，本征函数表现出量子混合，适用于大度数提升、随机双曲曲面以及多体玻色气体的热力学极限。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了双曲曲面上量子混合的严格数学证明，有助于理解量子混沌和谱理论。

idea_spark.idea: 将双曲波动方程与测地流混合结合，可能用于研究其他量子系统的本征函数统计。

en.tldr: Proves quantum mixing for Schrödinger eigenfunctions on compact hyperbolic surfaces in the Benjamini-Schramm limit, assuming a uniform spectral gap.
en.motivation: To study the quantum mixing behavior of Schrödinger eigenfunctions on hyperbolic surfaces under limits, especially for large degree lifts and random surfaces.
en.method: Uses the Duhamel formula for the hyperbolic wave equation together with exponential mixing of the geodesic flow on the unit tangent bundle.
en.result: Quantum mixing holds in any sufficiently large spectral window, applicable to large degree lifts, random hyperbolic surfaces, and thermodynamic limits of many-body Bose gases.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical proof of quantum mixing on hyperbolic surfaces, aiding understanding of quantum chaos and spectral theory.

idea_spark.idea: Combining hyperbolic wave equations with geodesic flow mixing may be used to study eigenfunction statistics in other quantum systems.
idea_spark.risk: The proof relies on uniform spectral gaps and Benjamini-Schramm convergence, which may not hold for surfaces without these properties.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from hyperbolic geometry and dynamical systems to connect classical chaos with quantum behavior.

papers.title: Measuring Opinion Bias and Sycophancy via LLM-based Coercion
papers.summary: Large language models increasingly shape the information people consume: they are embedded in search, consulted for professional advice, deployed as agents, and used as a first stop for questions about policy, ethics, health, and politics. When such a model silently holds a position on a contested topic, that position propagates at scale into users' decisions. Eliciting a model's positions is harder than it first appears: contemporary assistants answer direct opinion questions with evasive disclaimers, and the same model may concede the opposite position once the user starts arguing one side. We propose a method, released as the open-source llm-bias-bench, for discovering the opinions an LLM actually holds on contested topics under conditions that resemble real multi-turn interaction. The method pairs two complementary free-form probes. Direct probing asks for the model's opinion across five turns of escalating pressure from a simulated user. Indirect probing never asks for an opinion and engages the model in argumentative debate, letting bias leak through how it concedes, resists, or counter-argues. Three user personas (neutral, agree, disagree) collapse into a nine-way behavioral classification that separates persona-independent positions from persona-dependent sycophancy, and an auditable LLM judge produces verdicts with textual evidence. The first instantiation ships 38 topics in Brazilian Portuguese across values, scientific consensus, philosophy, and economic policy. Applied to 13 assistants, the method surfaces findings of practical interest: argumentative debate triggers sycophancy 2-3x more than direct questioning (median 50% to 79%); models that look opinionated under direct questioning often collapse into mirroring under sustained arguments; and attacker capability matters mainly when an existing opinion must be dislodged, not when the assistant starts neutral.

ai.tldr: 提出一种通过多轮交互探测大语言模型在争议话题上真实立场的方法，并开源了基准工具。
ai.motivation: 大语言模型在搜索、咨询、代理等场景中影响用户决策，但其真实立场难以通过直接提问获取，且存在迎合用户偏好的谄媚行为。
ai.method: 设计直接探测（五轮施压提问）和间接探测（辩论式对话）两种互补方法，结合三种用户角色（中立、同意、反对）形成九类行为分类，并由可审计的LLM裁判给出带文本证据的判定。
ai.result: 辩论式对话引发的谄媚行为是直接提问的2-3倍（中位数50% vs 79%）；直接提问中看似有立场的模型在持续辩论中常转为镜像附和；攻击能力仅在需要改变已有立场时重要。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户识别和量化大语言模型在争议话题上的偏见与谄媚倾向，提升对AI输出可靠性的判断。

idea_spark.idea: 结合对抗性辩论和用户角色模拟，系统性地暴露模型隐藏的偏见。
idea_spark.risk: LLM裁判本身可能存在偏见，影响判定客观性；辩论式探测可能诱导模型产生非真实立场。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从心理学中的认知失调和顺从实验获得启发，将人际互动中的偏见探测方法应用于AI系统。

en.tldr: Proposes a method to elicit LLMs' true opinions on contested topics through multi-turn interaction, released as an open-source benchmark.
en.motivation: LLMs influence user decisions in search, advice, and agency, but their true stances are hard to obtain via direct questions due to evasive disclaimers and sycophancy.
en.method: Pairs direct probing (five-turn escalating pressure) with indirect probing (argumentative debate), uses three user personas (neutral, agree, disagree) to form a nine-way behavioral classification, and an auditable LLM judge provides verdicts with textual evidence.
en.result: Argumentative debate triggers sycophancy 2-3x more than direct questioning (median 50% vs 79%); models appearing opinionated under direct questioning often collapse into mirroring under sustained arguments; attacker capability matters mainly when dislodging an existing opinion.
en.help_to_user: Helps users identify and quantify bias and sycophancy in LLMs on contested topics, improving assessment of AI output reliability.

idea_spark.idea: Systematically expose hidden biases by combining adversarial debate and persona simulation.
idea_spark.risk: The LLM judge may itself be biased, affecting objectivity; debate probing might induce non-genuine stances.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by psychological experiments on cognitive dissonance and compliance, adapting interpersonal bias detection methods to AI systems.

papers.title: Instance-level Visual Active Tracking with Occlusion-Aware Planning
papers.summary: Visual Active Tracking (VAT) aims to control cameras to follow a target in 3D space, which is critical for applications like drone navigation and security surveillance. However, it faces two key bottlenecks in real-world deployment: confusion from visually similar distractors caused by insufficient instance-level discrimination and severe failure under occlusions due to the absence of active planning. To address these, we propose OA-VAT, a unified pipeline with three complementary modules. First, a training-free Instance-Aware Offline Prototype Initialization aggregates multi-view augmented features via DINOv3 to construct discriminative instance prototypes, mitigating distractor confusion. Second, an Online Prototype Enhancement Tracker enhances prototypes online and integrates a confidence-aware Kalman filter for stable tracking under appearance and motion changes. Third, an Occlusion-Aware Trajectory Planner, trained on our new Planning-20k dataset, uses conditional diffusion to generate obstacle-avoiding paths for occlusion recovery. Experiments demonstrate OA-VAT achieves 0.93 average SR on UnrealCV (+2.2% vs. SOTA TrackVLA), 90.8% average CAR on real-world datasets (+12.1% vs. SOTA GC-VAT), and 81.6% TSR on a DJI Tello drone. Running at 35 FPS on an RTX 3090, it delivers robust, real-time performance for practical deployment.

ai.tldr: 提出OA-VAT，通过实例感知原型初始化、在线原型增强跟踪和遮挡感知轨迹规划，解决视觉主动跟踪中的干扰混淆和遮挡失败问题。
ai.motivation: 现有视觉主动跟踪方法缺乏实例级区分能力，易受相似干扰物混淆，且缺少主动规划导致遮挡下严重失败。
ai.method: OA-VAT包含三个模块：无训练的实例感知离线原型初始化（利用DINOv3聚合多视图特征）、在线原型增强跟踪器（结合置信度感知卡尔曼滤波）、以及基于条件扩散的遮挡感知轨迹规划器（在Planning-20k数据集上训练）。
ai.result: 在UnrealCV上平均SR达0.93（+2.2%），真实世界数据集平均CAR达90.8%（+12.1%），DJI Tello无人机上TSR达81.6%，RTX 3090上35 FPS。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过实例级区分和遮挡规划提升视觉主动跟踪的鲁棒性和实用性。

idea_spark.idea: 将条件扩散模型用于轨迹规划，可启发其他机器人规划问题中的遮挡恢复策略。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖DINOv3和扩散模型可能带来计算开销，在资源受限设备上部署需优化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合离线原型和在线更新来平衡区分性和适应性，可推广至多目标跟踪或重识别场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将条件扩散模型用于轨迹规划，可启发其他机器人规划问题中的遮挡恢复策略。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖DINOv3和扩散模型可能带来计算开销，在资源受限设备上部署需优化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合离线原型和在线更新来平衡区分性和适应性，可推广至多目标跟踪或重识别场景。

en.tldr: Proposes OA-VAT, which uses instance-aware prototype initialization, online prototype enhancement tracking, and occlusion-aware trajectory planning to address distractor confusion and occlusion failures in visual active tracking.
en.motivation: Existing visual active tracking methods lack instance-level discrimination, leading to confusion from similar distractors, and suffer from severe failures under occlusions due to the absence of active planning.
en.method: OA-VAT consists of three modules: a training-free instance-aware offline prototype initialization using DINOv3 to aggregate multi-view features, an online prototype enhancement tracker with a confidence-aware Kalman filter, and an occlusion-aware trajectory planner based on conditional diffusion trained on the Planning-20k dataset.
en.result: Achieves 0.93 average SR on UnrealCV (+2.2%), 90.8% average CAR on real-world datasets (+12.1%), 81.6% TSR on a DJI Tello drone, and runs at 35 FPS on an RTX 3090.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how instance-level discrimination and occlusion planning improve robustness and practicality in visual active tracking.

idea_spark.idea: Using conditional diffusion for trajectory planning can inspire occlusion recovery strategies in other robotic planning problems.
idea_spark.risk: Reliance on DINOv3 and diffusion models may introduce computational overhead, requiring optimization for resource-constrained deployment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining offline prototypes with online updates to balance discrimination and adaptability can be extended to multi-object tracking or re-identification scenarios.

papers.title: ReCAPA: Hierarchical Predictive Correction to Mitigate Cascading Failures
papers.summary: Vision-Language-Action systems follow instructions to execute multi-step tasks in multimodal environments. Recent VLA approaches typically rely on post-hoc correction mechanisms or operate under fixed task decompositions and alignment schemes. However, once an intermediate step is mis-specified, local errors propagate through subsequent steps and eventually accumulate into cascading failures. To mitigate this compounding effect, we propose Predictive Alignment and Planning Architecture, a framework that uses prediction and contrast to adjust deviations across three levels: actions, subgoals, and trajectories. Semantic alignment is enforced at all levels using a Sinkhorn-based module and a Score-field module. The predictive correction and alignment jointly update the action generator during training, enabling it to adjust fine-grained steps to remain aligned with the overall intent. We further introduce two new metrics to quantify error propagation and recovery processes in tasks, capturing how mistakes spread and fade over long-horizon execution. Experiments show that ReCAPA achieves competitive results on embodied agent benchmarks such as VisualAgentBench, MineDojo, and AI2-THOR, outperforming strong proprietary and open-source Large Language Model baselines.

ai.tldr: 提出ReCAPA框架，通过预测性对齐和对比调整来缓解视觉-语言-动作系统中因中间步骤错误导致的级联故障。
ai.motivation: 现有VLA方法依赖事后修正或固定任务分解，中间步骤错误会逐级传播累积成级联故障。
ai.method: 在动作、子目标和轨迹三个层级使用Sinkhorn模块和Score-field模块进行语义对齐，并通过预测性修正联合更新动作生成器。
ai.result: 在VisualAgentBench、MineDojo、AI2-THOR等基准上取得有竞争力的结果，超越强基线模型。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过层级预测性对齐减少多步任务中的错误累积。

idea_spark.idea: 将Sinkhorn对齐与Score-field结合用于跨层级语义一致性保持。
idea_spark.risk: 对齐模块可能增加训练复杂度，且对长程任务中的错误传播量化仍需更多验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受级联故障现象启发，从错误传播和恢复角度设计新指标。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受级联故障现象启发，从错误传播和恢复角度设计新指标。

en.tldr: Proposes ReCAPA, a framework that mitigates cascading failures in Vision-Language-Action systems via predictive alignment and contrastive adjustment across three levels.
en.motivation: Existing VLA methods rely on post-hoc correction or fixed decomposition, causing local errors to propagate and accumulate into cascading failures.
en.method: Enforces semantic alignment at action, subgoal, and trajectory levels using a Sinkhorn-based module and a Score-field module, jointly updating the action generator with predictive correction.
en.result: Achieves competitive results on VisualAgentBench, MineDojo, and AI2-THOR, outperforming strong baselines.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how hierarchical predictive alignment reduces error accumulation in multi-step tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Combining Sinkhorn alignment with Score-field for cross-level semantic consistency.
idea_spark.risk: Alignment modules may increase training complexity; error propagation quantification for long-horizon tasks needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by cascading failure phenomena, designing new metrics from the perspective of error propagation and recovery.

papers.title: Optimization Workshop Notes for Mathematical Programming with Equilibrium Constraints (MPECs): Second-Order Optimality Conditions
papers.summary: In this workshop, we present a compact but rigorous introduction to second-order optimality conditions for mathematical programs with equilibrium constraints (MPECs). We start from the classical nonlinear programming template, then explain why it fails in the equilibrium-constrained setting, and develop the three main viewpoints used in the literature: (i) multiplier-based conditions, (ii) implicit-programming conditions based on the solution map of the lower-level equilibrium system, and (iii) piecewise-programming conditions obtained by decomposing complementarity structure into smooth pieces. The emphasis is on conceptual structure, critical cones, strong regularity, and the exact role of curvature terms.

ai.tldr: 本文简要而严谨地介绍了带平衡约束数学规划的二阶最优性条件，涵盖三种主流观点。
ai.motivation: 经典非线性规划的二阶条件在平衡约束下失效，需要专门的理论框架。
ai.method: 从经典模板出发，分析失效原因，然后分别阐述基于乘子、隐式规划和分段规划的三类条件。
ai.result: 给出了临界锥、强正则性和曲率项在条件中的确切作用。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究者快速理解MPEC二阶最优性条件的核心概念和不同视角。

idea_spark.idea: 将隐式规划条件与深度学习中的隐式层结合，设计可微平衡层。
idea_spark.risk: 隐式规划条件依赖解映射的可微性，实际中可能难以保证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 临界锥的概念启发我们设计更高效的约束筛选策略。
